mihn0700.5: Calli{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA}, are you going{\n}to bring us the {MCR:s06l63:"Calm"}?
mihn0700.8: {\n}We’re looking forward to another{\n}{MCR:s06l63:"Calm"}, my lady summoner.
mihn0700.10: {\n}And good luck to your guardians as well.
mihn0700.13: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}It comes after a summoner defeats{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and lasts until {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} reappears.
mihn0700.18: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}But {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s still here!{\n}Didn’t make much sense till now.
mihn0700.20: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Don’t say it isn’t worth it...{\n}Because it is.
mihn0700.22: {\n}people can sleep in their{\n}beds without being afraid.
mihn0700.23: {\n}That kind of time is worth anything.
mihn0700.25: {\n}Your words that day, {PC:01:YUNA}--{\n}I remember them well.
mihn0700.26: {\n}Watch out. There are fiends everywhere.{\n}Here, you can have this.
mihn0700.27: {\n}This ring helps keep flames at bay.{\n}Please, give it to the lady summoner.
mihn0700.28: {\n}I’m watching the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s pass by.{\n}They look cool.
mihn0700.29: {\n}Should I become a {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"} or a {\n}blitzer when I grow up? I don’t know.
mihn0700.30: {\n}My sister’s waiting for me, but who cares.
mihn0700.33: {\n}Why don’t you become a blitzer?{\n}Maybe someday you can play for the Goers.
mihn0700.35: {\n}They’re gonna kill me{\n}if I’m late for the operation!
mihn0700.37: {\n}Whew...{\n}At this rate, I’ll croak sooner than {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
mihn0700.40: {\n}Usually the temple contributes some,{\n}but not for this operation.
mihn0700.41: {\n}I’m sure if we defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} will finally bless us.
mihn0700.42: {\n}We’re raising funds at the end of{\n}the Highroad. We’re counting on you!
mihn0700.47: {\n}Don’t stray off the road.{\n}Make our job a little easier.
mihn0700.49: {\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} had better start{\n}getting its act together.
mihn0700.50: {\n}I’m not playing. I’m practicing{\n}with my brother.
mihn0700.51: {\n}It’s important to train.{\n}You never know what’s gonna happen.
mihn0700.53: {\n}My sister wanted to play, so we came here.{\n}I just didn’t expect to see so many fiends.
mihn0700.55: {\n}If there were no fiends in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"},{\n}we wouldn’t even have to worry like this.
mihn0700.56: {\n}My grandpa and I... We used to take{\n}a stroll through here almost every day.
mihn0700.59: {\n}My brother and I were playing. Then a{\n}fiend came out, and he ran away without me.
mihn0700.60: {\n}He ran so fast.{\n}My brother is the best!
mihn0700.61: {\n}I’m gonna practice running.{\n}I’m gonna beat my brother someday.
mihn0700.62: {\n}I’ll protect {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} from now on.{PAUSE}{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} beat us last time, but I’m okay.
mihn0700.63: {\n}Do you know {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s weakness?{\n}Tell me, and I’ll kill it for you.
mihn0700.64: {\n}If you get attacked by fiends,{\n}you can come to us for help.

nagi0700.45: {\n}I’ve created a nasty imp from all{\n}the samples you’ve brought me!
nagi0700.47: {\n}I’ve mixed all kinds of flan together{\n}and created a real nasty one!
nagi0700.52: {\n}Thanks to you, I’ve created{\n}the ultimate horned beast!
nagi0700.53: {\n}After taming all the dragons you{\n}brought, I’ve bred the ultimate wyrm!
nagi0700.58: {\n}Wanna take a swing at it?{\n}The first fight’s free.
nagi0700.61: {\n}What? You lost?{\n}Guess you’re just not up to scratch.
nagi0700.64: {\n}I just got some new items in!{\n}Great deals you won’t regret!
nagi0700.65: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}Sorry, no time for that.{\n}{CHOICE:01}All right, I’ll do it!{\n}{CHOICE:02}Would you explain that again?
nagi0700.163: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
nagi0700.165: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
nagi0700.1: {\n}I never imagined that my mightiest{\n}creation could be defeated.
nagi0700.4: {\n}You’ll of course need to pay for it, though!{\n}Hahaha...
nagi0700.6: {\n}But...the fiends all got away{\n}because I, uh, screwed up.
nagi0700.7: {\n}I’m too old to gather fiends now,{\n}so I’m in quite a fix...
nagi0700.10: {\n}How about it? Not a bad deal, eh?{\n}You won’t regret it!
nagi0700.12: {\n}That’s the spirit, sonny!{\n}Now, go catch all them fiends!
nagi0700.13: {\n}But I’ve one more warning before{\n}I can let you go.
nagi0700.18: {\n}Well, the only catch is a small fee{\n}for each training session.
nagi0700.19: {\n}How about it? Do we have a deal?
nagi0700.20: {\n}How about it? Will you catch{\n}some fiends for me?
nagi0700.24: {\n}Ah! You’ve caught all the fiends of the{\n}{MCR:s0Dl39:"Calm Lands"}. Now I can reopen the arena!
nagi0700.25: {\n}Oops, I almost forgot. Here’s a token{\n}of my appreciation for your hard work.
nagi0700.26: {\n}I don’t know if you have what{\n}it takes to open it, though.
nagi0700.96: {\n}Been hunting out on the {MCR:s0Dl28:"Thunder Plains"}, eh?{\n}Tread lightly, my boy! Tread lightly!
nagi0700.106: {\n}One lap through the forest on {MCR:s0Dl10:"Kilika Island"}{\n}is all it takes to grab ’em all!
nagi0700.119: {\n}I need just a few more winged{\n}imps to round out my collection!
nagi0700.122: {\n}Mind catching me a few more wolves?{\n}I need more to continue me research!
nagi0700.123: {\n}I see you’re catching wolves, eh?{\n}Don’t let them get away!
nagi0700.125: {\n}I need just a few more flan!{\n}Can’t wait to mix them all together!
nagi0700.128: {\n}Can you get some more lizards for me?{\n}Just a few more, now.
nagi0700.129: {\n}I see you’re catching lizards, eh?{\n}Don’t let them get away!
nagi0700.130: {\n}I want you to find me some{\n}small birds for my collection!
nagi0700.131: {\n}I need just a few more small birds.{\n}Got a big birdcage all ready for ’em!
nagi0700.132: {\n}So you’ve been gathering small birds.{\n}They may be plump, but they taste bad!
nagi0700.133: {\n}I want to know more about the{\n}poison found in those flying bugs.
nagi0700.134: {\n}I need just a few more flying bugs.{\n}Go get them for me!
nagi0700.136: {\n}If you see any eyeballs that go flap-flap,{\n}I want you to catch ’em for me!
nagi0700.137: {\n}I need more winged eyeballs in{\n}order to continue my research!
nagi0700.139: {\n}I want you to find me some four-legged{\n}beasts that brandish huge horns!
nagi0700.140: {\n}I need just a few more horned beasts.{\n}I’ll be waiting right here.
nagi0700.143: {\n}I need just a few more dragons{\n}to continue my research!
nagi0700.145: {\n}I wonder what makes elementals tick...{\n}Sure wish I had some to study.
nagi0700.146: {\n}I need a few more elementals to complete{\n}my research on the four elements!
nagi0700.147: {\n}So you started an elemental collection, eh?{\n}Hit ’em with the element they hate most!
nagi0700.149: {\n}I need just a few more iron giants.{\n}They’re tough, so be careful.
nagi0700.151: {\n}I want to research fiends that{\n}blow up when you smack them.
nagi0700.152: {\n}I need a few more bombs.{\n}Don’t waste them by making them blow up!
nagi0700.155: {\n}I need just a couple more mushrooms.{\n}Take care when harvesting!
nagi0700.156: {\n}So you’ve been gathering mushrooms, eh?{\n}Hit ’em with magic or they’ll get upset!
nagi0700.157: {\n}Thanks to you, the monster{\n}collection is growing.

omeg0100.0: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}It seems we rate his{\n}personal attention now.
omeg0100.1: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Find your peace on the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}.{\n}Leave {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} to the living.

bika0300.4: {\n}My child is lost in{\n}the ruins of {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"}.
bika0300.47: {TIME:00}{\n}There’s a picture of a{\n}fiend on the stone here.
bika0300.51: {TIME:00}{\n}Alek and Aloja play tag{\n}in the ruins of men.
bika0300.54: {TIME:00}{\n}A fiery inscription--The lord{\n}of the hole is gone. Isrra thinks.
bika0300.55: {TIME:00}{\n}Much-curious Elio has left on a journey.
bika0300.85: {TIME:00}{\n}Writing appears when the sphere{\n}is set into the stone!
bika0300.12: {\n}There’s nothing over there...{\n}now that {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"} is gone.

mamm0000.4: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}{MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}! You should take one, too.{\n}It’d make a great gift for little {PC:01:YUNA}!
mamm0000.7: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}We shouldn’t be{\n}wasting our time like this!
mamm0000.9: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Let me tell you what the hurry is!

bvyt1000.7: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Think they expect us{\n}to give up and die down here.
bvyt1000.8: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Well, that’s a lame{\n}way to kill someone.
bvyt1000.11: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Wonder if we should wait for her...

bsvr0400.13: {\n}You’re the guy from the sea, right?{\n}I heard about you from Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}.
bsvr0400.14: {\n}{MCR:s06l3A:"High Summoner Gandof"}, give us your{\n}blessing, and watch over my family.
bsvr0400.15: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsvr0400.16: {\n}What are you saying? You would{\n}break the precepts, fool child?
bsvr0400.18: {\n}You should pray for the{\n}apprentice summoner’s safety, too.
bsvr0400.21: {\n}I’m heading out fishing, so I’m{\n}praying for a {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}less ocean.
bsvr0400.22: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsvr0400.23: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} put up a great fight this year.{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}’s the best, ya?
bsvr0400.24: {\n}It may not be much help to Lady {PC:01:YUNA},{\n}but allow me to pray for you.
bsvr0400.25: {\n}I know {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s out there, but if I{\n}don’t go out, my family won’t eat.
bsvr0400.26: {\n}I hear you’re traitors, now?{\n}Who’s responsible for that nonsense?
bsvr0400.29: {\n}I’ll be out to sea soon. Perhaps I’ll{\n}be greeting the Calm from deck.
bsvr0400.31: {\n}I’m praying for the blessings of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}to guide that flying ship.
bsvr0400.32: {\n}Odd clothes you got. What land you from?{\n}This your first time to {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}?
bsvr0400.33: {\n}We don’t get many strangers here.{\n}I remember every visitor we get.
bsvr0400.34: {\n}Everyone’s gone to the temple, but{\n}I’m more comfortable praying at home.
bsvr0400.35: {\n}And what if something happened?{\n}I’d be afraid to go see.
bsvr0400.37: {\n}I am sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will become a high{\n}summoner. Everyone in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} thinks so.
bsvr0400.38: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed.{\n}Maybe {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will repent and come home.
bsvr0400.41: {\n}I can’t figure whether I’m gonna join{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} or the Crusaders!
bsvr0400.42: {\n}I’m pretty good at blitz, ya?{\n}I can hold my breath and everything!
bsvr0400.43: {\n}They say I gotta train in order{\n}to join the Crusaders...
bsvr0400.44: {\n}Me and Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will{\n}beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, just the three of us!
bsvr0400.48: {\n}Let’s go help the summoner!{\n}I promise I’ll be a good boy!
bsvr0400.49: {\n}A summoner came to this village not{\n}long ago. Now what was his name?
bsvr0400.50: {\n}Looks like you got{\n}over the toxin, ya?
bsvr0400.51: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and the others aren’t back.{\n}What could have happened?
bsvr0400.52: {\n}It is true Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s a traitor?{\n}No one here believes that at all!
bsvr0400.53: {\n}We got letters from the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}!{\n}They’re doing great in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?
bsvr0400.54: {\n}I wonder if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is really{\n}going to go away?
bsvr0400.55: {\n}Long as I’m around, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s weaving{\n}will be known as nothing but the best!
bsvr0400.56: {\n}Don’t you worry. The summoner will{\n}return, I know it.
bsvr0400.57: {\n}Worrying over a few hours delay{\n}is nothing but a lack of faith!
bsvr0400.59: {\n}Who cares who they’re calling traitor.{\n}Defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and it’ll all be forgotten!
bsvr0400.60: {\n}Wait for the Calm to come before rejoicing.{\n}Wouldn’t want any...false hope.
bsvr0400.61: {\n}I am sure that Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} is{\n}watching over our apprentice summoner.
bsvr0400.62: {\n}On a hot day like today,{\n}it’s best to be in the shade, ya?
bsvr0400.63: {\n}I wove so much last month. All lost{\n}when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} destroyed my boat.
bsvr0400.65: {\n}Gone for a night and a day now.{\n}I’m too worried to speak!
bsvr0400.66: {\n}Though I’m sure nothing bad is{\n}happening. Not to that summoner.
bsvr0400.67: {\n}I’m glad the ferry’s on its way,{\n}but {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will be back, he will.
bsvr0400.69: {\n}When those children calling themselves{\n}{MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s come back, they’re in for a scolding.
bsvr0400.70: {\n}All these warrior monks were here{\n}looking for Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.
bsvr0400.71: {\n}If Lady {PC:01:YUNA} defeats {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} I’m sure{\n}those nasty rumors will go away.
bsvr0400.72: {\n}I wonder who was riding{\n}on that ship in the sky?
bsvr0400.79: {\n}You’re going with Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?{\n}Does that mean you’re a guardian?
bsvr0400.81: {\n}You’re saving it for the tournament then!{\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} have got to win this year!
bsvr0400.84: {\n}You’re the talk of the town, you know?{\n}Word travels fast in a village this size.
bsvr0400.90: {\n}The apprentice is the apprentice!{\n}The apprentice summoner, ya?
bsvr0400.91: {\n}The Cloister of Trials!{\n}It’s been a day already.
bsvr0400.93: {\n}I’m watching the store while{\n}sis is off praying.
bsvr0400.97: {\n}I wonder if we’ll get more customers{\n}now that the ferry’s up and running again.
bsvr0400.99: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are still in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?{\n}You should pay ’em a visit sometime.
bsvr0400.100: {\n}What happened to the flying ship?{\n}I hope it made it through the fight.
bsvr0400.101: {\n}Just between me and you, I hear that{\n}there’s no maesters left anymore!
bsvr0400.104: {\n}The apprentice entered the trials,{\n}and hasn’t come back...
bsvr0400.105: {\n}I’m sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will have{\n}lots of stories when she gets back.
bsvr0400.107: {\n}When the Calm comes, Lady {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}has to come back so we can celebrate!
bsvr0400.108: {\n}What’s a trader? I asked the{\n}monk, but he won’t tell me.
bsvr0400.109: {\n}If that flying ship comes back{\n}I’m gonna sing real loud!
bsvr0400.112: {\n}Fiends are around even during the day.{\n}Take care not to travel alone, ya?
bsvr0400.113: {\n}You know it’s too dangerous.{\n}Sorry, but you can’t pass.
bsvr0400.115: {\n}Instead of just loafing around{\n}you should be praying, too.
bsvr0400.116: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and his troops are on a mission.{\n}I’m on watch duty.
bsvr0400.118: {\n}Like to take a rest?{\n}Got to keep sharp, ya?
bsvr0400.120: {\n}Compared to the ones we fought during{\n}the operation, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} fiends are easy!
bsvr0400.121: {\n}I did my time in battle!{\n}Fiends are no problem.
bsvr0400.122: {\n}That flying ship looked like an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}machina to me. Hope it works this time.
bsvr0400.123: {\n}The Crusaders’ Lodge is open{\n}to guests. Take a rest?
bsvr0400.124: {\n}I want to go to the temple, but{\n}there’s an operation to prepare for.
bsvr0400.127: {\n}I got better, but only after{\n}praying at the temple a lot.
bsvr0400.128: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsvr0400.129: {\n}I hope I get over the toxin quick.{\n}The big operation’s coming up!
bsvr0400.130: {\n}You looking for {PC:04:WAKKA}? The priest{\n}called him to the temple a while back.
bsvr0400.132: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsvr0400.133: {\n}I’m praying for Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}’s and the others’{\n}safety. Yevon knows they’ll need it.
bsvr0400.135: {\n}Just a bunch of empty beds{\n}without people to sleep in them.
bsvr0400.136: {\n}I can’t believe {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"}{\n}was a failure. I just can’t.
bsvr0400.137: {\n}I just pray everyone makes{\n}it back okay. Please.
bsvr0400.138: {\n}Praying won’t keep fiends away.{\n}It takes {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s to defend {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsvr0400.139: {\n}The toxin finally wore off. Now to{\n}make up for all my downtime, ya?
bsvr0400.140: {\n}The battle with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} ain’t over yet...{\n}I wish there was something we could do.
bsvr0400.141: {\n}I’m fixing a hole where the{\n}rain gets in.
bsvr0400.142: {\n}Rent’s free, but I’ve been working{\n}like a dog just fixing the place.
bsvr0400.145: {\n}He looks pretty weak.{\n}Maybe he just can’t take it.
bsvr0400.146: {\n}I guess I’ll just keep fixing the leaks{\n}until the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s get back.
bsvr0400.149: {\n}Seems the fiends have increased{\n}with the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s gone.
bsvr0400.150: {\n}I’m no fiend-fighter, so I fix things{\n}and help the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s that way.
bsvr0400.153: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} toxin got to you.{\n}Took your memory, eh?
bsvr0400.154: {\n}I’d be happy to teach you anything{\n}you’ve forgotten, sonny.
bsvr0400.157: {\n}Maybe if I remind you of some things,{\n}you’ll remember who you are!
bsvr0400.166: {\n}All this worrying’s no good{\n}for an old man like myself.
bsvr0400.167: {\n}I’m sure you’d like to know{\n}more before you head out, eh?
bsvr0400.169: {\n}Looks like you got over the toxin.{\n}Praise be to {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, eh?
bsvr0400.171: {\n}We simple folk ain’t got a clue{\n}what them temple elders are thinking.
bsvr0400.172: {\n}I think I’ll stick around long enough to{\n}see {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} get what’s coming to it! Heh!
bsvr0400.173: {\n}Me favorite’s Lord Ohalland, ya?{\n}Spitting image of me old hubby.
bsvr0400.174: {\n}With Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} looking over her,{\n}I’m sure she’ll be returning, ya?
bsvr0400.176: {\n}I’ve nothing to say to a{\n}breaker of the precepts!
bsvr0400.178: {\n}What? You? A guardian?{\n}The toxin still got you, eh?
bsvr0400.179: {\n}What trick have you pulled{\n}on the good Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?
bsvr0400.180: {\n}I made up me mind to pray every{\n}day till Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s Calm begins.
bsvr0400.181: {\n}When the Calm comes, we’ll be putting{\n}up a statue of a new high summoner.
bsvr0400.183: {\n}I wanted to be a blitzer way back when.{\n}I just couldn’t hold my breath.
bsvr0400.184: {\n}Mainlanders love the fabrics{\n}we weave here in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsvr0400.185: {\n}I suppose you can’t run a{\n}business on tradition alone, ya?
bsvr0400.190: {\n}Without breaking the precepts,{\n}all we can do is pray, ya?
bsvr0400.191: {\n}I heard {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} was attacked, ya?{\n}Wh-What if {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s next?
bsvr0400.193: {\n}I bet me praying every day helped{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} finally win, ya?
bsvr0400.195: {\n}I wonder how things are on the mainland.{\n}We don’t get much news down here.
bsvr0400.196: {\n}Sounds like that poppycock about{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA} finally got cleared up.
bsvr0400.197: {\n}Now if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’d just go away,{\n}we’d have nothing to worry about.
bsvr0400.198: {\n}It’s hard to work with the{\n}Calm right around the corner!
bsvr0400.199: {\n}May the apprentice summoner{\n}return to us safely.
bsvr0400.201: {\n}It...It’s like we were{\n}born to live in fear.
bsvr0400.202: {\n}May the protection of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}be with our apprentice.
bsvr0400.204: {\n}When I think about Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s{\n}journey, I wonder if praying is enough.
bsvr0400.205: {\n}I’m sure she’ll be fine.{\n}{PC:05:LULU}’s with her and all.
bsvr0400.207: {\n}You should watch yourself.{\n}Never go against the teachings.
bsvr0400.209: {\n}I can’t believe Lady {PC:01:YUNA} would ever{\n}turn her back to the teachings! Never!
bsvr0400.210: {\n}I pray that the next Calm{\n}will last a long time.
bsvr0400.211: {\n}Please let the Aurochs{\n}score at least one goal.
bsvr0400.214: {\n}When I was born, Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} and{\n}two guardians came to our village.
bsvr0400.217: {\n}If I was strong like Lord {MCR:s06l24:"Zaon"}{\n}I could have been a guardian, too.
bsvr0400.218: {\n}Only sworn guardians may{\n}approach the Cloister of Trials.
bsvr0400.219: {\n}Pray hard, and the toxin will{\n}surely release its grip on you.
bsvr0400.222: {\n}Quickly, to the village square!{\n}Share in our joy!
bsvr0400.225: {\n}You look better than you did yesterday.{\n}Has {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin weakened its grip?
bsvr0400.226: {\n}The summoner undergoes the trials.{\n}We must not interfere.
bsvr0400.228: {\n}The chaos in the temple only{\n}serves to worry the people.
bsvr0400.231: {\n}I, too, will pray for the{\n}blessing of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} to shine upon you.
bsvr0400.233: {\n}Great strength is only obtained{\n}through great suffering.
bsvr0400.235: {\n}It appears the summoner’s pilgrimage{\n}goes well! Very good, very good.
bsvr0400.238: {\n}Even the teachings of a thousand years{\n}are due for an update once in a while.
bsvr0400.239: {\n}Why, if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is defeated, we may{\n}no longer need {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s guidance.
bsvr0400.241: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsvr0400.242: {\n}With the statues’ guidance, I’m{\n}sure our apprentice is doing fine.
bsvr0400.243: {\n}Pray at the temple, and you may{\n}just overcome {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin.
bsvr0400.245: {\n}The people of the village could use{\n}your help. You should pray, too.
bsvr0400.246: {\n}I suppose we’ll have to call our{\n}apprentice Lady {PC:01:YUNA} now.
bsvr0400.247: {\n}And you, heathen. Know that the{\n}teachings are the only true guide!
bsvr0400.250: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsvr0400.252: {\n}Word of Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s achievements{\n}has reached this island, too.
bsvr0400.253: {\n}I hear you’ve become a guardian!{\n}May you guard Lady {PC:01:YUNA} well.
bsvr0400.255: {\n}Those warrior monks that came to the{\n}island were just a bunch of crooks, ya?
bsvr0400.256: {\n}Who can the people of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} turn{\n}to now that {MCR:s06l1B:"Maester Mika"} is gone?
bsvr0400.260: {\n}Hey, I’m worried too!{\n}But all we can do is wait.
bsvr0400.262: {\n}Sorry, no time to talk.{\n}Rover starts barking when I slack off.
bsvr0400.266: {\n}Heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s got their butts{\n}kicked. They had it coming, if you ask me.
bsvr0400.268: {\n}Well, if it ain’t the traitors!{\n}You got some nerve coming here!
bsvr0400.269: {\n}Hey, hey, just kidding!{\n}No need to glare, ya?
bsvr0400.270: {\n}I hear things at the temples are a mess.{\n}Bad for business, I tell you.
bsvr0400.272: {\n}When that ship came, the old man,{\n}he kept working while he sang!
bsvr0400.274: {\n}The village where I was born is{\n}no longer there, thanks to {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsvr0400.277: {\n}Careful not to break any more precepts,{\n}or you’ll end up like the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s!
bsvr0400.278: {\n}A summoner named Lord {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"} came{\n}to the village, but he left so soon.
bsvr0400.279: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed{\n}as expected, because they used machina!
bsvr0400.282: {\n}Maybe I should learn {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}{\n}weaving...make a place for myself here.
bsvr0400.283: {\n}I doubt some old song is going{\n}to help anyone beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsvr0400.284: {\n}Seafaring is hard work. Gotta kick{\n}back sometimes. Get some R & R, ya?
bsvr0400.286: {\n}I sure hope we don’t run into{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on our next voyage.
bsvr0400.288: {\n}I do hope they come back safely.
bsvr0400.289: {\n}I’m gonna kick back in town{\n}till the next ship gets here.
bsvr0400.290: {\n}There’s no time to rest out there.{\n}Never know when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will show up.
bsvr0400.292: {\n}I really, really hope we don’t{\n}run into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on this voyage.
bsvr0400.294: {\n}I kinda got to liking this town.{\n}Maybe I’ll give up seafaring.
bsvr0400.295: {\n}One of my friends is on your ship.{\n}I’ll pray for both of you.
bsvr0400.297: {\n}No matter what happens in the{\n}temples, it’s life as usual here.
bsvr0400.298: {\n}Seems kind of odd to pray{\n}for the temples’ sake, ya?
bsvr0400.299: {\n}That flying ship was spectacular!{\n}Those {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} might have something there.

kami0100.81: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}How goes your study of our language?
kami0100.85: {\n}Bilghen Memorial Travel Agency{\n}There’s a copy of ”All About Lightning.”
kami0100.88: {\n}There’s an original copy of ”A History{\n}of Summoners, Thunder Plains Edition.”
kami0100.111: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
kami0100.113: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
kami0100.118: {TIME:00}The secrets of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}  language are revealed!{\n}{SPACE:01}[ {CLR:OL_PURPLE}H{CLR:WHITE} → {CLR:PINK}N{CLR:WHITE} ]
kami0100.120: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hujela{CLR:WHITE}!
kami0100.121: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Pakehhan{CLR:WHITE}!
kami0100.122: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Typpman{CLR:WHITE}!
kami0100.123: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Maynhan{CLR:WHITE}!
kami0100.124: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Cbaygan{CLR:WHITE}!
kami0100.125: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hydeja{CLR:WHITE}!
kami0100.126: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Unydun{CLR:WHITE}!
kami0100.127: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Medanyde{CLR:WHITE}!
kami0100.128: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Sycdan{CLR:WHITE}!
kami0100.3: Clerk{\n}Ah, Lady Summoner.{\n}Yes, just over that way.
kami0100.7: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}It’s not easy being a guardian{\n}to a summoner so young.
kami0100.8: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}This is going to be some journey.
kami0100.15: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Don’t tell {PC:06:RIKKU}, but we leave{\n}as soon as {PC:01:YUNA}’s better.
kami0100.17: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}When I was little, a fiend attacked me{\n}while I was swimming at the beach.
kami0100.18: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}My brother tried to{\n}beat it back with a spell.
kami0100.20: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}But he missed and hit me instead!
kami0100.30: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Nice to see you again.{\n}Welcome to the {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} Travel Agency.
kami0100.35: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Allow me to present you{\n}with this book for your study.
kami0100.37: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Well, it may not be{\n}essential for daily life.
kami0100.40: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}I’ve been wondering since I saw him{\n}at the {MCR:s06l3B:"Mi’ihen"} Highroad branch.
kami0100.41: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Oh... He looks so much like him.
kami0100.44: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Ten years ago?{\n}At the beginning of Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}’s {MCR:s06l63:"Calm"}?
kami0100.47: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}I could not leave{\n}a wounded man to die.
kami0100.48: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}However, I was surprised when I saw you{\n}gone the next morning, with that wound.
kami0100.49: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}An ordinary man would{\n}not have been able to walk.
kami0100.52: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} and{\n}his entourage passed by a while ago.
kami0100.53: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}And the maester{\n}is to be married soon?
kami0100.54: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Excuse me, where did you hear that?
kami0100.58: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Then let’s just go on{\n}with the journey, ya?
kami0100.60: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Let’s give {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}a kick in the butt and go.
kami0100.61: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}We’re not through the {MCR:s0Dl28:"Thunder Plains"}{\n}yet, so be prepared, all right?
kami0100.63: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}She’s not going to move{\n}unless we do something.
kami0100.66: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Don’t tell me you were hoping it would.
kami0100.71: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}You didn’t have to say it{\n}like that, you know!
kami0100.73: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}You know, try to cheer me up?
kami0100.74: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}You just don’t get me{\n}at all, do you?
kami0100.91: {\n}We have a wide selection of quality{\n}merchandise to choose from.

lchb0500.1: {\n}I turned away for a second,{\n}and look what happened!
lchb0500.3: {\n}The {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} must be behind this!{\n}How dare they!
lchb0500.4: {\n}I’ll have these crates moved{\n}in no time, sir!
lchb0500.5: {\n}This is {CLR:BLUE}dock number 5{CLR:WHITE}.{\n}{CLR:BLUE}Dock number 4{CLR:WHITE} lies straight ahead.
lchb0500.6: {\n}If you’re looking for the {CLR:BLUE}entrance{CLR:WHITE},{\n}please go back the other way.
lchb0500.8: {\n}Cargo is scattered all over the place!{\n}I can’t bear to look at this mess!
lchb0500.9: {\n}This dock is so quiet compared{\n}to the others.
lchb0500.10: {\n}I can finally do business in other locales,{\n}now that the ferries are operating.
lchb0500.11: {\n}I was lost when I left the temple,{\n}not knowing what to believe anymore.
lchb0500.12: {\n}If you ever need assistance,{\n}just ask us.
lchb0500.13: {\n}There’s a flying ship at dock number 1!{\n}Why don’t you go check it out?
lchb0500.14: {\n}With so many warrior monks here, I don’t{\n}know whether to feel safe or threatened.
lchb0500.29: {\n}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} ship leave {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}.{\n}No one knows where they go.
lchb0500.33: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Must be the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}’s doing.{\n}Let’s go the other way.
lchb0500.46: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}{MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}, {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}, and I... Together{\n}we defeated {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} ten years ago.
lchb0500.48: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}So that one day I could{\n}bring you to {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
lchb0500.49: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Why did it have to be me?
lchb0500.54: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I felt something of {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"} there{\n}in that shell, couldn’t you?
lchb0500.55: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}You must have felt him when{\n}you came in contact with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
lchb0500.73: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I’m going to offer my{\n}services to {PC:01:YUNA}. Come.
lchb0500.76: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, man, there’s no way.{\n}That’s just impossible.
lchb0500.90: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}But I don’t have a choice, do I?
lchb0500.91: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You’re the only one who can tell{\n}me what’s going on, anyways!
lchb0500.92: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I have to go with you!{\n}I have to!

ptkl0200.13: {\n}Leave it to me! I’ll take{\n}you anywhere you want to go.
ptkl0200.17: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}On to the temple,{\n}where we pray for victory!
ptkl0200.18: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}High Summoner {MCR:s06l37:"Ohalland"} used{\n}to live in the {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} temple here.
ptkl0200.19: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Yep, Lord {MCR:s06l37:"Ohalland"} was once{\n}a great blitzer, you know?
ptkl0200.22: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Praying for victory’s all{\n}good...but is this right?
ptkl0200.27: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}They forget pain, suffering...{\n}Only the game matters!
ptkl0200.28: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}That’s why blitz has{\n}been around for so long.
ptkl0200.36: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}The matches start soon as we get{\n}there, so rest up on the way, ya?
ptkl0200.41: {\n}Next time, I’ll show ’em the {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"}{\n}spirit we’ve inherited from Lord {MCR:s06l37:"Ohalland"}.
ptkl0200.44: {\n}We’re off to Luca as{\n}soon as I finish this off.
ptkl0200.45: {\n}Just wait and see.{\n}We’ll win for sure.
ptkl0200.51: {\n}The next time {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} comes around,{\n}I want to go to the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}, too.
ptkl0200.52: {\n}The temple is fully supporting{\n}our restoration of {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"}.
ptkl0200.54: {\n}Well, just let me know if you’d like a ride.

mtgz0000.0: {\n}The sacred heights of {MCR:s0Dl3A:"Gagazet"} shun{\n}the weak. Use {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} weapons!
mtgz0000.2: {\n}{MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} always prepared to fight.{\n}Always keep weapons and armor in top shape.
mtgz0000.6: {\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} beat {MCR:s06l12:"Biran"}.{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} learn much in ten years.
mtgz0000.8: {\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} stand tall, unashamed.{\n}Lose horn, but gain friends.
mtgz0000.9: {\n}Listen to the wind howl!{\n}{MCR:s0Dl3B:"Mt. Gagazet"} praises {PC:03:KIMAHRI}’s victory.
mtgz0000.11: {\n}Prepare your body and mind.{\n}Reach for the peak of the mountain!
mtgz0000.12: {\n}Worry not, small guardian.{\n}Summoner’s back, we {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} protect.
mtgz0000.18: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Shall I tell you about the{\n}{MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} of days long past, eh?
mtgz0000.25: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}”’Tis a song from an otherworld,” they{\n}said. The soldiers panicked and ran.
mtgz0000.26: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}And then, as if to pursue the{\n}retreating armies, {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} appeared!
mtgz0000.27: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Some time later, scouts from{\n}{MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"} braved the mountain.
mtgz0000.28: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}On the other side, they witnessed{\n}the ruins that had been {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}.
mtgz0000.29: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}The city destroyed. Not a{\n}single soul left standing. Gone!
mtgz0000.30: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}In its place, a multitude of the{\n}{MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"} had gathered on Gagazet.
mtgz0000.32: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}It’s the song we now call{\n}the ”Hymn of the Fayth.”
mtgz0000.33: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}And that, as they say, is that.
mtgz0000.35: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Would you like to hear the rest?
mtgz0000.40: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}was none other than the summoner{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, ruler of {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}!
mtgz0000.41: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Yes, the lord father of Lady Yunalesca.
mtgz0000.44: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Later, the two used the{\n}Final Summoning to defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
mtgz0000.52: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}You can bet the temples had a{\n}hand in covering that one up!
mtgz0000.53: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}And that, as they say, is that.
mtgz0000.56: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Let me tell you about{\n}the Hymn of the Fayth.
mtgz0000.57: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}It was once a {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"} song,{\n}sung in defiance of {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}!
mtgz0000.59: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Then, as these things often go, those{\n}who disliked {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} began to sing it.
mtgz0000.61: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}The Hymn of the Fayth became{\n}the symbol of defiance against {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.
mtgz0000.63: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}They lifted the ban on the song,{\n}and spread a new story.
mtgz0000.64: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}They said the hymn was a song{\n}sung to soothe the souls of the dead.
mtgz0000.65: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}And so saying, they took the song{\n}and made it scripture.
mtgz0000.66: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}That’s why today, the hymn{\n}is sung all over {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
mtgz0000.68: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Aaaah, but look at the time.{\n}I’ve rambled on again.
mtgz0000.70: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Well, I owe you my gratitude{\n}for hearing this old scholar out.
mtgz0000.71: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Like to hear about{\n}this place once more?
mtgz0000.75: {\n}All {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} are warriors.{\n}{MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} will stay with mountain.
mtgz0000.81: {\n}If peace really comes to {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}, {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"}{\n}may once again travel and see the world.
mtgz0000.83: {\n}{MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} will guard the{\n}mountain to the very last.
mtgz0000.85: {\n}No strength left in the {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} to{\n}fight {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} now. It is great shame.
mtgz0000.88: {MCR:s06l2F:"Kelk"}{\n}The mountain will not bear{\n}the footsteps of infidels!
mtgz0000.90: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I have cast aside {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}!{\n}I follow the temple no more!
mtgz0000.91: {MCR:s06l2F:"Kelk"}{\n}Then you will die by those words!
mtgz0000.93: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} has warped the{\n}teachings and betrayed us all!
mtgz0000.94: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Nothing but a bunch of{\n}low-down tricksters, eh?
mtgz0000.101: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Have you not also turned{\n}your back on {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}?
mtgz0000.102: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}But still, you guard Gagazet{\n}as a {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"}, not a maester.
mtgz0000.110: {MCR:s06l2F:"Kelk"}{\n}You have been branded a traitor,{\n}but still you would fight {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}?
mtgz0000.114: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}The people long for the {MCR:s06l63:"Calm"}.{\n}I can give it to them.
mtgz0000.121: {MCR:s06l2F:"Kelk"}{\n}Tempered steel that even the mightiest{\n}{MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} could not hope to bend.
mtgz0000.126: {MCR:s06l2F:"Kelk"}{\n}Summoner {PC:01:YUNA}’s words,{\n}they ring clear in my soul.
mtgz0000.127: {MCR:s06l2F:"Kelk"}{\n}Small voice, small frame, but a{\n}will that towers over Gagazet’s peak.
mtgz0000.128: {MCR:s06l2F:"Kelk"}{\n}The path to the sacred heights is steep,{\n}and lined with the dens of fiends.
mtgz0000.129: {MCR:s06l2F:"Kelk"}{\n}Strong guardians, be prepared,{\n}and guard your summoner well.
mtgz0000.134: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I’d say it’s more like she’s{\n}driven, don’t you think?
mtgz0000.135: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}That’s why she’s strong.{\n}She’s still pressing forward.
mtgz0000.136: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}When weak people are driven they{\n}can’t go far before they break.
mtgz0000.137: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}She keeps going forward,{\n}because she is strong.
mtgz0000.139: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}And I... All I can do is{\n}try and keep up with her.
mtgz0000.146: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}The one on the other side here’s{\n}probably just a pile of rubble, ya?
mtgz0000.148: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Somewhere, ya? Yeah,{\n}you’ll be home soon enough!
mtgz0000.151: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Better get ready. Ain’t{\n}no shops where we’re goin’.
mtgz0000.153: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I...there’s just so{\n}little time. I don’t know.
mtgz0000.158: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}{MCR:s06l12:"Biran"} is hero of {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"}.{\n}{MCR:s06l14:"Yenke"} is powerful warrior.
mtgz0000.159: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Great... I hope we don’t{\n}have to fight them.
mtgz0000.165: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}{MCR:s06l19:"Mika"} tries to keep it whole,{\n}but it crumbles around him.
mtgz0000.166: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Look, I couldn’t care{\n}less what happens to {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.
mtgz0000.167: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Because you are not of this world.
mtgz0000.168: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}To those who truly believe{\n}in the teachings...
mtgz0000.169: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}a time of much pain is coming.
mtgz0000.170: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Ten years ago, I looked up at{\n}Gagazet from where we stand now.
mtgz0000.173: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}All I could think of was how...
mtgz0000.175: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Your duties as guardian will soon end.
mtgz0000.181: {MCR:s06l14:"Yenke"}{\n}Forget his people, forget his mountain.{\n}Little {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"}! Weakling {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"}!
mtgz0000.182: {MCR:s06l12:"Biran"}{\n}Mountain hate the weak, hate{\n}the small. If you will climb...
mtgz0000.185: {MCR:s06l12:"Biran"}{\n}You not forget who took{\n}your horn! Never forget!
mtgz0000.192: {MCR:s06l12:"Biran"}{\n}I honor the name of strong{\n}warrior who defeats {MCR:s06l12:"Biran"}.
mtgz0000.205: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But I fear that no one will make{\n}a statue for a traitor such as I am.
mtgz0000.209: {\n}I wanted to see Yuna’s statue, too.{\n}But I wanted to see it...

djyt0600.2: {\n}{TIME:00}You can only hold one sphere at a time.

znkd1400.52: {\n}Can’t you get me a ticket?{\n}I want to see the game up close.
znkd1400.0: {\n}You’d better hurry!{\n}The game can’t start without you!
znkd1400.1: {\n}Show us your moves out there, man!
znkd1400.2: {\n}They say you’ve got some tricks{\n}even your old man couldn’t do!
znkd1400.3: {\n}Dinner’s on me if you win!{\n}I even saved a table for you.
znkd1400.4: {\n}I don’t feel so good...like I’m{\n}on a roller coaster going down.
znkd1400.8: {\n}Whoa... I got the shivers.{\n}Maybe I’m coming down with something...
znkd1400.9: {\n}Do you feel cold? Nah, maybe{\n}it’s just me. Never mind.
znkd1400.10: {\n}Man, tickets for tonight’s{\n}game cost an arm and a leg!
znkd1400.11: {\n}The tickets were all sold out!{\n}I hope someone’s got some extra.
znkd1400.12: {\n}They’ll let me in if I say,{\n}”{PC:00:TIDUS} and I are buds,” right?
znkd1400.13: {\n}I won’t tell anyone else.{\n}It’ll be our secret!
znkd1400.14: {\n}Aw, too bad...{\n}I would have cheered for you.
znkd1400.19: {\n}From the look on your face,{\n}you’d think you already won!
znkd1400.20: {\n}All of {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}’s watching now,{\n}so put on a show for ’em!
znkd1400.22: {\n}It’s gonna be a killer{\n}game tonight. I know it!
znkd1400.23: {\n}Tonight’s game is gonna be{\n}one for the history books!
znkd1400.24: {\n}The {MCR:s06l4B:"Zanarkand Abes"} are counting{\n}on you! Don’t let them down!
znkd1400.25: {\n}You’d better hurry... Or are you{\n}just trying to warm up the crowd?
znkd1400.26: {\n}I’m sure you’ll be the{\n}star player this year.
znkd1400.28: {\n}Hey, Mr. Star Player of the Abes!{\n}Do your stuff out there tonight!
znkd1400.33: {\n}Your dad was the best, {PC:00:TIDUS}.{\n}I wish I had a dad like yours!
znkd1400.35: {\n}Come on, you’re gonna be late!{\n}Hurry! Hurry!
znkd1400.37: {\n}My mom’s a big fan of yours too!{\n}She said to invite you to dinner!
znkd1400.38: {\n}You’d better win tonight,{\n}or I’ll deck you one! Pow!
znkd1400.39: {\n}I wanna play on your team{\n}when I grow up, {PC:00:TIDUS}!
znkd1400.40: {\n}I was in a coffee shop, running away{\n}from home when I heard the news.
znkd1400.41: {\n}Our hero, Jecht, gone.{\n}Vanished into thin air!
znkd1400.43: {\n}”Zanar,” I says to myself,{\n}”What are you thinking?”
znkd1400.44: {\n}I went running straight back home.{\n}We sat up talking ’bout Jecht all night.
znkd1400.45: {\n}My dad and I never talked so much.{\n}Whoa... Didn’t mean to reminisce, folks.
znkd1400.46: {\n}Anyway... Ten years later, the{\n}Jecht Memorial Cup tournament is today!
znkd1400.48: {\n}I know there’s a lot of people out there{\n}today to see the star of the Abes!
znkd1400.49: {\n}In just one year, he’s become{\n}the team’s number one player!

bsil0100.2: {\n}I’ll be good while you’re{\n}gone! I promise, ya?
bsil0100.3: {\n}Here, take this. Daddy{\n}says it’s an offering.
bsil0100.4: {\n}I have to keep watch!{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} could come any day!
bsil0100.6: {\n}All I wanna do is join the Crusaders,{\n}but they say I’m too young!
bsil0100.7: {\n}I wonder if the fiends will{\n}go away once Sin’s gone...
bsil0100.8: {\n}We’ll miss Lady Yuna!{\n}Come back soon, ya?
bsil0100.9: {\n}Where are you going{\n}on that big boat?
bsil0100.10: {\n}When is Lady {PC:01:YUNA} going{\n}to bring us the Calm?
bsil0100.11: {\n}Look at me! I’m Lady {PC:01:YUNA}!{\n}I’ll be a summoner when I grow up!
bsil0100.12: {\n}There’s a ship, flying in the sky!{\n}I saw it! Honest!
bsil0100.13: {\n}I sung and everything, so now{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s Calm will come, ya?
bsil0100.14: {\n}I heard there’s some foreigners around.{\n}Be on your guard!
bsil0100.17: {\n}I wonder if all this singing’s{\n}really gonna help beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsil0100.18: {\n}I knew this time would{\n}come someday. I knew.
bsil0100.20: {\n}Here, have this.{\n}You may find use for it.
bsil0100.22: {\n}I believe his name was{\n}Lord {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}...yes, that’s it.
bsil0100.23: {\n}I heard the sailors’ gossip{\n}about Lady {PC:01:YUNA} getting married?
bsil0100.24: {\n}I should think Lady {PC:01:YUNA} would be the{\n}last to marry and quit her pilgrimage!
bsil0100.25: {\n}The people of {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} are friends to Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.{\n}Come to us if you are ever in need.
bsil0100.26: {\n}That flying ship--now that’s what{\n}I call a blessing of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.
bsil0100.28: {\n}That new plan, it must be working.{\n}I mean, I haven’t seen {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} around, have you?
bsil0100.29: {\n}Hey, no one’s loafing around here!{\n}I’m keeping a lookout for {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}!
bsil0100.30: {\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is still out there.{\n}This is a job for the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s!
bsil0100.31: {\n}Haven’t seen {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} in a long while.{\n}Perhaps the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s have stopped it at last?
bsil0100.33: {\n}What? Already knew, did you?{\n}Hmph. You’re no fun.
bsil0100.35: {\n}Just once in my life,{\n}I’d like to ride on a flying ship.
bsil0100.37: {\n}Hey, you! The sea’s crawling with{\n}fiends, so give this to {PC:01:YUNA}, okay?
bsil0100.40: {\n}Here, a farewell gift{\n}from all the village.
bsil0100.42: {\n}May {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s blessings be with{\n}our summoner on her pilgrimage.
bsil0100.43: {\n}Here, a gift from the temple{\n}to sanctify her departure.
bsil0100.44: {\n}The journey will be long. Believe the{\n}teachings, and you will not go astray.
bsil0100.52: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
bsil0100.54: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!

mtgz0800.3: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I know, that’s why I{\n}want to stop for a bit.
mtgz0800.4: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Soon means that...{\n}there’s not much time left.
mtgz0800.12: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Before, the closer I came to{\n}{MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}, the more I wondered...
mtgz0800.13: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}when we arrive, {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}will call the Final Aeon...
mtgz0800.15: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I thought my mind was{\n}made up long before.
mtgz0800.16: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}But when I stood here,{\n}my resolve wavered.
mtgz0800.21: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I wanted to change the world, too.
mtgz0800.24: {\n}A city dead for a thousand years.
mtgz0800.25: {\n}A city I had to see{\n}with my own eyes.
mtgz0800.28: {\n}My thoughts, they kept floating up,{\n}and then slipping through my fingers.
mtgz0800.29: {\n}Slipping away before I could{\n}pin them down with words.
mtgz0800.30: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}All my life, I knew{\n}this moment would come.
mtgz0800.39: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}If we go down there, then you’ll...
mtgz0800.40: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}You’re a true friend,{\n}and I thank you, but...
mtgz0800.44: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}But shouldn’t we think{\n}about it some more?
mtgz0800.45: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}There’s gotta be some kind{\n}of way we can save you, {PC:01:YUNA}!

mcyt0700.0: {\n}Should the dreaming end, you too will disappear--{\n}Fade into Spira’s sea, Spira’s sky.
mcyt0700.1: {\n}But do not weep,{\n}nor rise in anger.
mcyt0700.2: {\n}Even we were once human.{\n}That is why we must dream.
mcyt0700.3: {\n}Let us summon a sea in a new dream world.
mcyt0700.4: {\n}A new sea for you to swim.

guad0500.0: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Why does he want to see me?
guad0500.1: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I don’t like the smell{\n}of this one, eh?
guad0500.12: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Maester {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"} wed a human woman.{\n}She was {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}’s mother.
guad0500.15: {\n}{MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"} will be back shortly.{\n}Please be patient.
guad0500.16: {\n}These are Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}’s private{\n}chambers. You may not enter.
guad0500.17: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}, please tell me.{\n}What can I do to help?

lmyt0200.0: {\n}Why couldn’t we see to{\n}stop the dreaming?
lmyt0200.1: {\n}Why did we stay on in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}?{\n}We had forgotten for so long.
lmyt0200.2: {\n}We had forgotten to move forward.{\n}We had forgotten to change.

hiku2100.7: {TIME:00}The Al Bhed have left riddles in 1000{\n}year old ruins, scattered across Spira.{\n}Decipher them to learn the passwords.

swin0700.0: Bickson{\n}Yo, mister star player from Zanarkand!{\n}Take it easy on us today.
swin0700.1: Graav{\n}Let’s see them moves you’ve learned{\n}in those ruins then!
swin0700.4: Doram{\n}Hey, that boy in{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} is a cutie.
swin0700.5: Doram{\n}Now, what should we play next?
swin0700.6: Balgerda{\n}My, you’re kinda cute, too.{\n}Wanna have some fun?
swin0700.7: Balgerda{\n}What? You want to hang out with us?{PAUSE}Balgerda{\n}Hmm... Maybe later.
swin0700.8: Datto{\n}Tournament’s coming up real soon.{\n}I wish we had more time to practice, ya?
swin0700.9: Letty{\n}Why do we have to be on the same{\n}ship as those {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}ns anyway?
swin0700.11: Keepa{\n}Urgh...{\n}Why do I feel like I’m being watched?
swin0700.13: Botta{\n}Those herbs I bought in {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} for{\n}seasickness are working great, ya?

bvyt0600.0: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Get me outta here!{\n}I want out now!
bvyt0600.9: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}everything in Spira seems to{\n}revolve around people dying?
bvyt0600.12: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Summoners challenge the bringer{\n}of death, {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and die doing so.
bvyt0600.13: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Guardians give their lives{\n}to protect their summoner.
bvyt0600.14: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}The {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"} are the souls of the dead.{\n}Even the maesters of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} are unsent.
bvyt0600.16: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Only {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is reborn,{\n}and then only to bring more death.
bvyt0600.17: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}It is a cycle of death,{\n}spiraling endlessly.
bvyt0600.20: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}Really, now, what person{\n}would execute a dear friend?

klyt0500.58: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
klyt0500.60: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
klyt0500.16: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I think {PC:04:WAKKA} needs to{\n}do a little more praying.
klyt0500.22: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}And all these people are your{\n}guardians? My, what a rabble!
klyt0500.23: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}As I recall, Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}had only two guardians.
klyt0500.24: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Quality over quantity, my dear.{\n}Whatever were you thinking?
klyt0500.25: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}I have need of only one guardian.{\n}Right, {MCR:s06l06:"Barthello"}?
klyt0500.26: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I only have as many guardians{\n}as there are people I can trust.
klyt0500.27: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I trust them all with my life!
klyt0500.28: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}To have so many guardians{\n}is a joy, and an honor!
klyt0500.29: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Even more so than{\n}being my father’s daughter.
klyt0500.30: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Of course, I would never think{\n}of questioning your ways, either.
klyt0500.31: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}So, Lady {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}, I ask of you:{\n}please leave us in peace.
klyt0500.32: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}You do what you want.{\n}{MCR:s06l06:"Barthello"}, we’re leaving.
klyt0500.34: {\n}A guardian is someone a summoner can rely on.{\n}Someone she can trust with her life.
klyt0500.35: {\n}I wondered, did {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}feel that way about me?
klyt0500.37: {\n}Yeah! Once we win the tournament,{\n}this will be my victory pose!
klyt0500.38: {\n}Yeah! Teamwork and trust are key elements{\n}for both guardians and blitzers!
klyt0500.39: {\n}Yeah! Once we win the tournament{\n}next year, this will be my victory pose!
klyt0500.40: {\n}Yeah! When the ship comes flying by,{\n}I’m going to cheer it on like this!
klyt0500.41: {\n}Yeah! When the Calm comes,{\n}this is how I’m going to celebrate!
klyt0500.43: {\n}Are you a blitzer? Or a guardian?{\n}Don’t tell me you’re both!
klyt0500.44: {\n}He should stop wasting his time with all those{\n}poses, and devote more time to praying.
klyt0500.46: {\n}I wonder what the summoners{\n}fighting {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} are like?
klyt0500.50: {\n}The responsibility lies with the monks.{\n}We could not ease the people’s anxieties.
klyt0500.52: {\n}If the temples cannot provide the people{\n}with hope, then what purpose do they serve?

ssbt0100.3: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Everyone look sharp!{\n}Time to hit the other side!
ssbt0100.6: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Dang it! All right, back inside!{\n}Time for another plan!
ssbt0100.8: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Every blitzer knows: when you got{\n}the ball, you gotta score!
ssbt0100.11: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}A day with you is never dull!

luca0600.4: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin sure is{\n}taking its time wearing off.
luca0600.5: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Anyway, I knew you’d find{\n}someone you knew here.
luca0600.7: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You’re a real guardian now,{\n}so no mistakes. Understood?
luca0600.10: {\n}Their owner’s a {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}{\n}and he hasn’t returned yet...
luca0600.18: {\n}I am well aware of the risks of this{\n}mission. But we cannot simply run away.
luca0600.20: {\n}Well, if they really can wipe out {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}I guess it’s worth a little confusion.
luca0600.22: {\n}I hope the surviving {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s{\n}rest well and recover quickly.
luca0600.26: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}Whatcha doing here?{\n}The tournament’s about to start!
luca0600.28: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Well, you’re looking in the wrong place.{\n}There aren’t many people here.
luca0600.29: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}Everyone’s either at the stadium{\n}or watching the game on the sphere.
luca0600.32: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}We’d like to, but we’re{\n}waiting for some couriers.
luca0600.34: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Wanna ditch the courier{\n}and go watch the game?
luca0600.35: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}But...but we’re still on duty.{\n}What about the mission, sir?
luca0600.38: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}We might be a little late, {\n}but we will go watch you play.
luca0600.39: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}You’d better be winning{\n}when we get there.
luca0600.43: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Sorry for making you wait, {PC:01:YUNA}.{\n}I had some promises to keep, ya?
luca0600.47: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Hey, it’s good to be back, ya?
luca0600.53: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Do you think he’ll find{\n}a way back to {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}?
luca0600.54: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}In any case,{\n}I’ll miss having him around.
luca0600.55: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}He’s still in town, isn’t he?{\n}I think I’ll go see him...
luca0600.61: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I wish to become your guardian.{\n}Do you accept?
luca0600.71: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Thank you, Sir {PC:02:AURON}!{\n}You’re welcome to join us!
luca0600.76: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Can’t say. Haven’t{\n}seen him in ten years.
luca0600.91: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I really don’t think{\n}that’s gonna help this time.
luca0600.94: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But summoners and their guardians{\n}are kind of like {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}’s ray of light.
luca0600.95: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}A lot of people in{\n}Spira depend on us.
luca0600.96: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I learned to practice smiling{\n}when I’m feeling sad, you know?
luca0600.114: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I want my journey to{\n}be full of laughter.
luca0600.116: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}If we should get separated, just whistle.
luca0600.124: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Right, now let’s see what you can do!
luca0600.133: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}We were just worried{\n}you guys might’ve gone crazy!
luca0600.136: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Now, we will go to{\n}the temple at {CLR:BLUE}Djose{CLR:WHITE}.
luca0600.139: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}We don’t know where{\n}the fiends came from.
luca0600.140: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{MCR:s06l1A:"Maester Mika"} is safe and sound,{\n}thanks to Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}.

znkd0300.9: Fayth{\n}We’ve been dreaming so long...{\n}we’re tired.
znkd0300.10: Fayth{\n}Would you and your father...{\n}Would you let us rest?
znkd0300.12: Fayth{\n}Both you and your father{\n}have been touched by {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
znkd0300.13: Fayth{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, the one around whom all{\n}{MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}--the spiral--revolves.
znkd0300.14: Fayth{\n}You two are more{\n}than just dreams now.
znkd0300.17: Fayth{\n}Just a little more, and maybe...
znkd0300.18: Fayth{\n}Maybe you are the dream{\n}that will end our dreaming at last.

genk0600.2: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Would you like to hear a bit{\n}about the wondrous shoopuf?
genk0600.4: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Perhaps you’d like to hear{\n}a bit about the Hypello, hmm?
genk0600.7: {\n}Aww, leaving already?{\n}Well, come back again, you hear?
genk0600.9: {\n}Careful where you shop.{\n}This area is full of cunning merchants.
genk0600.12: {\n}With all the traitors and {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} around,{\n}not many travelers pass through here anymore.
genk0600.13: {\n}The merchants are suffering{\n}with so few customers.
genk0600.14: {\n}They say {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} landed in {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}.{\n}It’s better to stay away from the north.
genk0600.17: {\n}My plans are ruined.{\n}Now what am I supposed to do?
genk0600.19: {\n}I want to quit the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s{\n}and settle down in the country.
genk0600.21: {\n}By the time we get home, they’ll{\n}be celebrating their marriage.
genk0600.22: {\n}Welcome! You seem to{\n}have fine taste, sir!
genk0600.23: {\n}Listen, buy from me and you won’t{\n}have any problems down the line.
genk0600.24: {\n}Well, hello there.{\n}Are you in luck today!
genk0600.25: {\n}If you buy something now, I’ll give you{\n}a big discount! Well, what do you say?
genk0600.26: Driver{\n}Noo, I don shink sho.{\n}Ish bad idea, yesh.
genk0600.30: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}This guy won’t let{\n}our chocobo on the shoopuf!
genk0600.36: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}It is no good.{\n}We will have to find another way.
genk0600.37: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}We will find a ford{\n}where we can cross on foot.
genk0600.40: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}Where there’s a will, there’s a way.
genk0600.43: {\n}Where there’s a will, there’s a way.
genk0600.49: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Some things little boys{\n}never grow out of!
genk0600.51: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}The merchants here are wily.{\n}Pick your shop well.
genk0600.53: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}There are many things{\n}we do not know about the shoopuf.
genk0600.54: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}For example, what does it eat?{\n}It eats nothing!
genk0600.55: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}The water it sucks through its shnoz{\n}somehow supports its considerable size.
genk0600.57: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}And that, as they say, is that.
genk0600.58: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}These shoopuf handlers belong to a race{\n}of water-dwellers known as the Hypello.
genk0600.59: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}They may be slow on land, but in{\n}the water they’re quick as silvery fish!
genk0600.61: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}But their lackadaisical disposition{\n}draws them to less strenuous pastimes.
genk0600.62: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}And that, as they say, is that.
genk0600.63: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}I believe I’ve said{\n}all there is to say.
genk0600.69: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
genk0600.71: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!

ptkl1400.20: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
ptkl1400.22: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
ptkl1400.3: {\n}You should save your records{\n}onto the Save Sphere.
ptkl1400.8: {\n}This is my home, and no matter{\n}how bad it gets, I ain’t movin’.
ptkl1400.10: {\n}I ain’t leaving my home.{\n}Nope. Never, I tell you.
ptkl1400.13: {\n}I’m gonna be a blitzball{\n}when I grow up!
ptkl1400.14: {\n}When I grow up, I’m gonna{\n}ride the flying ship!

mihn0800.1: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}Hey, we saw the game!{\n}You guys were great!
mihn0800.6: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}This mission requires our full attention.{\n}We’ve no time to waste!
mihn0800.10: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}See? Keep your head down,{\n}say ”sir” a lot, and you’ll do fine.
mihn0800.14: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}we still believe in you.{\n}That won’t ever change.
mihn0800.16: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But, you know... It’s not too late{\n}for you to go back to {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}, and...
mihn0800.26: {\n}My name is {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}.{\n}I am a disciple of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.
mihn0800.28: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You mean the one {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} and{\n}{MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} were talking about?
mihn0800.29: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}I heard they were to use forbidden{\n}machina! I had to stop them.
mihn0800.31: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}The use of machina is strictly{\n}forbidden by the {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} priesthood.
mihn0800.36: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}The teachings of Yevon must be upheld!
mihn0800.38: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}But you don’t understand!{\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s won’t even listen to me.
mihn0800.39: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}And it’s all because{\n}I’m just a lowly acolyte.
mihn0800.41: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Well, I haven’t been a summoner{\n}for very long myself, you see.
mihn0800.42: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Still, I can’t put myself{\n}down every time I fail.
mihn0800.43: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}People are depending on me.{\n}They’re depending on both of us!
mihn0800.44: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}Yes! Yes, you’re right,{\n}my lady. Absolutely right!
mihn0800.46: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}Now I feel I have the courage{\n}to finish my training.
mihn0800.47: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}I will do my best to get myself{\n}appointed to a temple, as a nun.
mihn0800.48: {\n}Here, take this. Just don’t tell{\n}anybody that I was trembling.
mihn0800.49: {\n}There are lots of fiends, so stay sharp.{\n}Use this when the going gets tough.
mihn0800.50: {\n}Providing is preventing.{\n}Need I say more? This’ll help.
mihn0800.51: {\n}Here’s a little something to{\n}cheer you up before the big fight.
mihn0800.52: {\n}I stocked up on too many.{\n}Please take some, if you like.
mihn0800.54: {\n}I’m not scared. Don’t get me wrong.{\n}I’m just trembling with fury!
mihn0800.56: {\n}It’s not good once those guys get going.
mihn0800.59: {\n}They say luck decides the{\n}battle, but we can’t afford to lose.
mihn0800.60: {\n}I’m gonna vanquish {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} and{\n}return home a hero.
mihn0800.62: {\n}No doubt we’re gonna win. And just in{\n}case, we have an ace up our sleeves, too.
mihn0800.64: {\n}{MCR:s06l36:"High Summoner Yocun"}, who slew {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}started as a {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}.
mihn0800.65: {\n}If I fight as valiantly as Lady {MCR:s06l35:"Yocun"},{\n}will I too receive {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s blessing?
mihn0800.67: {\n}I suppose only a summoner can defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.{\n}The teachings are right after all.
mihn0800.72: {\n}Cruel punishment for defying the{\n}teachings... Too cruel, I’d say.
mihn0800.73: {\n}I thought about joining the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s, but{\n}maybe I should join the warrior monks instead.
mihn0800.75: {\n}All we can do is trust the summoners.{\n}I feel so helpless.
mihn0800.76: {\n}Our {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"} was blown to smithereens.{\n}I am trying not to think about it.
mihn0800.79: {\n}You look awful depressed,{\n}and it’s such a beautiful day.
mihn0800.81: {\n}There are some things that can’t be helped.
mihn0800.84: {\n}Sorry. I don’t feel like talking anymore.
mihn0800.88: {\n}We should focus on what we can do{\n}and not dwell on what we couldn’t do.
mihn0800.90: {\n}I sang aloud to release all of my anxiety.{PAUSE}{\n}I was so desperate at the time.
mihn0800.91: {\n}I’m gonna sing whenever I see the{\n}flying ship; I can’t help but sing.
mihn0800.92: {\n}That flying ship will bring about the Calm.
mihn0800.93: {\n}Even for a moment, a fleeting Calm,{\n}I want to feel peace from my heart.
mihn0800.94: {\n}I’m going to live to see the day{\n}the Calm dawns on us.
mihn0800.95: {\n}Fiends often appear here, but{\n}people pass through here, regardless.
mihn0800.98: {\n}I wush walking and ended up here.{\n}Where am I? What plashe ish thish?

lchb0601.1: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} may have lost{\n}the game, but what a way to go!
lchb0601.7: {\n}This looks like history{\n}in the making, Bobba.
