nagi0600.0: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}To train as a summoner.{\n}{CHOICE:01}To gain the power to destroy fiends.{\n}{CHOICE:02}To defeat the most powerful of enemies.
nagi0600.9: {\n}You are a fading dream,{\n}but one touched by reality.
nagi0600.10: {\n}{MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} will not forget its reality,{\n}nor the one who saved it.
nagi0600.13: {\n}Summoner, I ask you.{\n}What do you want of me?
nagi0600.14: {\n}If you desire my strength,{\n}you must pay my price.
nagi0600.15: {\n}You expect a phoenix,{\n}yet you offer chicken feed!
nagi0600.17: {\n}You alone realize my true value.{\n}You are a master worth serving.
nagi0600.18: {\n}My sword shall guard you{\n}on your journey, summoner.

mmmc0000.0: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}What I am about to tell{\n}you is the unclouded truth.
mmmc0000.1: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}I swear it on my honor{\n}as a {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}.
mmmc0000.3: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}His mind is closed even to me,{\n}a maester of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.
mmmc0000.4: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}But I can feel flames{\n}of darkness burning in his heart.
mmmc0000.5: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}He is using {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, the {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"},{\n}and even the summoners...
mmmc0000.6: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}If he is not stopped, he will surely bring{\n}destruction and chaos to {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
mmmc0000.7: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}I will leave this world soon,{\n}killed by my own son.
mmmc0000.9: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}Because I was not wise enough,{\n}he has suffered, and become twisted.
mmmc0000.10: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}I could not protect him and his mother{\n}from the world and its cruelty.
mmmc0000.11: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}I will accept death as{\n}punishment for my deeds.
mmmc0000.13: {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}I implore you to stop {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}!{\n}Stop my son.

bvyt1100.12: {\n}{TIME:00}You can only hold one sphere at a time.

dome0300.25: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
dome0300.27: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
dome0300.0: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}This isn’t a {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"}.{\n}It’s just an empty statue.
dome0300.1: {\n}That statue lost its power{\n}as a {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"} long ago.
dome0300.2: {\n}It is Lord {MCR:s06l24:"Zaon"}, the first{\n}fayth of the Final Summoning.
dome0300.3: {\n}What you see before you{\n}is all that remains of him.
dome0300.8: {\n}Lady {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"} will show you the path.{\n}The Final Aeon will be yours.
dome0300.9: {\n}The summoner and the Final{\n}Aeon will join powers.
dome0300.10: {\n}Go to her now.{\n}Inside, the lady awaits.
dome0300.12: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}{PC:02:AURON}, you knew this{\n}was going to happen, didn’t you?

mihn0000.135: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}Let me ride one!{\n}{CHOICE:01}I’ll walk.{\n}{CHOICE:02}How do you ride a chocobo?
mihn0000.59: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Not to the death, of course.{\n}What do you say?
mihn0000.63: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Have you changed your mind?{\n}You wish to train?
mihn0000.147: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
mihn0000.149: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
mihn0000.0: {\n}Do you know what those ruins are from?
mihn0000.3: {\n}A terrible testament to {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s power.{\n}I tremble every time I see them.
mihn0000.5: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But I believe humans are the only{\n}ones capable of defeating {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
mihn0000.6: {\n}A good reply. I am relieved to hear{\n}you say that, m’lady summoner.
mihn0000.7: {\n}Where are my manners? I am {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"},{\n}a scholar. At your service, m’lady.
mihn0000.10: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Fragile smiles on people’s faces{\n}crumbling at the mere mention of {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
mihn0000.15: {\n}Eight centuries ago, he founded a{\n}legion known today as the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s.
mihn0000.16: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Eight centuries ago, he founded a{\n}legion known today as the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s.
mihn0000.30: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Although this is a highroad, fiends{\n}do appear. Be on your guard!
mihn0000.31: {\n}Although this is a highroad,{\n}fiends do appear. Be on your guard!
mihn0000.35: {\n}And I’m {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}. We’ve been{\n}charged to guard the Highroad.
mihn0000.37: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}Do take care, Summoner {PC:01:YUNA},{\n}if you are to rent any chocobos.
mihn0000.39: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}Good. We should get back{\n}to our rounds. Farewell.
mihn0000.48: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}And every time he said it,{\n}it meant trouble for {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} and me.
mihn0000.53: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Ah, the high summoner’s daughter.{\n}I’ve heard much of you.
mihn0000.54: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}But you are still fresh{\n}on the road, are you not?
mihn0000.56: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}I might have a few{\n}things to teach you.
mihn0000.57: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Let us see which are stronger.{\n}My aeons or yours.
mihn0000.62: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Tell me if you change your mind.
mihn0000.66: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Your aeons have been healed. You can{\n}fight with your full strength. Come.
mihn0000.67: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Not bad for one so young.{\n}I underestimated you.
mihn0000.74: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But I think you might defeat{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} before I am able to.
mihn0000.76: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Or should I say...{\n}I was not able to.
mihn0000.79: {\n}Hey there, guardians. Here.{\n}Use this to defend our summoner well.
mihn0000.80: {\n}You’re a guardian, right?{\n}I’d like to give you this.
mihn0000.81: {\n}Please give this to the lady summoner{\n}as a token of my gratitude.
mihn0000.82: {\n}I hear some big operation’s about to start.
mihn0000.86: {\n}I got separated from my brother.{\n}I told him to meet here if that happened!
mihn0000.87: {\n}We have to get back home{\n}before the operation starts!
mihn0000.89: {\n}I heard that {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s are marching{\n}in from all over {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
mihn0000.90: {\n}Mum’s the word. I hear the temples of{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} are in on this, too.
mihn0000.91: {\n}Please rest assured. On {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}’s{\n}honor, we will guard the Highroad.
mihn0000.94: {\n}I hear the ferry’s back in service.
mihn0000.100: {\n}I wonder if somebody’s riding that thing.
mihn0000.101: {\n}Fiends are lurking everywhere.{\n}I have to be on my toes constantly.
mihn0000.107: {\n}A lot of people are leaving {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}. I hear the{\n}temple’s really clamping down on things there.
mihn0000.109: {\n}Maybe {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} fell on {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"} to punish{\n}the temple and what it’s become.
mihn0000.111: {\n}I hope my warrior-monk cousin{\n}in {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"} is all right.
mihn0000.112: {\n}I wish somebody would{\n}hurry up and destroy {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
mihn0000.115: {\n}Time to buck up and get to work.
mihn0000.119: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}You have to leave your chocobos here.
mihn0000.121: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}All the other {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s are{\n}preparing for the operation.
mihn0000.122: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}But they put me here on guard duty.
mihn0000.123: {MCR:s06l0F:"Clasko"}{\n}This is all I’m good for anyway.
mihn0000.126: {\n}Do you want to ride a chocobo?
mihn0000.127: {\n}Do you want me to teach you{\n}how to ride a chocobo?
mihn0000.140: {\n}A statue of someone subjugating a fiend.

bsvr0500.0: {\n}You’re the guy from the sea, right?{\n}I heard about you from Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}.
bsvr0500.1: {\n}{MCR:s06l3A:"High Summoner Gandof"}, give us your{\n}blessing, and watch over my family.
bsvr0500.2: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsvr0500.3: {\n}What are you saying? You would{\n}break the precepts, fool child?
bsvr0500.5: {\n}You should pray for the{\n}apprentice summoner’s safety, too.
bsvr0500.8: {\n}I’m heading out fishing, so I’m{\n}praying for a {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}less ocean.
bsvr0500.9: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsvr0500.10: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} put up a great fight this year.{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}’s the best, ya?
bsvr0500.11: {\n}It may not be much help to Lady {PC:01:YUNA},{\n}but allow me to pray for you.
bsvr0500.12: {\n}I know {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s out there, but if I{\n}don’t go out, my family won’t eat.
bsvr0500.13: {\n}I hear you’re traitors, now?{\n}Who’s responsible for that nonsense?
bsvr0500.16: {\n}I’ll be out to sea soon. Perhaps I’ll{\n}be greeting the Calm from deck.
bsvr0500.18: {\n}I’m praying for the blessings of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}to guide that flying ship.
bsvr0500.19: {\n}Odd clothes you got. What land you from?{\n}This your first time to {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}?
bsvr0500.20: {\n}We don’t get many strangers here.{\n}I remember every visitor we get.
bsvr0500.21: {\n}Everyone’s gone to the temple, but{\n}I’m more comfortable praying at home.
bsvr0500.22: {\n}And what if something happened?{\n}I’d be afraid to go see.
bsvr0500.24: {\n}I am sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will become a high{\n}summoner. Everyone in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} thinks so.
bsvr0500.25: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed.{\n}Maybe {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will repent and come home.
bsvr0500.28: {\n}I can’t figure whether I’m gonna join{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} or the Crusaders!
bsvr0500.29: {\n}I’m pretty good at blitz, ya?{\n}I can hold my breath and everything!
bsvr0500.30: {\n}They say I gotta train in order{\n}to join the Crusaders...
bsvr0500.31: {\n}Me and Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will{\n}beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, just the three of us!
bsvr0500.35: {\n}Let’s go help the summoner!{\n}I promise I’ll be a good boy!
bsvr0500.36: {\n}A summoner came to this village not{\n}long ago. Now what was his name?
bsvr0500.37: {\n}Looks like you got{\n}over the toxin, ya?
bsvr0500.38: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and the others aren’t back.{\n}What could have happened?
bsvr0500.39: {\n}It is true Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s a traitor?{\n}No one here believes that at all!
bsvr0500.40: {\n}We got letters from the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}!{\n}They’re doing great in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?
bsvr0500.41: {\n}I wonder if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is really{\n}going to go away?
bsvr0500.42: {\n}Long as I’m around, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s weaving{\n}will be known as nothing but the best!
bsvr0500.43: {\n}Don’t you worry. The summoner will{\n}return, I know it.
bsvr0500.44: {\n}Worrying over a few hours delay{\n}is nothing but a lack of faith!
bsvr0500.46: {\n}Who cares who they’re calling traitor.{\n}Defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and it’ll all be forgotten!
bsvr0500.47: {\n}Wait for the Calm to come before rejoicing.{\n}Wouldn’t want any...false hope.
bsvr0500.48: {\n}I am sure that Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} is{\n}watching over our apprentice summoner.
bsvr0500.49: {\n}On a hot day like today,{\n}it’s best to be in the shade, ya?
bsvr0500.50: {\n}I wove so much last month. All lost{\n}when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} destroyed my boat.
bsvr0500.52: {\n}Gone for a night and a day now.{\n}I’m too worried to speak!
bsvr0500.53: {\n}Though I’m sure nothing bad is{\n}happening. Not to that summoner.
bsvr0500.54: {\n}I’m glad the ferry’s on its way,{\n}but {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will be back, he will.
bsvr0500.56: {\n}When those children calling themselves{\n}{MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s come back, they’re in for a scolding.
bsvr0500.57: {\n}All these warrior monks were here{\n}looking for Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.
bsvr0500.58: {\n}If Lady {PC:01:YUNA} defeats {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} I’m sure{\n}those nasty rumors will go away.
bsvr0500.59: {\n}I wonder who was riding{\n}on that ship in the sky?
bsvr0500.66: {\n}You’re going with Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?{\n}Does that mean you’re a guardian?
bsvr0500.68: {\n}You’re saving it for the tournament then!{\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} have got to win this year!
bsvr0500.71: {\n}You’re the talk of the town, you know?{\n}Word travels fast in a village this size.
bsvr0500.77: {\n}The apprentice is the apprentice!{\n}The apprentice summoner, ya?
bsvr0500.78: {\n}The Cloister of Trials!{\n}It’s been a day already.
bsvr0500.80: {\n}I’m watching the store while{\n}sis is off praying.
bsvr0500.84: {\n}I wonder if we’ll get more customers{\n}now that the ferry’s up and running again.
bsvr0500.86: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are still in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?{\n}You should pay ’em a visit sometime.
bsvr0500.87: {\n}What happened to the flying ship?{\n}I hope it made it through the fight.
bsvr0500.88: {\n}Just between me and you, I hear that{\n}there’s no maesters left anymore!
bsvr0500.91: {\n}The apprentice entered the trials,{\n}and hasn’t come back...
bsvr0500.92: {\n}I’m sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will have{\n}lots of stories when she gets back.
bsvr0500.94: {\n}When the Calm comes, Lady {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}has to come back so we can celebrate!
bsvr0500.95: {\n}What’s a trader? I asked the{\n}monk, but he won’t tell me.
bsvr0500.96: {\n}If that flying ship comes back{\n}I’m gonna sing real loud!
bsvr0500.99: {\n}Fiends are around even during the day.{\n}Take care not to travel alone, ya?
bsvr0500.100: {\n}You know it’s too dangerous.{\n}Sorry, but you can’t pass.
bsvr0500.102: {\n}Instead of just loafing around{\n}you should be praying, too.
bsvr0500.103: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and his troops are on a mission.{\n}I’m on watch duty.
bsvr0500.105: {\n}Like to take a rest?{\n}Got to keep sharp, ya?
bsvr0500.107: {\n}Compared to the ones we fought during{\n}the operation, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} fiends are easy!
bsvr0500.108: {\n}I did my time in battle!{\n}Fiends are no problem.
bsvr0500.109: {\n}That flying ship looked like an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}machina to me. Hope it works this time.
bsvr0500.110: {\n}The Crusaders’ Lodge is open{\n}to guests. Take a rest?
bsvr0500.111: {\n}I want to go to the temple, but{\n}there’s an operation to prepare for.
bsvr0500.114: {\n}I got better, but only after{\n}praying at the temple a lot.
bsvr0500.115: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsvr0500.116: {\n}I hope I get over the toxin quick.{\n}The big operation’s coming up!
bsvr0500.117: {\n}You looking for {PC:04:WAKKA}? The priest{\n}called him to the temple a while back.
bsvr0500.119: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsvr0500.120: {\n}I’m praying for Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}’s and the others’{\n}safety. Yevon knows they’ll need it.
bsvr0500.122: {\n}Just a bunch of empty beds{\n}without people to sleep in them.
bsvr0500.123: {\n}I can’t believe {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"}{\n}was a failure. I just can’t.
bsvr0500.124: {\n}I just pray everyone makes{\n}it back okay. Please.
bsvr0500.125: {\n}Praying won’t keep fiends away.{\n}It takes {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s to defend {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsvr0500.126: {\n}The toxin finally wore off. Now to{\n}make up for all my downtime, ya?
bsvr0500.127: {\n}The battle with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} ain’t over yet...{\n}I wish there was something we could do.
bsvr0500.128: {\n}I’m fixing a hole where the{\n}rain gets in.
bsvr0500.129: {\n}Rent’s free, but I’ve been working{\n}like a dog just fixing the place.
bsvr0500.132: {\n}He looks pretty weak.{\n}Maybe he just can’t take it.
bsvr0500.133: {\n}I guess I’ll just keep fixing the leaks{\n}until the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s get back.
bsvr0500.136: {\n}Seems the fiends have increased{\n}with the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s gone.
bsvr0500.137: {\n}I’m no fiend-fighter, so I fix things{\n}and help the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s that way.
bsvr0500.140: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} toxin got to you.{\n}Took your memory, eh?
bsvr0500.141: {\n}I’d be happy to teach you anything{\n}you’ve forgotten, sonny.
bsvr0500.144: {\n}Maybe if I remind you of some things,{\n}you’ll remember who you are!
bsvr0500.153: {\n}All this worrying’s no good{\n}for an old man like myself.
bsvr0500.154: {\n}I’m sure you’d like to know{\n}more before you head out, eh?
bsvr0500.156: {\n}Looks like you got over the toxin.{\n}Praise be to {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, eh?
bsvr0500.158: {\n}We simple folk ain’t got a clue{\n}what them temple elders are thinking.
bsvr0500.159: {\n}I think I’ll stick around long enough to{\n}see {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} get what’s coming to it! Heh!
bsvr0500.160: {\n}Me favorite’s Lord Ohalland, ya?{\n}Spitting image of me old hubby.
bsvr0500.161: {\n}With Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} looking over her,{\n}I’m sure she’ll be returning, ya?
bsvr0500.163: {\n}I’ve nothing to say to a{\n}breaker of the precepts!
bsvr0500.165: {\n}What? You? A guardian?{\n}The toxin still got you, eh?
bsvr0500.166: {\n}What trick have you pulled{\n}on the good Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?
bsvr0500.167: {\n}I made up me mind to pray every{\n}day till Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s Calm begins.
bsvr0500.168: {\n}When the Calm comes, we’ll be putting{\n}up a statue of a new high summoner.
bsvr0500.170: {\n}I wanted to be a blitzer way back when.{\n}I just couldn’t hold my breath.
bsvr0500.171: {\n}Mainlanders love the fabrics{\n}we weave here in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsvr0500.172: {\n}I suppose you can’t run a{\n}business on tradition alone, ya?
bsvr0500.177: {\n}Without breaking the precepts,{\n}all we can do is pray, ya?
bsvr0500.178: {\n}I heard {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} was attacked, ya?{\n}Wh-What if {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s next?
bsvr0500.180: {\n}I bet me praying every day helped{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} finally win, ya?
bsvr0500.182: {\n}I wonder how things are on the mainland.{\n}We don’t get much news down here.
bsvr0500.183: {\n}Sounds like that poppycock about{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA} finally got cleared up.
bsvr0500.184: {\n}Now if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’d just go away,{\n}we’d have nothing to worry about.
bsvr0500.185: {\n}It’s hard to work with the{\n}Calm right around the corner!
bsvr0500.186: {\n}May the apprentice summoner{\n}return to us safely.
bsvr0500.188: {\n}It...It’s like we were{\n}born to live in fear.
bsvr0500.189: {\n}May the protection of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}be with our apprentice.
bsvr0500.191: {\n}When I think about Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s{\n}journey, I wonder if praying is enough.
bsvr0500.192: {\n}I’m sure she’ll be fine.{\n}{PC:05:LULU}’s with her and all.
bsvr0500.194: {\n}You should watch yourself.{\n}Never go against the teachings.
bsvr0500.196: {\n}I can’t believe Lady {PC:01:YUNA} would ever{\n}turn her back to the teachings! Never!
bsvr0500.197: {\n}I pray that the next Calm{\n}will last a long time.
bsvr0500.198: {\n}Please let the Aurochs{\n}score at least one goal.
bsvr0500.201: {\n}When I was born, Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} and{\n}two guardians came to our village.
bsvr0500.204: {\n}If I was strong like Lord {MCR:s06l24:"Zaon"}{\n}I could have been a guardian, too.
bsvr0500.205: {\n}Only sworn guardians may{\n}approach the Cloister of Trials.
bsvr0500.206: {\n}Pray hard, and the toxin will{\n}surely release its grip on you.
bsvr0500.209: {\n}Quickly, to the village square!{\n}Share in our joy!
bsvr0500.212: {\n}You look better than you did yesterday.{\n}Has {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin weakened its grip?
bsvr0500.213: {\n}The summoner undergoes the trials.{\n}We must not interfere.
bsvr0500.215: {\n}The chaos in the temple only{\n}serves to worry the people.
bsvr0500.218: {\n}I, too, will pray for the{\n}blessing of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} to shine upon you.
bsvr0500.220: {\n}Great strength is only obtained{\n}through great suffering.
bsvr0500.222: {\n}It appears the summoner’s pilgrimage{\n}goes well! Very good, very good.
bsvr0500.225: {\n}Even the teachings of a thousand years{\n}are due for an update once in a while.
bsvr0500.226: {\n}Why, if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is defeated, we may{\n}no longer need {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s guidance.
bsvr0500.228: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsvr0500.229: {\n}With the statues’ guidance, I’m{\n}sure our apprentice is doing fine.
bsvr0500.230: {\n}Pray at the temple, and you may{\n}just overcome {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin.
bsvr0500.232: {\n}The people of the village could use{\n}your help. You should pray, too.
bsvr0500.233: {\n}I suppose we’ll have to call our{\n}apprentice Lady {PC:01:YUNA} now.
bsvr0500.234: {\n}And you, heathen. Know that the{\n}teachings are the only true guide!
bsvr0500.237: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsvr0500.239: {\n}Word of Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s achievements{\n}has reached this island, too.
bsvr0500.240: {\n}I hear you’ve become a guardian!{\n}May you guard Lady {PC:01:YUNA} well.
bsvr0500.242: {\n}Those warrior monks that came to the{\n}island were just a bunch of crooks, ya?
bsvr0500.243: {\n}Who can the people of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} turn{\n}to now that {MCR:s06l1B:"Maester Mika"} is gone?
bsvr0500.247: {\n}Hey, I’m worried too!{\n}But all we can do is wait.
bsvr0500.249: {\n}Sorry, no time to talk.{\n}Rover starts barking when I slack off.
bsvr0500.253: {\n}Heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s got their butts{\n}kicked. They had it coming, if you ask me.
bsvr0500.255: {\n}Well, if it ain’t the traitors!{\n}You got some nerve coming here!
bsvr0500.256: {\n}Hey, hey, just kidding!{\n}No need to glare, ya?
bsvr0500.257: {\n}I hear things at the temples are a mess.{\n}Bad for business, I tell you.
bsvr0500.259: {\n}When that ship came, the old man,{\n}he kept working while he sang!
bsvr0500.261: {\n}The village where I was born is{\n}no longer there, thanks to {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsvr0500.264: {\n}Careful not to break any more precepts,{\n}or you’ll end up like the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s!
bsvr0500.265: {\n}A summoner named Lord {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"} came{\n}to the village, but he left so soon.
bsvr0500.266: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed{\n}as expected, because they used machina!
bsvr0500.269: {\n}Maybe I should learn {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}{\n}weaving...make a place for myself here.
bsvr0500.270: {\n}I doubt some old song is going{\n}to help anyone beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsvr0500.271: {\n}Seafaring is hard work. Gotta kick{\n}back sometimes. Get some R & R, ya?
bsvr0500.273: {\n}I sure hope we don’t run into{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on our next voyage.
bsvr0500.275: {\n}I do hope they come back safely.
bsvr0500.276: {\n}I’m gonna kick back in town{\n}till the next ship gets here.
bsvr0500.277: {\n}There’s no time to rest out there.{\n}Never know when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will show up.
bsvr0500.279: {\n}I really, really hope we don’t{\n}run into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on this voyage.
bsvr0500.281: {\n}I kinda got to liking this town.{\n}Maybe I’ll give up seafaring.
bsvr0500.282: {\n}One of my friends is on your ship.{\n}I’ll pray for both of you.
bsvr0500.284: {\n}No matter what happens in the{\n}temples, it’s life as usual here.
bsvr0500.285: {\n}Seems kind of odd to pray{\n}for the temples’ sake, ya?
bsvr0500.286: {\n}That flying ship was spectacular!{\n}Those {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} might have something there.

kami0000.50: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Well, hello there.{\n}Would you like to hear about this place?
kami0000.53: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Very well, let me tell{\n}you about the Crossing.
kami0000.54: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}A long time ago,{\n}this place was a traveler’s nightmare.
kami0000.55: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}”Plains of lightning, plains of thunder,{\n}those who cross are torn asunder.”
kami0000.57: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Then a man by the{\n}name of Bilghen appeared.
kami0000.59: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Finally, travelers were{\n}able to cross in safety.
kami0000.61: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}when he was struck{\n}and killed by lightning.
kami0000.62: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Bilghen was an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.{\n}Our history books never mention him.
kami0000.78: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
kami0000.80: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
kami0000.0: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}Moving across the Thunder Plains{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Lightning can strike {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}on the {MCR:s06l39:"Gandof"} Thunder Plains.
kami0000.1: {TIME:00}Lightning can strike at any time,{\n}so keep moving.
kami0000.2: {TIME:00}The lightning rod towers absorb nearby{\n}lightning. Seek shelter under them.
kami0000.3: {TIME:00}When there are no towers nearby,{\n}you can dodge lightning by pressing {CTRL:31:X}.
kami0000.4: {TIME:00}Hit {CTRL:31:X} as soon as you see a{\n}lightning flash. If successful,{\n}you can dodge the thunderbolt.
kami0000.10: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}I heard that Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}and Lady {PC:01:YUNA} are to be wed!
kami0000.11: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}It’s such great news!{\n}I have to tell everyone!
kami0000.14: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I’m afraid you heard a little wrong.{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}’s gonna turn him down.
kami0000.19: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}Well I’m sure that people{\n}would have rejoiced all over {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
kami0000.21: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}It will not do to joke{\n}about a thing like that.
kami0000.27: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}How are we supposed to cross that?
kami0000.30: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}We head north, not too near and not{\n}too far from the towers, ya?
kami0000.39: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Heh heh heh heh heh heh heh...
kami0000.41: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Eh heh heh heh heh heh heh...
kami0000.42: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}”Heh heh heh...”{\n}You’re givin’ me the creeps!
kami0000.45: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}This storm never stops.{\n}Better to cross quickly.
kami0000.46: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I know, but...{\n}Just for a little while?
kami0000.72: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Now’s no time to be picking fights{\n}with the {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}, that’s for sure.

lchb0600.6: {\n}Thanks to the citizens’ pitching in, the{\n}stadium has been repaired in no time.
lchb0600.3: {\n}Please do not throw objects or lean{\n}against the railing at any time!
lchb0600.4: {\n}Sphere pictures are allowed, but{\n}please refrain from using a flash.
lchb0600.15: {\n}The warrior monks have left, but the{\n}{MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s are back to help guard the area.
lchb0600.14: {\n}I don’t want the warrior monks stationed{\n}inside the stadium. They’re too uptight.
lchb0600.13: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s are dreamin’!{\n}Do they really think the operation will succeed?
lchb0600.22: {\n}Such a free-spirited city...{\n}I do not wish to return to Bevelle.
lchb0600.34: {\n}Nothing beats watching a blitz game{\n}after a long stint at sea.
lchb0600.21: {\n}Since games are played every day,{\n}the guards are always on duty.
lchb0600.27: {\n}Incompetent guardians! That’s why so many{\n}summoners are vanishing, I tell you.
lchb0600.33: {\n}I heard {MCR:s06l34:"Maester Seymour"} helped kill off{\n}some {MCR:s06l55:"sinspawn"} at {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"}.
lchb0600.19: {\n}Even with the recent fiend scare,{\n}I can’t believe how crowded it is.
lchb0600.25: {\n}Those fiends really put a{\n}damper on the tournament.
lchb0600.26: {\n}I was watching {MCR:s06l34:"Maester Seymour"}’s{\n}aeon from here. It was awesome!
lchb0600.31: {\n}Games are held every day,{\n}even after the tournament.
lchb0600.18: {\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}’s pretty beat up.{\n}I don’t think he’ll play in the finals.
lchb0600.24: {\n}Looks like the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are burnt out.{\n}They don’t stand a chance in the finals.
lchb0600.30: {\n}I must be dreaming.{\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are in the finals?
lchb0600.29: {\n}Why aren’t you out there playing?{\n}You’re pretty confident for an {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} player.
lchb0600.48: {\n}There’s a flying ship by the dock.{\n}When do you think it’ll fight {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}?
lchb0600.40: {\n}So many people...{\n}Much more than in the {MCR:s0Dl39:"Calm Lands"}.
lchb0600.47: {\n}I’ve seen many things in my time at sea, but{\n}nothing like that flying ship at dock number 1.
lchb0600.46: {\n}I hope watching the game will ease the{\n}Crusaders’ pain over their dreadful defeat.
lchb0600.37: {\n}{MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} warriors value their horns, and{\n}the people of {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"} value blitzball.
lchb0600.38: {\n}True believers of the teachings{\n}will not support the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s.
lchb0600.44: {\n}Many {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} have left {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"} to guard{\n}their sacred mountain, {MCR:s0Dl3A:"Gagazet"}.
lchb0600.36: {\n}You have to admire the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}’ fighting spirit.{\n}But the {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} warriors deserve some credit, too.
lchb0600.35: {\n}Those {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} players are playing well.{\n}You can tell they’re hungry for the championship.
lchb0600.42: {\n}The Psyches and the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are{\n}not enemies of the {MCR:s06l46:"Ronso Fangs"}.
lchb0600.9: {\n}Estoy orgulloso de mi trabajo{\n}como guardia del estadio.

klyt0300.0: {\n}I’m going to pray real hard{\n}so that Sin doesn’t come back here.
klyt0300.2: {\n}I hear {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} has gone far away.{\n}My prayers were answered.
klyt0300.4: {\n}I’m still a bit skeptical,{\n}but I guess it’s worth trying.
klyt0300.5: {\n}So, uh... I sang the Hymn of the Fayth,{\n}but what’s supposed to happen?
klyt0300.6: {\n}Climbing those stone steps every day has kept{\n}me in shape. Haven’t caught a cold in years.
klyt0300.7: {\n}I used to be a blitzer back in my day.{\n}Always vying with the other teams.
klyt0300.8: {\n}I recognize your face, sonny.{\n}You were here praying for victory, right?
klyt0300.9: {\n}Not many visitors at the temple these days.{\n}It is a pity, really.
klyt0300.11: {\n}The Goers look like a pretty good team,{\n}but they’re so stuck up, aren’t they?
klyt0300.13: {\n}I just saw a summoner and her guardian{\n}enter the Cloister of Trials.
klyt0300.15: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s of {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} will disband{\n}soon, and regroup as warrior monks.
klyt0300.17: {\n}The warrior monk leaders have{\n}barricaded themselves in St. {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}.
klyt0300.19: {\n}Seeing blitzball players here is a sure{\n}sign that the tournament is approaching.
klyt0300.20: {\n}I have quit the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s and have joined{\n}the warrior monks to protect the temple!
klyt0300.21: {\n}The warrior monk I respect most is Sir {PC:02:AURON},{\n}the legendary guardian of High Summoner {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}!
klyt0300.23: {\n}{MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}... warrior monk... Who cares?{\n}I just want to protect something!
klyt0300.24: {\n}I heard famous people come here.{PAUSE}{\n}Where could they be?
klyt0300.25: {\n}Wait a minute.{\n}Could they have been the celebrities?
klyt0300.28: {\n}I must focus on my training{\n}for as long as I am a monk.
klyt0300.29: {\n}Is that flying ship one of Yevon’s machina?{\n}Yes, let us assume so.
klyt0300.30: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}You here to pray for victory, too?
klyt0300.32: {\n}Who needs to pray?{\n}The {MCR:s06l45:"Luca Goers"} always win!
klyt0300.34: {\n}We’ve been praying for{\n}some competition this year!
klyt0300.35: {\n}So, what’s your goal this time?{\n}You gonna ”do your best” again?
klyt0300.38: {\n}Oooh! Play away! Just remember{\n}even kids can play, boys.
klyt0300.42: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Putting people down...{\n}They’re as bad as my old man!
klyt0300.43: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But, Sir {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"} was{\n}a kind and gentle man!
klyt0300.47: {\n}I thought I had put my feelings{\n}for {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"} behind me.
klyt0300.54: Datto{\n}You sure are talented, man. Playing{\n}blitzball and fighting like that!
klyt0300.56: Datto{\n}My poor knees were shakin’{\n}when the Goers confronted me.
klyt0300.59: Letty{\n}That was Bickson.{\n}He’s a jerk, but a first-rate blitzer.

kino0400.50: {\n}My buddy’s missing. We served{\n}in the same unit. I hope he’s okay.
kino0400.52: {\n}This’ll hardly make amends, but...{\n}I want the lady summoner to have this.
kino0400.53: {\n}I guess it’s time to seek the monks’ help{\n}and embrace the teachings once again.
kino0400.55: {\n}I found this lying on the battlefield.{\n}Maybe it will be of some use to you.
kino0400.56: {\n}All I can offer now are my prayers.
kino0400.57: {\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s attack has aggravated the fiends.{\n}I advise against going to {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}.
kino0400.59: {\n}It’s my fault. My men died in vain{\n}because of me. It’s all my fault.
kino0400.62: {\n}I’ll stay on to guard the Highroad,{\n}even without my fellow {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s.
kino0400.63: {\n}The warrior monks have returned to{\n}{MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}. In other words, they fled.
kino0400.64: {\n}Rumor has it that {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will{\n}return to this place someday.
kino0400.69: {\n}A heartbreaking defeat, it was...{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s blessing has spared us.
kino0400.71: {\n}Please notify me if you{\n}run into any {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"}.
kino0400.73: {\n}We must spread news of the{\n}wedding to all of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
kino0400.79: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
kino0400.81: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
kino0400.90: {TIME:00}The secrets of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}  language are revealed!{\n}{SPACE:01}[ {CLR:OL_PURPLE}G{CLR:WHITE} → {CLR:PINK}K{CLR:WHITE} ]
kino0400.92: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hujela{CLR:WHITE}!
kino0400.93: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Pakehhan{CLR:WHITE}!
kino0400.94: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Typpman{CLR:WHITE}!
kino0400.95: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Maynhan{CLR:WHITE}!
kino0400.96: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Cbaygan{CLR:WHITE}!
kino0400.97: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hydeja{CLR:WHITE}!
kino0400.98: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Unydun{CLR:WHITE}!
kino0400.99: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Medanyde{CLR:WHITE}!
kino0400.100: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Sycdan{CLR:WHITE}!
kino0400.2: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}In dark times she must be.{\n}She must shine bright.
kino0400.13: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Then we cross the {MCR:s0Dl28:"Thunder Plains"}{\n}to the temple of Macalania.
kino0400.15: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}And before that, we get to pray{\n}at the temple in {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s0Dl16:"Djose"}{CLR:WHITE}!
kino0400.16: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}We can’t just skip all{\n}that? Can we, huh?
kino0400.17: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I have to pray to the {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"} in every{\n}temple in order to earn the Final Aeon.
kino0400.19: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}She’s gotta prepare mind and body, all{\n}just to get ready for the Final Summoning.
kino0400.25: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}What can I do for you, boss?
kino0400.35: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Better than you finding out at a{\n}critical moment, becoming emotional.
kino0400.37: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I heard you were quite the crybaby.
kino0400.38: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}Yeah, maybe when I was a kid.
kino0400.39: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}Maybe even a little now.{\n}Just a little.
kino0400.41: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I still don’t buy{\n}your story, you hear?
kino0400.46: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Come to think of it...did I really{\n}have to know about {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}?

bjyt0700.1: {\n}A rotting bouquet.{\n}It’s too wet to make good tinder.

sins0900.5: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
sins0900.7: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!

mcfr1100.50: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
mcfr1100.52: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
mcfr1100.0: {\n}We escaped with our skins intact,{\n}but {PC:01:YUNA} lost something.
mcfr1100.1: {\n}I could already tell, her faith was{\n}shaken. {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} had betrayed her.
mcfr1100.2: {\n}I felt like I should do{\n}or say something--anything...
mcfr1100.6: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}We will have to avoid{\n}{MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"} in the future.
mcfr1100.14: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}If {PC:01:YUNA} figures out{\n}where we’re going, that is.
mcfr1100.15: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I feel kinda bad leaving{\n}everything up to her, you know?
mcfr1100.18: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI}’s with her, but{\n}maybe you should go, too?
mcfr1100.19: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I think it might help{\n}if you were there.
mcfr1100.22: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Wonder what {MCR:s06l66:"Yunie"}’ll do, huh?{\n}Think she’ll quit her pilgrimage?
mcfr1100.26: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I guess I shouldn’t{\n}stop her, you know?
mcfr1100.28: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I wonder if there’s a way to perform{\n}the Final Summoning and not die.
mcfr1100.30: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I guess someone would’ve thought{\n}of it in the last thousand years, huh?
mcfr1100.40: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I’m sorry for putting{\n}you through all this.

mtgz0100.41: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
mtgz0100.43: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
mtgz0100.3: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}These mark the graves of summoners{\n}and guardians who failed.
mtgz0100.9: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Many have become fiends, and they{\n}may want {PC:01:YUNA}’s company.
mtgz0100.12: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}All this way, only to fail.{\n}It must have been tough.
mtgz0100.18: {MCR:s06l07:"Wantz"}{\n}I have to carry on my{\n}brother’s business.
mtgz0100.19: {MCR:s06l07:"Wantz"}{\n}You’ve met him, I think.{\n}{MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"} XXIII, merchant extraordinaire?
mtgz0100.23: {MCR:s06l07:"Wantz"}{\n}But the temple imprisoned him{\n}for helping traitors.
mtgz0100.26: {MCR:s06l07:"Wantz"}{\n}”Don’t worry about me,{\n}just go help Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.”
mtgz0100.27: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But, why would your brother{\n}do this for us?
mtgz0100.29: {MCR:s06l07:"Wantz"}{\n}Hey, this isn’t the time for talking!
mtgz0100.32: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I will be sure to keep{\n}your brother in my prayers.

zkrn0100.12: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
zkrn0100.10: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!

djyt0500.15: {\n}Not all who are associated with the temple are{\n}against you, my lady. Please believe me.
djyt0500.16: {\n}Congratulations, Lady {PC:01:YUNA}. I’m sure Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}is smiling from the Farplane right now.
djyt0500.17: {\n}Oh, my...{PAUSE}{\n}We are out of funeral shrouds.
djyt0500.18: {\n}All I have to offer are my prayers.
djyt0500.0: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Okay... I guess I’ll just{\n}let her sleep for now, then.
djyt0500.8: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I-I’ll get ready right away!{\n}Just a moment!

lchb1800.3: {\n}During the battle, we could hear the{\n}roaring of the guns all the way to Luca...
lchb1800.4: {\n}We gave up serving the temple.{\n}It wasn’t our choice.
lchb1800.5: {\n}I just want to sell off this sweaty armor,{\n}and start a new life here in Luca.
lchb1800.6: {\n}Having that airship would make traveling{\n}between Luca and Kilika a lot easier...
lchb1800.7: {\n}We can finally make it back to Kilika,{\n}now that the ferries are running again.
lchb1800.8: {\n}I just wish the summoners{\n}would end this already.
lchb1800.9: {\n}Sin hasn’t attacked lately.{\n}That’s making me even more nervous.
lchb1800.11: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s are blustering on about{\n}destroying {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, but, heh... I doubt they will.
lchb1800.17: {\n}The warrior monks better watch their{\n}step. What goes around comes around!
lchb1800.19: {\n}Everyone’ll soon forget about it and{\n}occupy themselves with blitzball.
lchb1800.21: {\n}Tch! Everyone went to go{\n}see the opening ceremony.
lchb1800.22: {\n}Hey, ain’t ya a blitzer?{\n}What are ya doin’ walkin’ around?
lchb1800.23: {\n}What happened to that young lady{\n}you were with?
lchb1800.24: {\n}Heh. She dumped ya, eh?{\n}Don’t let it get ya down.
lchb1800.25: {\n}Hey, kiddo, got an extra ticket?{\n}I’ll buy it off you!
lchb1800.26: {\n}Or how about I sell ya front row tickets{\n}for you and the young lady?
lchb1800.27: {\n}Huh? You’re a blitzer, ain’tcha?{\n}Guess ya don’t need tickets.
lchb1800.28: {\n}Get your front row tickets here!{\n}Sell your unwanted tickets here!
lchb1800.29: {\n}I am reporting to you live,{\n}from outside Luca Stadium.
lchb1800.31: {\n}I’m in the middle of a broadcast!{\n}Leave me alone!
lchb1800.45: {\n}Many have disdained and shunned the{\n}Al Bhed and their machina for years, but...
lchb1800.53: {\n}Can’t you see I’m working here?{\n}You sure are a show-off, aren’t you!
lchb1800.54: {\n}As you all know, Operation Mi’ihen{\n}ended in utter failure.
lchb1800.57: {\n}Would you stop interrupting my broadcast?{\n}You get enough attention already!
lchb1800.58: {\n}Do you know anything about the{\n}fiends inside the stadium?
lchb1800.59: {\n}We have so few facts, we can’t{\n}write up a feature on it yet.
lchb1800.60: {\n}Hm? You want me to interview you?
lchb1800.61: {\n}It’s not like the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are going{\n}to make it past the first round anyway.
lchb1800.62: {\n}Why bother with an interview when{\n}we already know the outcome?
lchb1800.66: {\n}I’ve been interviewing eyewitnesses,{\n}but nobody seems to know a thing.
lchb1800.67: {\n}Well... If you win at least one{\n}game, I’ll grant you an interview.
lchb1800.69: {\n}Did our Hymn of the Fayth{\n}reach the flying ship?
lchb1800.71: {\n}I pray that the fallen Crusaders may{\n}rest peacefully on the Farplane.
lchb1800.72: {\n}The power of {MCR:s06l34:"Maester Seymour"}’s aeon{\n}was just incredible.
lchb1800.73: {\n}I can see why he was appointed a{\n}maester at such a young age.
lchb1800.76: {\n}By the way, I did hear{\n}someone whistling, though...
lchb1800.77: {\n}I really don’t care which team{\n}wins or loses.
lchb1800.78: {\n}I just want to watch the game{\n}and go crazy.
lchb1800.79: {\n}I never imagined the Calm would{\n}come during my lifetime.
lchb1800.80: {\n}I hear the mood in Guadosalam is{\n}just as gloomy as the Farplane.
lchb1800.81: {\n}Even if the Crusaders are wiped out,{\n}the warrior monks will protect us.
lchb1800.84: {\n}The temple’s probably devising a grand plan.{\n}That’s why they’re not doing anything right now.
lchb1800.85: {\n}We’ll be okay as long as the{\n}warrior monks protect us.
lchb1800.86: {\n}I hope those fiends aren’t a{\n}harbinger of {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s coming.
lchb1800.87: {\n}How can you not be excited when the{\n}tournament’s about to start soon!
lchb1800.88: {\n}I’m sure the people of Kilika were{\n}singing, too. I’m sure of it.
lchb1800.89: {\n}I’m just worried that Sin{\n}might attack Kilika again.
lchb1800.90: {\n}The Kilika Beasts went back home.{\n}I hope they win next year.
lchb1800.91: {\n}The {MCR:s06l44:"Kilika Beasts"} couldn’t play up{\n}to their potential this year.
lchb1800.92: {\n}Can’t blame ’em, though. Their island was{\n}recently attacked by {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, after all.
lchb1800.93: {\n}Our family has supported the {MCR:s06l44:"Kilika Beasts"}{\n}ever since my great grandfather’s day.
lchb1800.94: {\n}Let us pray that Yevon will be{\n}watching over the flying ship.
lchb1800.95: {\n}Some of Luca’s residents are making{\n}light of the teachings. What sacrilege.
lchb1800.97: {\n}Glory be to {MCR:s06l34:"Maester Seymour"}’s aeon,{\n}for keeping the destruction to a minimum.
lchb1800.99: {\n}The people are indulging in merrymaking,{\n}but we must keep in mind that...
lchb1800.101: {\n}We should make a whole bunch of those{\n}flying ships and deliver an all-out attack!
lchb1800.102: {\n}I saw a flying ship at dock number 1.{\n}Think that’s gonna beat Sin?
lchb1800.103: {\n}It’s too bad about the Crusaders...{\n}I thought for sure their plan would work.
lchb1800.104: {\n}I can’t believe fiends would attack{\n}right in front of the maester, of all people.
lchb1800.105: {\n}Just goes to show you there is absolutely{\n}no safe haven in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
lchb1800.106: {\n}Have you seen a little boy?{\n}My son and I got separated in the crowd.
lchb1800.107: {\n}I told him to whistle{\n}if he ever got lost...
lchb1800.108: {\n}The Calm shall infuse new light and{\n}energy into the temple once again.
lchb1800.109: {\n}The Macalania temple is losing its faith.{\n}I do not wish to live there anymore.
lchb1800.110: {\n}The Crusaders defied the precepts and failed.{\n}They should disband for their own good.
lchb1800.112: {\n}I hear they may be collaborating{\n}with the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.
lchb1800.113: {\n}You think I stand out in this temple attire?{\n}Perhaps I should change?
lchb1800.114: {\n}The machina and the Hymn may weaken Sin,{\n}but only a summoner can finish it off.
lchb1800.115: {\n}Those warrior monks were useless.{\n}They didn’t do a thing.
lchb1800.116: {\n}I think the fiend incident was the Al Bhed’s doing.{\n}They’re always up to no good.
lchb1800.117: {\n}Up until last year, it was the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s{\n}who were in charge of security.
lchb1800.118: {\n}If they had been here this year, the{\n}fiends would never have appeared.
lchb1800.119: {\n}Don’t you think it’s disrespectful of{\n}the {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"} to play in the Yevon Cup?
lchb1800.120: {\n}The flying ship is a forbidden machina, but{\n}we should just get it approved by the temple.
lchb1800.122: {\n}My buddy’s in critical condition after{\n}being attacked by a fiend. Damn it!
lchb1800.124: {\n}I hear the warrior monks invaded Besaid.{\n}They were looking for some traitors.
lchb1800.125: {\n}The Aurochs are a completely new team!{\n}They finally have some offense, thanks to you!
lchb1800.126: {\n}This is the first time I’ve ever{\n}seen the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} win!
lchb1800.127: {\n}You’re that newbie from the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}, right?{\n}Good luck to you!
lchb1800.128: {\n}The only thing the people can really{\n}do is to pray for the Calm.
lchb1800.129: {\n}Why use machina, when we have summoners?
lchb1800.130: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} really improved this year, but their{\n}success was overshadowed by the fiend incident.
lchb1800.131: {\n}Hey, did you see the lady summoner?{\n}What was she like?
lchb1800.133: {\n}Let him go. Even the two of us{\n}won’t be able to overpower him.
lchb1800.134: {\n}But, what about our duties{\n}to the temple?
lchb1800.137: {\n}We wear the armor of the temple,{\n}but it doesn’t mean a thing.
lchb1800.138: {\n}So, how did those fiends{\n}break into the stadium?
lchb1800.140: {\n}I’m keeping a close eye on the{\n}{MCR:s06l48:"Al Bhed Psyches"} this year.
lchb1800.141: {\n}Ewww... Why would you root for the{\n}{MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"}? You really do have bad taste.
lchb1800.142: {\n}I like how they cover up their faces.{\n}It’s just so sexy and mysterious.
lchb1800.143: {\n}Who knows what would have happened{\n}if Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} hadn’t been there...
lchb1800.145: {\n}Well, I would have to say it’s{\n}the {MCR:s06l46:"Ronso Fangs"} for me.
lchb1800.147: {\n}And that’s why the other teams{\n}are dead meat!
lchb1800.149: {\n}Oh, the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} winning the tournament,{\n}right? Yeah, I still can’t believe it.
lchb1800.152: {\n}What do you say we ditch guard{\n}duty and go have some fun?
lchb1800.154: {\n}Hmph! That’s the problem with you{\n}temple types. You’re too square!
lchb1800.156: {\n}We’re in sunny Luca now, so{\n}you should all just loosen up!
lchb1800.157: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} won the tournament.{\n}It must be some kind of mistake.
lchb1800.159: {\n}I’m glad the Goers won, but{\n}I don’t feel like celebrating.
lchb1800.160: {\n}Yeah, those fiends really ruined{\n}the whole blitz experience.
lchb1800.161: {\n}I wonder how it’ll turn out this year?
lchb1800.162: {\n}Well, duh!{\n}Of course the Goers are gonna win.
lchb1800.163: {\n}Psshhh! I know that! What I mean is,{\n}how many goals will Bickson score?
lchb1800.164: {\n}Yeah, Bickson’s gonna lead the{\n}Goers to victory as usual.
lchb1800.167: {\n}Oh, yeah? Well, my sister’s friend’s{\n}boyfriend is Graav’s cousin!
lchb1800.168: {\n}Well, I know a guy who’s best friends{\n}with Bickson’s younger brother!
lchb1800.169: {\n}Once the Calm comes, I’m planning to travel all{\n}through Spira to film the joyous occasion.
lchb1800.170: {\n}If you want to be interviewed, show{\n}us your most outrageous gag, okay?
lchb1800.171: {\n}Stop bothering us! You’ve already proven{\n}your point at the tournament!
lchb1800.173: {\n}Never in my wildest dreams did I think{\n}the {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} would win the cup.
lchb1800.174: {\n}Sorry, but we’re broadcasting{\n}the news about the fiend attack.
lchb1800.175: {\n}Hey, well if it isn’t the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} comedian.{\n}Thanks for that comic relief!
lchb1800.176: {\n}Keep up the antics throughout the tournament.{\n}I’ll be sure to capture you on sphere.
lchb1800.177: {\n}The opening ceremony’s about to begin.{\n}Shouldn’t you be heading back?
lchb1800.178: {\n}Is it true that the ferry is out of service?
lchb1800.179: {\n}I hear {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} may still be lurking{\n}in the sea nearby.
lchb1800.180: {\n}At this rate, who knows when{\n}we’ll make it back to {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"}?
lchb1800.193: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}In {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}, we do this{\n}to cheer on blitz players.
lchb1800.198: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, use that if we get separated.
lchb1800.203: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You try it, too! Put your fingers{\n}in your mouth like this.

lumm0100.2: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}But I don’t understand{\n}why you wanted me to.
lumm0100.3: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Didn’t you say you have{\n}{MCR:s06l41:"blitzball"} in your {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}?
lumm0100.6: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}My form don’t need no work.{\n}I’m the great {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}. It’s for my kid.
lumm0100.8: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Yeah, and he wants{\n}to beat his old man bad.
lumm0100.9: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Once, I told him to give it up.{\n}He didn’t speak to me for a week.
lumm0100.11: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}I hope he got bigger{\n}and put on some muscle.

guad0600.0: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}I will go inform Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}.{\n}Please wait here.
guad0600.2: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I haven’t done anything{\n}to make him mad.
guad0600.3: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I get the feeling he called us up{\n}here for more than just dinner.
guad0600.4: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Nothing ’gainst the maester,{\n}but I hope we get this over with quick.
guad0600.6: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Summoners usually just pass{\n}through on their way elsewhere.
guad0600.9: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I didn’t even ask a question and{\n}you’re explaining things.
guad0600.12: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Maybe you finally believe I{\n}don’t know anything about {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
guad0600.13: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}And maybe that means you{\n}believe me about {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}, too?
guad0600.15: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}There are many things I do not know.
guad0600.17: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I suppose I can’t say{\n}what I think either way.
guad0600.27: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Gee, I wonder what all this is for.{\n}It’s exciting!
guad0600.39: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Truly, it is good to have guests again.
guad0600.40: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Since Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"} passed away,{\n}these halls have been too quiet.
guad0600.41: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}The death of Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"} was{\n}a great loss for all of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
guad0600.42: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Was this Maester {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}{\n}really such a great guy?
guad0600.46: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}But now a new leader, Lord{\n}{MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}, has come before us.
guad0600.47: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} is the child{\n}of a {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} and a human.
guad0600.48: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}He will be the tie that{\n}binds our two races together.
guad0600.49: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}But that is not all, I think.
guad0600.56: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Please, make yourselves at home.{\n}There’s no rush.
guad0600.59: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}It has been a long time{\n}since I had guests.
guad0600.63: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Correct. {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}...{\n}as it looked one thousand years ago.

guad0601.6: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA}--no, all summoners--are{\n}charged with bringing peace to {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
guad0601.9: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}She must be a leader for the people.
guad0601.10: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}I proposed to Lady {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}as a maester of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.
guad0601.12: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}A moment’s diversion may amuse an{\n}audience, but it changes nothing.
guad0601.13: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Even so, the actors{\n}must play their parts.
guad0601.14: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}There’s no need to answer right away.{\n}Please, think it over.
guad0601.20: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}We {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} are keen{\n}to the scent of the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}.

lchb1000.0: {\n}Gathering data for travelers is an important{\n}part of a Crusader’s duties, too.
lchb1000.1: {\n}I admire that young Crusader’s dedication.{\n}I must recruit him into the warrior monks.
lchb1000.2: {\n}The operation will commence soon.{\n}I must hurry.
lchb1000.5: {\n}You should check the sphere monitor before you{\n}set out. You’ll find useful information in there.
lchb1000.7: {\n}The Hymn of the Fayth is one of our{\n}favorites! We all sang really loud!
lchb1000.8: {\n}Enjoy the beautiful music!{\n}Immerse yourself in the stunning visuals!
lchb1000.9: {\n}I believe the Calm is right around the corner.{\n}Shall we celebrate early?
lchb1000.10: {\n}I suggest you proceed to the rear{\n}for a thorough explanation.
lchb1000.11: {\n}When Sin and the ship come flying through,{\n}listen to my drum and sing in tune!
lchb1000.12: {\n}If it’s our music you want to hear,{\n}then go to the back and buy a sphere!
lchb1000.13: {\n}That drummer lookss like ush...{\n}Maybe he’sh a big relative of Hypello?
lchb1000.14: {\n}Thish ishn’t the shtadium...?{\n}I shink I’m losht.
lchb1000.17: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Nah, those monks{\n}are pushovers, I tell ye!
lchb1000.18: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}I’ll fleece any priest,{\n}or my name’s not {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}!
lchb1000.20: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Sorry.{\n}It was our fault they locked you up.
lchb1000.23: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}I had a sister.{\n}{MCR:s06l07:"Wantz"}’s older sister, you see.
lchb1000.24: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}A summoner, she was.{\n}Went on pilgrimage at a young age.
lchb1000.27: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Me and {MCR:s06l07:"Wantz"}, well, neither of us{\n}were fighters enough to be guardians.
lchb1000.28: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}I think about it every day, I do.{\n}If we could’ve helped her.
lchb1000.29: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Least I can do is try to{\n}help another summoner, I figure.
lchb1000.35: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}{MCR:s06l07:"Wantz"} has got all the good stuff.{\n}{MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"} XXIII’s retiring!

mcyt0000.10: {\n}I will hold you personally{\n}responsible if anything happens.
mcyt0000.11: {\n}The {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} have left the temple,{\n}restoring peace to this holy place.
mcyt0000.12: {\n}It’s a relief that those{\n}troubling folk are gone.
mcyt0000.13: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}You’ve really done it now!{\n}Wanna buy something, just in case?
mcyt0000.34: {\n}No one’s coming to pick me up.
mcyt0000.36: {\n}Fool! To come back to{\n}{MCR:s0Dl2D:"Macalania Temple"} a traitor!
mcyt0000.43: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
mcyt0000.45: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
mcyt0000.1: {\n}The likes of her are not{\n}welcome in this hallowed place.
mcyt0000.4: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I’ve decided to be {PC:01:YUNA}’s{\n}guardian now, and that’s all I want.
mcyt0000.5: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}And that’s all one{\n}needs to be a guardian.

slik0700.0: Botta{\n}Ugh...I-I’ve gotten seasick...{\n}I think I’m gonna hurl.
slik0700.2: Keepa{\n}If you see one guy throw up, you{\n}sorta get sick too, you know?

hiku2000.0: {\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} came down on {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}!{\n}It serves the temple worms right!
hiku2000.1: {\n}The main gun is finished.{\n}It I cannot repair.
hiku2000.2: {\n}If only the main gun worked,{\n}we could shoot {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} down!
hiku2000.3: {\n}Even should {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} return, if all{\n}are singing, there will be no fear.
hiku2000.4: {\n}We will charge into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, no?{\n}Let us do great battle!
hiku2000.5: {\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} sits still. It moves not.{\n}It seems to wait for us.
hiku2000.11: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
hiku2000.13: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!

swin0800.3: {\n}The power room, like it says on the door!
swin0800.8: {\n}What kind of backwater island{\n}did you come from, anyway?
swin0800.10: {\n}Miracles and oddities were starting{\n}to become daily routine on this trip.

slik1000.0: {\n}When {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} attacked {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}{\n}that day, I woke up in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
slik1000.1: {\n}I kept hoping it would{\n}work in reverse, too.
slik1000.4: {\n}Maybe it was that day...{\n}on the sea, under the burning sun.
slik1000.6: {\n}I was in a foreign world.{\n}I wasn’t going home.
slik1000.7: {\n}This was my new reality,{\n}and I was stuck in it for good.

hiku0500.1: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} will use machina,{\n}if machina can find {PC:01:YUNA}.
hiku0500.4: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}You keep walking path forward.{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} watch the rear.
hiku0500.7: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}Friends have saved {PC:03:KIMAHRI}’s life.{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} will treasure it.
hiku0500.10: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}The {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} were singing, too.{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI}’s ears never wrong.
hiku0500.12: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}There is no need for fear.{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} will go with you.
hiku0500.13: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}We owe our lives to the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.
hiku0500.14: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}However, no matter how they beg,{\n}we cannot quit our pilgrimage.
hiku0500.16: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}I’ve known since I was a child.{\n}My will is set.
hiku0500.17: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}If I do not do it, someone{\n}else must, you understand.
hiku0500.18: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}I’m amazed this thing can fly, truly!
hiku0500.19: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}It must be sacrilege to{\n}think so highly of a machina.
hiku0500.23: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}As soon as we land,{\n}we continue the pilgrimage!
hiku0500.24: {MCR:s06l09:"Maroda"}{\n}Hey, I’m not looking forward{\n}to my brother dying when this is all over.
hiku0500.25: {MCR:s06l09:"Maroda"}{\n}If only there was some way of{\n}doing it without anyone dying.
hiku0500.28: {MCR:s06l09:"Maroda"}{\n}If we had all the time in the world,{\n}yeah, we’d think of something.
hiku0500.29: {MCR:s06l09:"Maroda"}{\n}And while we were thinking,{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} would kill us all.
hiku0500.32: {MCR:s06l09:"Maroda"}{\n}They grabbed {MCR:s06l0A:"Pacce"},{\n}so we had to do what they said.
hiku0500.33: {MCR:s06l09:"Maroda"}{\n}We needed a break, anyway.{\n}{MCR:s06l0A:"Pacce"} was pretty tired.
hiku0500.34: {MCR:s06l09:"Maroda"}{\n}He should never have come{\n}on the pilgrimage, little kid like that.
hiku0500.35: {MCR:s06l09:"Maroda"}{\n}Still, he does pretty good for his size.{\n}He’s gonna be something someday.
hiku0500.44: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}I came to {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"} to pick up some{\n}goods and found myself here.
hiku0500.47: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Please let me know if you{\n}need any of my wares.
hiku0500.49: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Thank you. Your patronage{\n}is very much appreciated.
hiku0500.59: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}’s old man was a priest of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"},{\n}but he married an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}, huh?
hiku0500.60: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} wanted peace{\n}between his people and ours.
hiku0500.61: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}He would occasionally visit{\n}the {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"} of those days.
hiku0500.66: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Yes.{\n}He wouldn’t talk to her after that.
hiku0500.67: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}But, when {PC:01:YUNA} was born,{\n}they made up again.
hiku0500.71: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}That incident turned Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}down the summoner’s path.
hiku0500.73: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}But, you’ll put an end to it?
hiku0500.79: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Once {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is gone, we’ll need{\n}to be rebuilding {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"}, you see.
hiku0500.81: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Ah, how is your{\n}progress with our language?
hiku0500.85: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Just repeating what{\n}I’ve said is not talking, now.
hiku0500.86: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}But your pronunciation’s quite passable.{\n}You’ve been studying, I see.
hiku0500.87: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}If there’s anything I can help{\n}you with in the future, just ask.
hiku0500.109: {\n}Those {MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"}! They will feel{\n}my wrath in the {MCR:s06l67:"blitz"} sphere!
hiku0500.110: {\n}This I leave to you!{\n}Battle was never my forte.
hiku0500.112: {\n}The lord {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"}, an unsent?{\n}But I saw him in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}.
hiku0500.113: {\n}If every mouth in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} sings,{\n}we may win this battle.
hiku0500.114: {\n}Should we not be watching{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} more closely?
hiku0500.115: {\n}You will attack {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} head on?{\n}Truly a great warrior are you!
hiku0500.116: {\n}Never have I thought of flying{\n}into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}! Not even in dreams!
hiku0500.118: {\n}Everyone be calm! Be calm!{\n}Fear is our enemy!
hiku0500.119: {\n}That was first time being{\n}so close to {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}!
hiku0500.120: {\n}Being on ship is bad for health.{\n}Let us kick the {MCR:s06l41:"blitzball"}!
hiku0500.121: {\n}Soon is the final battle with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}!{\n}How very excited I am!
hiku0500.122: {\n}This is the calm before the storm.{\n}Now is time to train, train!
hiku0500.123: {\n}Make this battle the last!{\n}We are counting on you!
hiku0500.124: {\n}When the {MCR:s06l63:"Calm"} comes, we will play{\n}each day! Now we must train, train!
hiku0500.125: {\n}Forgive me for my actions in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}.{\n}We wanted to protect the {MCR:s06l57:"summoner"}, you see?
hiku0500.126: {\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} found the place of our {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"}.{\n}Perhaps we were followed?
hiku0500.129: {\n}{MCR:s0Dl04:"Baaj"} is a place of mystery.{\n}Mystery worth exploring, no?
hiku0500.130: {\n}I have faith you will do this thing.{\n}I will sing, too, for I believe.
hiku0500.131: {\n}When the battle is over,{\n}we will play {MCR:s06l67:"blitz"} once more!
hiku0500.132: {\n}Since childhood, I have played{\n}only {MCR:s06l67:"blitz"}! It is true!
hiku0500.133: {\n}I hoped only to rest at {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"} a while{\n}then return to {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}.
hiku0500.134: {\n}You are a traitor, no?{\n}Then you are one with the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
hiku0500.135: {\n}Both {MCR:s06l23:"Yunalesca"} and {MCR:s06l19:"Mika"} were dead,{\n}yet they clung to {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} tightly.
hiku0500.136: {\n}Pardon me. So scared was I that{\n}I began to tremble all over!
hiku0500.137: {\n}Such fear I knew before the battle!{\n}But the singing did calm me.
hiku0500.139: {\n}Going inside {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}...{\n}I sang in fright and would not stop!
hiku0500.140: {\n}The {MCR:s06l48:"Al Bhed Psyches"} all escaped harm.{\n}We are ready to play again!
hiku0500.142: {\n}I wonder, where will the{\n}{MCR:s06l58:"airship"} go from here?
hiku0500.143: {\n}I want to be a top player.{\n}Many teams I want to try.
hiku0500.144: {\n}I do not run around in panic!{\n}Hope for the best, prepare for the worst!
hiku0500.145: {\n}Leave the ship to us {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.{\n}Take rest while you are able.
hiku0500.146: {\n}I know it will not do to panic,{\n}but I do not know how to be calm!
hiku0500.148: {\n}We need {MCR:s06l67:"blitz"} to cheer our people{\n}after the loss of {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"}, you see?
hiku0500.149: {\n}I will not die in this place!{\n}I fear no {MCR:s06l56:"fiend"}! Come, and I will fight!
hiku0500.150: {\n}I must train or the {MCR:s06l58:"airship"}{\n}will rob me of my muscles!
hiku0500.151: {\n}The age of the temples is past.{\n}Now comes the age of {MCR:s06l6A:"machina"}!
hiku0500.152: {\n}Elder {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"} has great courage!{\n}I must learn to be like him.
hiku0500.153: {\n}The ship rocked so much{\n}I felt quite funny!
hiku0500.154: {\n}When the time comes, I will fight.{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}! Here is my best shot!
hiku0500.155: {\n}How was it inside {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}?{\n}Many {MCR:s06l56:"fiend"} there, I think.
hiku0500.159: {TIME:00}No memory card (8MB) (for PlayStation®2){\n}found in MEMORY CARD slot 1!
hiku0500.165: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hujela{CLR:WHITE}!
hiku0500.166: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Pakehhan{CLR:WHITE}!
hiku0500.167: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Typpman{CLR:WHITE}!
hiku0500.168: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Maynhan{CLR:WHITE}!
hiku0500.169: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Cbaygan{CLR:WHITE}!
hiku0500.170: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hydeja{CLR:WHITE}!
hiku0500.171: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Unydun{CLR:WHITE}!
hiku0500.172: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Medanyde{CLR:WHITE}!
hiku0500.173: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Sycdan{CLR:WHITE}!

swin0000.86: {\n}You’ve counted the number{\n}of seagulls around the ship?
swin0000.1: {\n}Ah. Kicking back and loafing around{\n}are the greatest luxuries you can have.
swin0000.4: {\n}Ahh... Basking in the{\n}sun is such a great luxury.
swin0000.7: {\n}So I told him right off{\n}the bat. That’d be cats.
swin0000.9: {\n}You’re the only one{\n}that’ll listen to me...
swin0000.10: {\n}Youngsters nowadays are so rowdy.{\n}I can hardly hear myself think in town.
swin0000.11: {\n}I’d rather spend time with my{\n}dogs than hang around townsfolk.
swin0000.13: {\n}Cheer for the {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"}?{\n}I’d as soon break the teachings!
swin0000.14: {\n}Both Liki and Winno were...urp.{\n}L-Let’s...ugh...continue this later.
swin0000.16: {\n}Did you know...that both were...names{\n}of great monks...? Th-That’s all...
swin0000.17: {\n}G-Give me..a break... Even my trivia...{\n}won’t help me...right now...
swin0000.19: {\n}Ugh... Just talking about it...{\n}gets me sick... Urrp... H-Help!
swin0000.22: {\n}I was on watch duty all night long.{\n}Please let me get some sleep!
swin0000.24: {\n}I’ve been pulling all-nighters{\n}these days. Please let me rest!
swin0000.25: {\n}Don’t worry. I sang the Hymn, too.{\n}Just...just let me sleep, okay?
swin0000.28: {\n}He used to be a hard worker, too.{\n}But now, he’s always like this.
swin0000.29: {\n}Sometimes I wonder why I even{\n}stay with him at all.
swin0000.30: {\n}He stayed on my lap{\n}when he sang the Hymn.
swin0000.32: {\n}They say if you wish upon a{\n}{MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} Gull, your wishes come true!
swin0000.33: {\n}What? It’s a Lesser Gull, you say?Then my wishes won’t...
swin0000.34: {\n}Even if it’s a just a Lesser Gull, at least{\n}half of my wish will come true! Right?
swin0000.36: {\n}I like {MCR:s06l41:"blitzball"} too, but even{\n}I can’t get that deep into it.
swin0000.38: {\n}Being afraid of {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} all this{\n}time, I’ve had no time to dream.
swin0000.39: {\n}I’m doing a study on{\n}the animals of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
swin0000.40: {\n}The birds flying around here are{\n}Lesser {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} Gulls.
swin0000.41: {\n}Lesser Gulls are gentler than Greater Gulls.{\n}You can tell by the way they fly.
swin0000.42: {\n}I wonder how many of them are flying{\n}around this ship? I’m curious.
swin0000.44: {\n}You say you want to help me again?{\n}Thanks, I’ll let you know if I need any.
swin0000.45: {\n}There is a legend that Lesser Gulls carry{\n}the spirits of the dead to the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}.
swin0000.46: {\n}The Lesser Gulls seem a bit flustered.{\n}Maybe they feel {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s presence nearby.
swin0000.47: {\n}I hope that the {MCR:s06l63:"Calm"} will come soon,{\n}so I can concentrate on my study.
swin0000.49: {\n}That’s about what I thought.{\n}It’s the same as I counted earlier.
swin0000.50: {\n}Thanks to you, I have a confirmed count.{\n}Here, this is for your help.
swin0000.51: {\n}Are you sure?{\n}Weren’t there more than that?
swin0000.52: {\n}Are you sure?{\n}I think that’s too much.
swin0000.53: {\n}Say, can you do a recount?{\n}I really need an accurate figure.
swin0000.55: {\n}It was a mistake to take work on{\n}the Winno just because it pays well.
swin0000.56: {\n}Day and night, it’s been work,{\n}work, work. Give me a break!
swin0000.57: {\n}My gramps always said, a man can{\n}only work so much in a lifetime.
swin0000.58: {\n}Gramps was a real hard worker, though.
swin0000.60: {\n}There’s no use griping, but sometimes{\n}that’s the only thing I can do.
swin0000.61: {\n}We’re rooting for that flying ship.{\n}Our lives depend on it!
swin0000.62: {\n}Hopefully there will be less work{\n}for watch duty once {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s defeated.
swin0000.63: {\n}Use the lower decks to sleep and rest.{\n}We’ll get there by the time you wake up.
swin0000.70: {TIME:00}Simply press {CTRL:31:X} without directional{\n}buttons when it appears in the center.
swin0000.71: {TIME:00}Let’s try practicing a little.{\n}Press buttons following the{\n}on-screen instructions.
swin0000.75: {TIME:00}Did you get the hang of it?{\n}Now for the real thing!{PAUSE}Show Jecht what you can do!
swin0000.92: {\n}The Jecht Shot...{\n}Maybe I can do it this time.
swin0000.93: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}I’ll give it a try.{\n}{CHOICE:01}No, not now.
