bika0200.2: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}Beware of {MCR:s06l56:"fiend"}!{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Weaker {MCR:s06l56:"fiend"} to the right.{\n}Stronger {MCR:s06l56:"fiend"} to the left.

znkd0400.0: {\n}You could at least{\n}go see how they are doing.
znkd0400.4: {\n}Perhaps you could go look for us.
znkd0400.7: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Who cares whether{\n}he comes back or not?
znkd0400.12: {\n}If he dies, you’ll never be able{\n}to tell him how much you hate him.
znkd0400.13: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Well, well, trying to follow{\n}in my footsteps, are you?
znkd0400.19: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}No one else can do it.{\n}I’m the best!
znkd0400.22: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Oh, right. You’re not originally{\n}from {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}, are you?

genk0500.7: {\n}Hey, there. If you don’t buy anything{\n}from me, you’ll regret it.
genk0500.9: {\n}Dangerous when shoopuf’s close.{\n}Wants to be shmooshed?
genk0500.11: {\n}Shing the Hymn?{\n}A very, very myshterious shong indeed.
genk0500.14: {\n}The {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} have green eyes with a swirl{\n}pattern. Report any sightings immediately!
genk0500.15: {\n}The {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} are roaming this area,{\n}targeting summoners.
genk0500.16: {\n}Please rest assured,{\n}the shoopuf is operating as usual.
genk0500.17: {\n}With Yevon in chaos,{\n}the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s must be vigilant.
genk0500.18: {\n}The fight against {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} continues.{\n}Be careful when heading north.
genk0500.19: {\n}Riding the shoopuf is free{\n}because the temple pays for it.
genk0500.20: {\n}The temple provides for the people.{\n}We are truly blessed.
genk0500.21: {\n}It seems that Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}will be marrying Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}’s daughter.
genk0500.24: {\n}Me? I obey the temple, without question.{\n}Who would ever shun the sacred temple?
genk0500.26: {\n}The high priests and the{\n}summoners will take care of us.
genk0500.27: {\n}You say our machina violate{\n}the teachings, eh? Nonsense!
genk0500.28: {\n}These machina have Yevon’s approval. Don’t{\n}mix them up with the forbidden ones, got it?
genk0500.29: {\n}The maester’s engagement is such a{\n}blessing. It lightens even my spirits.
genk0500.31: {\n}Careful what you believe, especially{\n}when such nonsense is floatin’ around.
genk0500.33: {\n}Can’t believe anything anymore!{\n}Just pray that {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will go away.
genk0500.37: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Surprised, he drew{\n}his blade and struck it.
genk0500.39: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}He was drunk...{\n}Thought it was a fiend.
genk0500.41: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}We offered all the money{\n}we had as an apology.
genk0500.43: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}But, it would seem{\n}that shoopuf still works here.
genk0500.48: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Don’t let the peaceful scenery fool you.{\n}Be on guard at all times.

mcfr0700.0: {\n}Hey, did you hear?{\n}They’re saying there was a riot in {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}.
mcfr0700.1: {\n}The warrior monks aren’t letting{\n}pilgrims into {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"} anymore.

bsyt0100.0: {\n}{TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}You cannot push the pedestal over steps.{CLR:WHITE}
bsyt0100.1: {\n}You can obtain hidden items by {\n}using {CLR:YELLOW}Destruction Spheres{CLR:WHITE}.
bsyt0100.25: {\n}Maybe this wasn’t such a good idea{\n}after all.
bsyt0100.29: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Only summoners, apprentice summoners,{\n}and their guardians can enter here.
bsyt0100.34: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Summoners go on a pilgrimage{\n}to pray at every temple in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
bsyt0100.37: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}One of them’s got a short fuse,{\n}and who knows what the other’s thinking.
bsyt0100.38: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Well, now that we’ve come this far...
bsyt0100.39: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}might as well go all the way!
bsyt0100.42: {\n}You must use a sphere to go any further.
bsyt0100.43: {\n}{CLR:YELLOW}Glyph Spheres{CLR:WHITE} open the way to{\n}the {CLR:BLUE}Chamber of the Fayth{CLR:WHITE}.
bsyt0100.44: {\n}{CLR:YELLOW}Destruction Spheres{CLR:WHITE} open the way to{\n}hidden treasure.
bsyt0100.46: {\n}You can carry only one sphere{\n}at a time.
bsyt0100.15: {\n}{TIME:00}You can only hold one sphere at a time.
bsyt0100.20: {\n}{TIME:00}The door seems to be locked{\n}by an unseen force.
bsyt0100.21: {\n}{TIME:00}Something can be placed in the recess.

genk0400.0: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Shoopufs!{\n}I haven’t ridden one in so long!
genk0400.6: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA} jump in{\n}three more times for fun.
genk0400.11: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I lived in the city of {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}{\n}until ten years ago.
genk0400.13: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} was with me the whole way!
genk0400.15: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}It’s the biggest city in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}!{\n}The main temple of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} is there.
genk0400.16: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Come on! Let’s get on the shoopuf!

bsmm0000.1: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Everyone will find us{\n}if it doesn’t come soon.
bsmm0000.7: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I thought {PC:04:WAKKA} told you{\n}not to get any ideas?
bsmm0000.12: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}You, with a woman?{\n}You can’t even catch a ball!
bsmm0000.15: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Gonna cry again? Cry, cry.{\n}That’s the only thing you’re good for!

mihn0100.5: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I wish I could live{\n}in a place like this.
mihn0100.6: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Peaceful... Living with a smile{\n}on my face every day.
mihn0100.8: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But then a new {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}{\n}will be born anyway.
mihn0100.9: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Well then, you can{\n}just beat it again.
mihn0100.11: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, you can! Trust me!{\n}You are the best summoner out there!
mihn0100.14: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}And it will not go away{\n}until we’ve atoned.
mihn0100.17: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}What did we do that was{\n}so bad in the first place?
mihn0100.21: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Ever since I was young,{\n}I never questioned it.
mihn0100.22: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But now that you ask me if it{\n}is that bad or not...I don’t know.
mihn0100.23: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}There are so many{\n}things I don’t know.
mihn0100.25: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Such thinking is very{\n}unbecoming of a summoner!
mihn0100.29: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}During a game, you have to think{\n}of blitz and nothing else, you know?
mihn0100.31: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You can’t think, ”That’s a cute girl{\n}in the fifth seat from the right.”
mihn0100.33: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You see, uh, {PC:01:YUNA}, what I mean is,{\n}you really shouldn’t worry, you know?
mihn0100.34: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}After we beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, that’s when{\n}you can worry about the future.
mihn0100.36: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}But, {PC:01:YUNA}, how are you supposed{\n}to beat something big like that?
mihn0100.38: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}It’s the only way to defeat Sin.{\n}The only way.
mihn0100.39: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}With it, we can call the Final Aeon.{\n}That’s the goal of the pilgrimage.
mihn0100.43: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}She means the ruins of a city{\n}destroyed a thousand years ago.
mihn0100.50: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I’ll go to {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"} to{\n}see it with my own eyes.
mihn0100.51: {\n}I knew it couldn’t be my {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}.{\n}But I had to make sure.

nagi0100.105: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
nagi0100.103: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
nagi0100.4: {\n}Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}’s commands must{\n}be obeyed. You will come!
nagi0100.5: {\n}I warn you, the maester{\n}doesn’t need you alive.
nagi0100.7: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}That way leads down into the valley.
nagi0100.8: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Wow, you know your way around, ya?
nagi0100.10: {\n}Sometimes {PC:01:YUNA} would{\n}just stare off into the distance.
nagi0100.12: {\n}She was saying goodbye{\n}to the places she’d never see again.
nagi0100.71: {TIME:00}¡{PC:00:TIDUS} ha alcanzado el nivel{\n}{CLR:BLUE}Cibaneun en {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0100.75: {TIME:00}¡{PC:00:TIDUS} ha alcanzado el{\n}nivel {CLR:BLUE}Knyh aqbandu en {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{CLR:WHITE}!

dome0000.36: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
dome0000.38: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
dome0000.0: {\n}If it might benefit the future of{\n}{MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}, I will gladly give my life.
dome0000.1: {\n}It is the highest honor for{\n}which a guardian might ask.
dome0000.7: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}This dome is filled with pyreflies.{\n}It’s like one gigantic sphere.
dome0000.9: {\n}No! Mother, no! I don’t{\n}want you to become a {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"}!
dome0000.12: {\n}Only then will the people accept you.
dome0000.24: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}, let us go back!{\n}I don’t want to see you...die!
dome0000.25: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}You knew this was{\n}to happen, my friend.
dome0000.27: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}{PC:02:AURON}, I am honored that{\n}you care for me so.
dome0000.28: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}But I have come to{\n}kill grief itself.
dome0000.29: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}I will defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and lift the{\n}veil of sorrow covering {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.

maca0401.34: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
maca0401.36: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
maca0401.2: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Oh, right. You’re not originally{\n}from {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}, are you?
maca0401.13: {\n}Which means, if we kill {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}I’ll never be able to go home.
maca0401.25: {\n}For the first time, I was{\n}finally able to believe it.

maca0400.106: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I’m sure that {MCR:s06l1A:"Maester Mika"}{\n}will listen to us.
maca0400.108: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Say, you feel something{\n}weird in the air?
maca0400.109: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Some kind of bad vibes or something.
maca0400.118: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} not know{\n}if this good or bad.
maca0400.122: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}But you can’t expect someone{\n}to protect you all the time.
maca0400.127: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}We’re under the lake ice, aren’t we?
maca0400.131: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}So now we’re the traitors{\n}that killed a maester.
maca0400.133: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Of course it can.{\n}Don’t be a fool.
maca0400.137: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}First time a non-{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}called me that.
maca0400.143: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
maca0400.145: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
maca0400.1: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}That’s what I would have said,{\n}if I was a follower of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.
maca0400.2: {\n}{CMD:0E:10}We were all there,{\n}and in one piece.
maca0400.5: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You act first and{\n}think later, don’t you?
maca0400.9: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, {PC:04:WAKKA}, would you cheer up?{\n}Look, we only did what we had to do.
maca0400.17: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}I’m sure {MCR:s06l66:"Yunie"}’s okay.{\n}She’s breathing fine and all.
maca0400.20: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}And {PC:05:LULU}, well, she’s{\n}just the same as always.
maca0400.21: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}She’s so together.{\n}All grown up, I guess.
maca0400.23: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Well, just give me five or six more years.
maca0400.24: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}So, {PC:03:KIMAHRI}, how{\n}do we get out of here?
maca0400.30: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I think he means you have to work{\n}hard if you want to be like {PC:05:LULU}.
maca0400.35: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}How can you laugh{\n}at a time like this!?
maca0400.38: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I wanted to confront Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}about his father, Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}.
maca0400.39: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I wanted to convince him to turn{\n}himself in to {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s judgment.
maca0400.44: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Now I...now I don’t even{\n}think it was worth it.
maca0400.45: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I should’ve told you{\n}what I was going to do.
maca0400.48: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Hey! You don’t have{\n}to say it like that!
maca0400.49: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}You want to waste time{\n}listening to her regrets?
maca0400.50: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}You don’t have to say it like that.
maca0400.54: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But then, do you think{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} will allow it?
maca0400.55: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}The {MCR:s06l3D:"fayth"} are the ones that{\n}give power to the summoners.
maca0400.57: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}If the temples try to stop us...
maca0400.58: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}then we will defy {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} if we must.
maca0400.63: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}But still, we have transgressed{\n}and must face our punishment.
maca0400.65: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}We must speak with Maester Mika{\n}and explain what has happened.
maca0400.66: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}There is no other way, I think.
maca0400.73: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You can always count on{\n}{PC:02:AURON} to complicate things!
maca0400.76: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}I never asked you to follow me.
maca0400.84: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Man... How can you all{\n}act like nothing’s wrong?
maca0400.86: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You’re too edgy. Listen{\n}to the hymn and calm down.
maca0400.88: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Yes, it is {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s gift.{\n}It soothes the hearts of the faithful.
maca0400.93: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}But not this good, that’s for sure.
maca0400.99: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}We have to atone, to make up{\n}for the sins we have committed.
maca0400.101: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}it’s not like I ever liked{\n}Maester {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}, ya?
maca0400.102: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}No way I’ll ever forgive him{\n}for killing Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"}...
maca0400.103: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}and for trying to do us{\n}all in too, you know?
maca0400.104: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}But still, the bunch of us{\n}going against {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}?

slik0300.0: {\n}Oh, what a great day!{\n}The breeze must feel wonderful.
slik0300.1: {\n}Wanna man the helm?{\n}Yeah, right. Just kidding.
slik0300.3: {\n}Maybe I’ll go have chat with Lady {PC:01:YUNA}, too.
slik0300.5: {\n}If {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} can’t sink this ship, nothing can!{\n}We’re guaranteed a safe voyage.
slik0300.6: {\n}There’s been turmoil on shore, but it’s{\n}got nothing to do with us out here.
slik0300.7: {\n}Even if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} appears, I’ll just do{\n}my best to follow the captain’s orders.
slik0300.8: {\n}Even if it’s against {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s teachings,{\n}I want to sail that flying ship!
slik0300.10: {\n}We’ll arrive in {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} before nightfall.{\n}Go on, take a nap or something.
slik0300.15: {\n}Let’s hope that the great sea will{\n}ease the pain of a battered sailor.
slik0300.17: {\n}Well, this ship’s survived {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}!{\n}She’ll weather this, too.

kino0100.25: {\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s emblem bears mystic powers.{PAUSE}{\n}Step onto the platform, and you shall see.
kino0100.40: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
kino0100.42: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
kino0100.1: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}We’ve been expecting you.{\n}Please proceed to the command center.
kino0100.3: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}myself included. Thank you{\n}for being here, my lady.
kino0100.4: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}Depending on the way things turn{\n}out, we might suffer casualties.
kino0100.6: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}We may have to fight here,{\n}as well. Stay alert.
kino0100.8: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}Well, with your guardians near you{\n}shouldn’t have anything to worry about.
kino0100.9: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}Don’t say we shouldn’t be{\n}using machina! Not now, please?
kino0100.10: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}I hope Captain {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"} notices{\n}my efforts in this mission!
kino0100.11: {\n}There is increasing fiend activity.{\n}This may not be much help, but...
kino0100.14: {\n}Do you think {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} will take{\n}us back in if we succeed?
kino0100.15: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}In the end, I wasn’t able{\n}to stop them, as you can see.
kino0100.16: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}But seeing their fierce determination,{\n}I couldn’t just sit there.
kino0100.17: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}So I decided that I would do{\n}everything in my power to help them.
kino0100.19: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}I’m hoping that will be{\n}of some use to them.
kino0100.20: {MCR:s06l0B:"Shelinda"}{\n}Is there anything I can{\n}do to help you?

hiku1600.8: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}What’ll you do when{\n}you find her, eh?
hiku1600.9: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I... I-I didn’t know anything about{\n}what a summoner is...is supposed to do.
hiku1600.10: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}And I told her all those things{\n}without even knowing.
hiku1600.11: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I’ve got to tell her.{\n}I’ve got to tell her I’m sorry!
hiku1600.12: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}That’s it? You’re gonna{\n}tell her you’re sorry?
hiku1600.19: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}Boy, don’t forget those words,{\n}’cause if you do...

bsvr0200.350: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
bsvr0200.352: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
bsvr0200.357: {TIME:00}The secrets of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}  language are revealed!{\n}{SPACE:01}[ {CLR:OL_PURPLE}P{CLR:WHITE} → {CLR:PINK}B{CLR:WHITE} ]
bsvr0200.359: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hujela{CLR:WHITE}!
bsvr0200.360: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Pakehhan{CLR:WHITE}!
bsvr0200.361: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Typpman{CLR:WHITE}!
bsvr0200.362: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Maynhan{CLR:WHITE}!
bsvr0200.363: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Cbaygan{CLR:WHITE}!
bsvr0200.364: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hydeja{CLR:WHITE}!
bsvr0200.365: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Unydun{CLR:WHITE}!
bsvr0200.366: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Medanyde{CLR:WHITE}!
bsvr0200.367: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Sycdan{CLR:WHITE}!
bsvr0200.5: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}If {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s nearby,{\n}it’ll attack the island for sure.
bsvr0200.8: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}To tell the truth, I don’t{\n}even know what the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s are.
bsvr0200.19: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Well, we’ve steered {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} away{\n}from towns many times!
bsvr0200.20: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}And that’s all we can do.{\n}Nobody’s ever been able to defeat it.
bsvr0200.22: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}So then whose job is it{\n}to defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}?
bsvr0200.26: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}Go pray at the temple. Perhaps {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}will help you regain your memory.
bsvr0200.27: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}But soon, we may be able{\n}to finally defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsvr0200.28: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}We’ve got a plan--one that’ll{\n}go down in {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"} history!
bsvr0200.39: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}We have to keep sharp{\n}for the village’s sake.
bsvr0200.41: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}It’s not like I can go around{\n}crying in front of my men.
bsvr0200.43: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}No matter what happened, he’d{\n}never let it show in front of you.
bsvr0200.44: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Always a fighter,{\n}never a complaint, you know?
bsvr0200.49: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}We can’t seem to win our battles,{\n}but still men want to join us
bsvr0200.50: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}I think {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} did more for{\n}the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s than we know.
bsvr0200.51: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}Even if {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} casts us aside...{\n}the villages of {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} need us.
bsvr0200.52: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}I heard there was trouble{\n}within {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, is it true?
bsvr0200.53: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}Look at them! And they were{\n}pointing fingers at us!
bsvr0200.55: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}I hear {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} made a big mess{\n}of {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}, eh?
bsvr0200.58: {\n}You’re the guy from the sea, right?{\n}I heard about you from Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}.
bsvr0200.59: {\n}{MCR:s06l3A:"High Summoner Gandof"}, give us your{\n}blessing, and watch over my family.
bsvr0200.60: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsvr0200.61: {\n}What are you saying? You would{\n}break the precepts, fool child?
bsvr0200.63: {\n}You should pray for the{\n}apprentice summoner’s safety, too.
bsvr0200.66: {\n}I’m heading out fishing, so I’m{\n}praying for a {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}less ocean.
bsvr0200.67: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsvr0200.68: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} put up a great fight this year.{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}’s the best, ya?
bsvr0200.69: {\n}It may not be much help to Lady {PC:01:YUNA},{\n}but allow me to pray for you.
bsvr0200.70: {\n}I know {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s out there, but if I{\n}don’t go out, my family won’t eat.
bsvr0200.71: {\n}I hear you’re traitors, now?{\n}Who’s responsible for that nonsense?
bsvr0200.74: {\n}I’ll be out to sea soon. Perhaps I’ll{\n}be greeting the Calm from deck.
bsvr0200.76: {\n}I’m praying for the blessings of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}to guide that flying ship.
bsvr0200.77: {\n}Odd clothes you got. What land you from?{\n}This your first time to {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}?
bsvr0200.78: {\n}We don’t get many strangers here.{\n}I remember every visitor we get.
bsvr0200.79: {\n}Everyone’s gone to the temple, but{\n}I’m more comfortable praying at home.
bsvr0200.80: {\n}And what if something happened?{\n}I’d be afraid to go see.
bsvr0200.82: {\n}I am sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will become a high{\n}summoner. Everyone in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} thinks so.
bsvr0200.83: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed.{\n}Maybe {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will repent and come home.
bsvr0200.86: {\n}I can’t figure whether I’m gonna join{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} or the Crusaders!
bsvr0200.87: {\n}I’m pretty good at blitz, ya?{\n}I can hold my breath and everything!
bsvr0200.88: {\n}They say I gotta train in order{\n}to join the Crusaders...
bsvr0200.89: {\n}Me and Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will{\n}beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, just the three of us!
bsvr0200.93: {\n}Let’s go help the summoner!{\n}I promise I’ll be a good boy!
bsvr0200.94: {\n}A summoner came to this village not{\n}long ago. Now what was his name?
bsvr0200.95: {\n}Looks like you got{\n}over the toxin, ya?
bsvr0200.96: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and the others aren’t back.{\n}What could have happened?
bsvr0200.97: {\n}It is true Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s a traitor?{\n}No one here believes that at all!
bsvr0200.98: {\n}We got letters from the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}!{\n}They’re doing great in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?
bsvr0200.99: {\n}I wonder if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is really{\n}going to go away?
bsvr0200.100: {\n}Long as I’m around, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s weaving{\n}will be known as nothing but the best!
bsvr0200.101: {\n}Don’t you worry. The summoner will{\n}return, I know it.
bsvr0200.102: {\n}Worrying over a few hours delay{\n}is nothing but a lack of faith!
bsvr0200.104: {\n}Who cares who they’re calling traitor.{\n}Defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and it’ll all be forgotten!
bsvr0200.105: {\n}Wait for the Calm to come before rejoicing.{\n}Wouldn’t want any...false hope.
bsvr0200.106: {\n}I am sure that Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} is{\n}watching over our apprentice summoner.
bsvr0200.107: {\n}On a hot day like today,{\n}it’s best to be in the shade, ya?
bsvr0200.108: {\n}I wove so much last month. All lost{\n}when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} destroyed my boat.
bsvr0200.110: {\n}Gone for a night and a day now.{\n}I’m too worried to speak!
bsvr0200.111: {\n}Though I’m sure nothing bad is{\n}happening. Not to that summoner.
bsvr0200.112: {\n}I’m glad the ferry’s on its way,{\n}but {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will be back, he will.
bsvr0200.114: {\n}When those children calling themselves{\n}{MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s come back, they’re in for a scolding.
bsvr0200.115: {\n}All these warrior monks were here{\n}looking for Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.
bsvr0200.116: {\n}If Lady {PC:01:YUNA} defeats {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} I’m sure{\n}those nasty rumors will go away.
bsvr0200.117: {\n}I wonder who was riding{\n}on that ship in the sky?
bsvr0200.124: {\n}You’re going with Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?{\n}Does that mean you’re a guardian?
bsvr0200.126: {\n}You’re saving it for the tournament then!{\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} have got to win this year!
bsvr0200.129: {\n}You’re the talk of the town, you know?{\n}Word travels fast in a village this size.
bsvr0200.135: {\n}The apprentice is the apprentice!{\n}The apprentice summoner, ya?
bsvr0200.136: {\n}The Cloister of Trials!{\n}It’s been a day already.
bsvr0200.138: {\n}I’m watching the store while{\n}sis is off praying.
bsvr0200.142: {\n}I wonder if we’ll get more customers{\n}now that the ferry’s up and running again.
bsvr0200.144: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are still in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?{\n}You should pay ’em a visit sometime.
bsvr0200.145: {\n}What happened to the flying ship?{\n}I hope it made it through the fight.
bsvr0200.146: {\n}Just between me and you, I hear that{\n}there’s no maesters left anymore!
bsvr0200.149: {\n}The apprentice entered the trials,{\n}and hasn’t come back...
bsvr0200.150: {\n}I’m sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will have{\n}lots of stories when she gets back.
bsvr0200.152: {\n}When the Calm comes, Lady {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}has to come back so we can celebrate!
bsvr0200.153: {\n}What’s a trader? I asked the{\n}monk, but he won’t tell me.
bsvr0200.154: {\n}If that flying ship comes back{\n}I’m gonna sing real loud!
bsvr0200.157: {\n}Fiends are around even during the day.{\n}Take care not to travel alone, ya?
bsvr0200.158: {\n}You know it’s too dangerous.{\n}Sorry, but you can’t pass.
bsvr0200.160: {\n}Instead of just loafing around{\n}you should be praying, too.
bsvr0200.161: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and his troops are on a mission.{\n}I’m on watch duty.
bsvr0200.163: {\n}Like to take a rest?{\n}Got to keep sharp, ya?
bsvr0200.165: {\n}Compared to the ones we fought during{\n}the operation, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} fiends are easy!
bsvr0200.166: {\n}I did my time in battle!{\n}Fiends are no problem.
bsvr0200.167: {\n}That flying ship looked like an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}machina to me. Hope it works this time.
bsvr0200.168: {\n}The Crusaders’ Lodge is open{\n}to guests. Take a rest?
bsvr0200.169: {\n}I want to go to the temple, but{\n}there’s an operation to prepare for.
bsvr0200.172: {\n}I got better, but only after{\n}praying at the temple a lot.
bsvr0200.173: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsvr0200.174: {\n}I hope I get over the toxin quick.{\n}The big operation’s coming up!
bsvr0200.175: {\n}You looking for {PC:04:WAKKA}? The priest{\n}called him to the temple a while back.
bsvr0200.177: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsvr0200.178: {\n}I’m praying for Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}’s and the others’{\n}safety. Yevon knows they’ll need it.
bsvr0200.180: {\n}Just a bunch of empty beds{\n}without people to sleep in them.
bsvr0200.181: {\n}I can’t believe {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"}{\n}was a failure. I just can’t.
bsvr0200.182: {\n}I just pray everyone makes{\n}it back okay. Please.
bsvr0200.183: {\n}Praying won’t keep fiends away.{\n}It takes {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s to defend {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsvr0200.184: {\n}The toxin finally wore off. Now to{\n}make up for all my downtime, ya?
bsvr0200.185: {\n}The battle with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} ain’t over yet...{\n}I wish there was something we could do.
bsvr0200.186: {\n}I’m fixing a hole where the{\n}rain gets in.
bsvr0200.187: {\n}Rent’s free, but I’ve been working{\n}like a dog just fixing the place.
bsvr0200.190: {\n}He looks pretty weak.{\n}Maybe he just can’t take it.
bsvr0200.191: {\n}I guess I’ll just keep fixing the leaks{\n}until the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s get back.
bsvr0200.194: {\n}Seems the fiends have increased{\n}with the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s gone.
bsvr0200.195: {\n}I’m no fiend-fighter, so I fix things{\n}and help the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s that way.
bsvr0200.198: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} toxin got to you.{\n}Took your memory, eh?
bsvr0200.199: {\n}I’d be happy to teach you anything{\n}you’ve forgotten, sonny.
bsvr0200.202: {\n}Maybe if I remind you of some things,{\n}you’ll remember who you are!
bsvr0200.211: {\n}All this worrying’s no good{\n}for an old man like myself.
bsvr0200.212: {\n}I’m sure you’d like to know{\n}more before you head out, eh?
bsvr0200.214: {\n}Looks like you got over the toxin.{\n}Praise be to {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, eh?
bsvr0200.216: {\n}We simple folk ain’t got a clue{\n}what them temple elders are thinking.
bsvr0200.217: {\n}I think I’ll stick around long enough to{\n}see {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} get what’s coming to it! Heh!
bsvr0200.218: {\n}Me favorite’s Lord Ohalland, ya?{\n}Spitting image of me old hubby.
bsvr0200.219: {\n}With Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} looking over her,{\n}I’m sure she’ll be returning, ya?
bsvr0200.221: {\n}I’ve nothing to say to a{\n}breaker of the precepts!
bsvr0200.223: {\n}What? You? A guardian?{\n}The toxin still got you, eh?
bsvr0200.224: {\n}What trick have you pulled{\n}on the good Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?
bsvr0200.225: {\n}I made up me mind to pray every{\n}day till Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s Calm begins.
bsvr0200.226: {\n}When the Calm comes, we’ll be putting{\n}up a statue of a new high summoner.
bsvr0200.228: {\n}I wanted to be a blitzer way back when.{\n}I just couldn’t hold my breath.
bsvr0200.229: {\n}Mainlanders love the fabrics{\n}we weave here in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsvr0200.230: {\n}I suppose you can’t run a{\n}business on tradition alone, ya?
bsvr0200.235: {\n}Without breaking the precepts,{\n}all we can do is pray, ya?
bsvr0200.236: {\n}I heard {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} was attacked, ya?{\n}Wh-What if {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s next?
bsvr0200.238: {\n}I bet me praying every day helped{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} finally win, ya?
bsvr0200.240: {\n}I wonder how things are on the mainland.{\n}We don’t get much news down here.
bsvr0200.241: {\n}Sounds like that poppycock about{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA} finally got cleared up.
bsvr0200.242: {\n}Now if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’d just go away,{\n}we’d have nothing to worry about.
bsvr0200.243: {\n}It’s hard to work with the{\n}Calm right around the corner!
bsvr0200.244: {\n}May the apprentice summoner{\n}return to us safely.
bsvr0200.246: {\n}It...It’s like we were{\n}born to live in fear.
bsvr0200.247: {\n}May the protection of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}be with our apprentice.
bsvr0200.249: {\n}When I think about Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s{\n}journey, I wonder if praying is enough.
bsvr0200.250: {\n}I’m sure she’ll be fine.{\n}{PC:05:LULU}’s with her and all.
bsvr0200.252: {\n}You should watch yourself.{\n}Never go against the teachings.
bsvr0200.254: {\n}I can’t believe Lady {PC:01:YUNA} would ever{\n}turn her back to the teachings! Never!
bsvr0200.255: {\n}I pray that the next Calm{\n}will last a long time.
bsvr0200.256: {\n}Please let the Aurochs{\n}score at least one goal.
bsvr0200.259: {\n}When I was born, Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} and{\n}two guardians came to our village.
bsvr0200.262: {\n}If I was strong like Lord {MCR:s06l24:"Zaon"}{\n}I could have been a guardian, too.
bsvr0200.263: {\n}Only sworn guardians may{\n}approach the Cloister of Trials.
bsvr0200.264: {\n}Pray hard, and the toxin will{\n}surely release its grip on you.
bsvr0200.267: {\n}Quickly, to the village square!{\n}Share in our joy!
bsvr0200.270: {\n}You look better than you did yesterday.{\n}Has {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin weakened its grip?
bsvr0200.271: {\n}The summoner undergoes the trials.{\n}We must not interfere.
bsvr0200.273: {\n}The chaos in the temple only{\n}serves to worry the people.
bsvr0200.276: {\n}I, too, will pray for the{\n}blessing of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} to shine upon you.
bsvr0200.278: {\n}Great strength is only obtained{\n}through great suffering.
bsvr0200.280: {\n}It appears the summoner’s pilgrimage{\n}goes well! Very good, very good.
bsvr0200.283: {\n}Even the teachings of a thousand years{\n}are due for an update once in a while.
bsvr0200.284: {\n}Why, if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is defeated, we may{\n}no longer need {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s guidance.
bsvr0200.286: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsvr0200.287: {\n}With the statues’ guidance, I’m{\n}sure our apprentice is doing fine.
bsvr0200.288: {\n}Pray at the temple, and you may{\n}just overcome {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin.
bsvr0200.290: {\n}The people of the village could use{\n}your help. You should pray, too.
bsvr0200.291: {\n}I suppose we’ll have to call our{\n}apprentice Lady {PC:01:YUNA} now.
bsvr0200.292: {\n}And you, heathen. Know that the{\n}teachings are the only true guide!
bsvr0200.295: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsvr0200.297: {\n}Word of Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s achievements{\n}has reached this island, too.
bsvr0200.298: {\n}I hear you’ve become a guardian!{\n}May you guard Lady {PC:01:YUNA} well.
bsvr0200.300: {\n}Those warrior monks that came to the{\n}island were just a bunch of crooks, ya?
bsvr0200.301: {\n}Who can the people of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} turn{\n}to now that {MCR:s06l1B:"Maester Mika"} is gone?
bsvr0200.305: {\n}Hey, I’m worried too!{\n}But all we can do is wait.
bsvr0200.307: {\n}Sorry, no time to talk.{\n}Rover starts barking when I slack off.
bsvr0200.311: {\n}Heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s got their butts{\n}kicked. They had it coming, if you ask me.
bsvr0200.313: {\n}Well, if it ain’t the traitors!{\n}You got some nerve coming here!
bsvr0200.314: {\n}Hey, hey, just kidding!{\n}No need to glare, ya?
bsvr0200.315: {\n}I hear things at the temples are a mess.{\n}Bad for business, I tell you.
bsvr0200.317: {\n}When that ship came, the old man,{\n}he kept working while he sang!
bsvr0200.319: {\n}The village where I was born is{\n}no longer there, thanks to {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsvr0200.322: {\n}Careful not to break any more precepts,{\n}or you’ll end up like the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s!
bsvr0200.323: {\n}A summoner named Lord {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"} came{\n}to the village, but he left so soon.
bsvr0200.324: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed{\n}as expected, because they used machina!
bsvr0200.327: {\n}Maybe I should learn {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}{\n}weaving...make a place for myself here.
bsvr0200.328: {\n}I doubt some old song is going{\n}to help anyone beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsvr0200.329: {\n}Seafaring is hard work. Gotta kick{\n}back sometimes. Get some R & R, ya?
bsvr0200.331: {\n}I sure hope we don’t run into{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on our next voyage.
bsvr0200.333: {\n}I do hope they come back safely.
bsvr0200.334: {\n}I’m gonna kick back in town{\n}till the next ship gets here.
bsvr0200.335: {\n}There’s no time to rest out there.{\n}Never know when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will show up.
bsvr0200.337: {\n}I really, really hope we don’t{\n}run into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on this voyage.
bsvr0200.339: {\n}I kinda got to liking this town.{\n}Maybe I’ll give up seafaring.
bsvr0200.340: {\n}One of my friends is on your ship.{\n}I’ll pray for both of you.
bsvr0200.342: {\n}No matter what happens in the{\n}temples, it’s life as usual here.
bsvr0200.343: {\n}Seems kind of odd to pray{\n}for the temples’ sake, ya?
bsvr0200.344: {\n}That flying ship was spectacular!{\n}Those {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} might have something there.

djyt0400.3: {\n}I wonder who the next grand maester will be.
djyt0400.7: {\n}I solemnly pray Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will become a{\n}wonderful summoner. Please take care of her.
djyt0400.10: {\n}I cannot say they are right or wrong.
djyt0400.13: {\n}You were the best, Captain!{\n}We’ll never forget you!

ptkl0800.16: {\n}He’s been like that ever since{\n}he returned from {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"}.
ptkl0800.19: {\n}We’ll bill the temple{\n}for all the food they took.
ptkl0800.26: {\n}Hey, are you a blitzer?{\n}Good luck! I’m rooting for you!
ptkl0800.27: {\n}My sister’s the greatest. She plays{\n}{MCR:s06l41:"blitzball"} and works at the same time.
ptkl0800.28: {\n}I’m gonna grow up to be a{\n}blitzer just like my sister!
ptkl0800.30: {TIME:00}The secrets of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}  language are revealed!{\n}{SPACE:01}[ {CLR:OL_PURPLE}T{CLR:WHITE} → {CLR:PINK}D{CLR:WHITE} ]

bjyt0400.3: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, wait! Wait!{\n}Don’t go out on me!
bjyt0400.14: {\n}I forbid it!{\n}We bring it with us.
bjyt0400.17: {\n}With flint and tinder, you could{\n}start another fire here.
bjyt0400.18: {\n}You need flint to start a fire.
bjyt0400.19: {\n}To start a fire, you need{\n}some kind of flammable tinder.
bjyt0400.22: {\n}They have soaked up too much{\n}rainwater to serve as tinder...
bjyt0400.33: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.

kino0900.23: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
kino0900.8: {\n}Slightly warm, but no sign of breathing.

bvmm0000.0: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}Smallest heap of huts I ever seen!
bvmm0000.1: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}Now, that looks like{\n}a fine place to live.
bvmm0000.5: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}When this is over...{\n}could you bring {PC:01:YUNA} here?
bvmm0000.6: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}I want her to lead a life{\n}far away from this conflict.
bvmm0000.7: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}You have my word.{\n}I will bring her here.
bvmm0000.10: {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}{\n}I’m so hungry{\n}I could eat a shoopuf whole!

mtgz0200.83: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
mtgz0200.85: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
mtgz0200.2: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}{MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"} is on the{\n}other side, you know?
mtgz0200.4: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}{MCR:s06l66:"Yunie"} is gonna get the{\n}Final Aeon, you know?
mtgz0200.16: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Just now, you sounded{\n}like a leader, you know?
mtgz0200.17: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Star of the {MCR:s06l4B:"Zanarkand Abes"}!{\n}Didn’t anyone tell you?
mtgz0200.24: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Now is your time to die.{\n}Prepare yourself, son of {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}.
mtgz0200.30: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Allow me to say something to{\n}the last {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"} before I leave.
mtgz0200.32: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}They threw themselves{\n}at me to bar my path.
mtgz0200.36: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}You could end the suffering{\n}of this poor {MCR:s06l51:"Ronso"}.
mtgz0200.38: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Allow {PC:03:KIMAHRI} to die, and{\n}release him from his pain.
mtgz0200.40: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}is a land of suffering and sorrow{\n}caught in a spiral of death.
mtgz0200.44: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Once I have become the next {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}your father will be freed again.
mtgz0200.58: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is my old man.{\n}My old man became {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}!
mtgz0200.59: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I don’t know how or why he did it.
mtgz0200.60: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I felt him, inside.{\n}And when I did, I knew it was true.
mtgz0200.67: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I think my old man would want that.
mtgz0200.71: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}You sure this ain’t some kinda{\n}bad toxin dream or something?
mtgz0200.74: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I, uh... I think I’ll just{\n}pretend I didn’t hear nothing.

genk1500.0: {\n}Thought I was done for, back there.
genk1500.7: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Yeah, you don’t look so good.{\n}What happened?
genk1500.10: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}That really hurt, you know.{\n}You big meanie!
genk1500.21: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Wow, so you, like, owe her your life!{\n}What luck meeting here, ya?
genk1500.24: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}You look a little beat up!{\n}You okay?
genk1500.48: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}{PC:06:RIKKU}’s a good girl.{\n}She helped me a bunch!
genk1500.49: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Well, I’m for it!{\n}The more, the merrier!
genk1500.50: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Right-o! Then I’ll just{\n}have to be the merriest!
genk1500.54: {\n}He never realized{\n}{PC:06:RIKKU} was one of them.

bsil0300.4: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You want me on your team, right?
bsil0300.6: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}A major blitz tournament’s coming up.{\n}All the teams in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}’ll be there!
bsil0300.7: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}It’s so huge, I’m sure someone{\n}there will recognize you!
bsil0300.8: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Then you can go back{\n}to your old team, right?

bsyt0400.0: {\n}You’re the guy from the sea, right?{\n}I heard about you from Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}.
bsyt0400.1: {\n}{MCR:s06l3A:"High Summoner Gandof"}, give us your{\n}blessing, and watch over my family.
bsyt0400.2: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsyt0400.3: {\n}What are you saying? You would{\n}break the precepts, fool child?
bsyt0400.5: {\n}You should pray for the{\n}apprentice summoner’s safety, too.
bsyt0400.8: {\n}I’m heading out fishing, so I’m{\n}praying for a {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}less ocean.
bsyt0400.9: {\n}I’m getting ready to go out fishing.{\n}There’s fiends out in the sea, ya?
bsyt0400.10: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} put up a great fight this year.{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}’s the best, ya?
bsyt0400.11: {\n}It may not be much help to Lady {PC:01:YUNA},{\n}but allow me to pray for you.
bsyt0400.12: {\n}I know {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s out there, but if I{\n}don’t go out, my family won’t eat.
bsyt0400.13: {\n}I hear you’re traitors, now?{\n}Who’s responsible for that nonsense?
bsyt0400.16: {\n}I’ll be out to sea soon. Perhaps I’ll{\n}be greeting the Calm from deck.
bsyt0400.18: {\n}I’m praying for the blessings of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}to guide that flying ship.
bsyt0400.19: {\n}Odd clothes you got. What land you from?{\n}This your first time to {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}?
bsyt0400.20: {\n}We don’t get many strangers here.{\n}I remember every visitor we get.
bsyt0400.21: {\n}Everyone’s gone to the temple, but{\n}I’m more comfortable praying at home.
bsyt0400.22: {\n}And what if something happened?{\n}I’d be afraid to go see.
bsyt0400.24: {\n}I am sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will become a high{\n}summoner. Everyone in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} thinks so.
bsyt0400.25: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed.{\n}Maybe {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will repent and come home.
bsyt0400.28: {\n}I can’t figure whether I’m gonna join{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} or the Crusaders!
bsyt0400.29: {\n}I’m pretty good at blitz, ya?{\n}I can hold my breath and everything!
bsyt0400.30: {\n}They say I gotta train in order{\n}to join the Crusaders...
bsyt0400.31: {\n}Me and Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"} will{\n}beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, just the three of us!
bsyt0400.35: {\n}Let’s go help the summoner!{\n}I promise I’ll be a good boy!
bsyt0400.36: {\n}A summoner came to this village not{\n}long ago. Now what was his name?
bsyt0400.37: {\n}Looks like you got{\n}over the toxin, ya?
bsyt0400.38: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and the others aren’t back.{\n}What could have happened?
bsyt0400.39: {\n}It is true Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s a traitor?{\n}No one here believes that at all!
bsyt0400.40: {\n}We got letters from the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}!{\n}They’re doing great in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?
bsyt0400.41: {\n}I wonder if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is really{\n}going to go away?
bsyt0400.42: {\n}Long as I’m around, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s weaving{\n}will be known as nothing but the best!
bsyt0400.43: {\n}Don’t you worry. The summoner will{\n}return, I know it.
bsyt0400.44: {\n}Worrying over a few hours delay{\n}is nothing but a lack of faith!
bsyt0400.46: {\n}Who cares who they’re calling traitor.{\n}Defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and it’ll all be forgotten!
bsyt0400.47: {\n}Wait for the Calm to come before rejoicing.{\n}Wouldn’t want any...false hope.
bsyt0400.48: {\n}I am sure that Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} is{\n}watching over our apprentice summoner.
bsyt0400.49: {\n}On a hot day like today,{\n}it’s best to be in the shade, ya?
bsyt0400.50: {\n}I wove so much last month. All lost{\n}when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} destroyed my boat.
bsyt0400.52: {\n}Gone for a night and a day now.{\n}I’m too worried to speak!
bsyt0400.53: {\n}Though I’m sure nothing bad is{\n}happening. Not to that summoner.
bsyt0400.54: {\n}I’m glad the ferry’s on its way,{\n}but {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will be back, he will.
bsyt0400.56: {\n}When those children calling themselves{\n}{MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s come back, they’re in for a scolding.
bsyt0400.57: {\n}All these warrior monks were here{\n}looking for Lady {PC:01:YUNA}.
bsyt0400.58: {\n}If Lady {PC:01:YUNA} defeats {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} I’m sure{\n}those nasty rumors will go away.
bsyt0400.59: {\n}I wonder who was riding{\n}on that ship in the sky?
bsyt0400.66: {\n}You’re going with Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?{\n}Does that mean you’re a guardian?
bsyt0400.68: {\n}You’re saving it for the tournament then!{\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} have got to win this year!
bsyt0400.71: {\n}You’re the talk of the town, you know?{\n}Word travels fast in a village this size.
bsyt0400.77: {\n}The apprentice is the apprentice!{\n}The apprentice summoner, ya?
bsyt0400.78: {\n}The Cloister of Trials!{\n}It’s been a day already.
bsyt0400.80: {\n}I’m watching the store while{\n}sis is off praying.
bsyt0400.84: {\n}I wonder if we’ll get more customers{\n}now that the ferry’s up and running again.
bsyt0400.86: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are still in {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}, ya?{\n}You should pay ’em a visit sometime.
bsyt0400.87: {\n}What happened to the flying ship?{\n}I hope it made it through the fight.
bsyt0400.88: {\n}Just between me and you, I hear that{\n}there’s no maesters left anymore!
bsyt0400.91: {\n}The apprentice entered the trials,{\n}and hasn’t come back...
bsyt0400.92: {\n}I’m sure Lady {PC:01:YUNA} will have{\n}lots of stories when she gets back.
bsyt0400.94: {\n}When the Calm comes, Lady {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}has to come back so we can celebrate!
bsyt0400.95: {\n}What’s a trader? I asked the{\n}monk, but he won’t tell me.
bsyt0400.96: {\n}If that flying ship comes back{\n}I’m gonna sing real loud!
bsyt0400.99: {\n}Fiends are around even during the day.{\n}Take care not to travel alone, ya?
bsyt0400.100: {\n}You know it’s too dangerous.{\n}Sorry, but you can’t pass.
bsyt0400.102: {\n}Instead of just loafing around{\n}you should be praying, too.
bsyt0400.103: {\n}Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} and his troops are on a mission.{\n}I’m on watch duty.
bsyt0400.105: {\n}Like to take a rest?{\n}Got to keep sharp, ya?
bsyt0400.107: {\n}Compared to the ones we fought during{\n}the operation, {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} fiends are easy!
bsyt0400.108: {\n}I did my time in battle!{\n}Fiends are no problem.
bsyt0400.109: {\n}That flying ship looked like an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}machina to me. Hope it works this time.
bsyt0400.110: {\n}The Crusaders’ Lodge is open{\n}to guests. Take a rest?
bsyt0400.111: {\n}I want to go to the temple, but{\n}there’s an operation to prepare for.
bsyt0400.114: {\n}I got better, but only after{\n}praying at the temple a lot.
bsyt0400.115: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsyt0400.116: {\n}I hope I get over the toxin quick.{\n}The big operation’s coming up!
bsyt0400.117: {\n}You looking for {PC:04:WAKKA}? The priest{\n}called him to the temple a while back.
bsyt0400.119: {\n}You should try praying. It worked{\n}for me--it’ll work for you, too.
bsyt0400.120: {\n}I’m praying for Sir {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}’s and the others’{\n}safety. Yevon knows they’ll need it.
bsyt0400.122: {\n}Just a bunch of empty beds{\n}without people to sleep in them.
bsyt0400.123: {\n}I can’t believe {MCR:s06l3C:"Operation Mi’ihen"}{\n}was a failure. I just can’t.
bsyt0400.124: {\n}I just pray everyone makes{\n}it back okay. Please.
bsyt0400.125: {\n}Praying won’t keep fiends away.{\n}It takes {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s to defend {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsyt0400.126: {\n}The toxin finally wore off. Now to{\n}make up for all my downtime, ya?
bsyt0400.127: {\n}The battle with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} ain’t over yet...{\n}I wish there was something we could do.
bsyt0400.128: {\n}I’m fixing a hole where the{\n}rain gets in.
bsyt0400.129: {\n}Rent’s free, but I’ve been working{\n}like a dog just fixing the place.
bsyt0400.132: {\n}He looks pretty weak.{\n}Maybe he just can’t take it.
bsyt0400.133: {\n}I guess I’ll just keep fixing the leaks{\n}until the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s get back.
bsyt0400.136: {\n}Seems the fiends have increased{\n}with the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s gone.
bsyt0400.137: {\n}I’m no fiend-fighter, so I fix things{\n}and help the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s that way.
bsyt0400.140: {\n}I heard the {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} toxin got to you.{\n}Took your memory, eh?
bsyt0400.141: {\n}I’d be happy to teach you anything{\n}you’ve forgotten, sonny.
bsyt0400.144: {\n}Maybe if I remind you of some things,{\n}you’ll remember who you are!
bsyt0400.153: {\n}All this worrying’s no good{\n}for an old man like myself.
bsyt0400.154: {\n}I’m sure you’d like to know{\n}more before you head out, eh?
bsyt0400.156: {\n}Looks like you got over the toxin.{\n}Praise be to {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, eh?
bsyt0400.158: {\n}We simple folk ain’t got a clue{\n}what them temple elders are thinking.
bsyt0400.159: {\n}I think I’ll stick around long enough to{\n}see {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} get what’s coming to it! Heh!
bsyt0400.160: {\n}Me favorite’s Lord Ohalland, ya?{\n}Spitting image of me old hubby.
bsyt0400.161: {\n}With Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} looking over her,{\n}I’m sure she’ll be returning, ya?
bsyt0400.163: {\n}I’ve nothing to say to a{\n}breaker of the precepts!
bsyt0400.165: {\n}What? You? A guardian?{\n}The toxin still got you, eh?
bsyt0400.166: {\n}What trick have you pulled{\n}on the good Lady {PC:01:YUNA}?
bsyt0400.167: {\n}I made up me mind to pray every{\n}day till Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s Calm begins.
bsyt0400.168: {\n}When the Calm comes, we’ll be putting{\n}up a statue of a new high summoner.
bsyt0400.170: {\n}I wanted to be a blitzer way back when.{\n}I just couldn’t hold my breath.
bsyt0400.171: {\n}Mainlanders love the fabrics{\n}we weave here in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
bsyt0400.172: {\n}I suppose you can’t run a{\n}business on tradition alone, ya?
bsyt0400.177: {\n}Without breaking the precepts,{\n}all we can do is pray, ya?
bsyt0400.178: {\n}I heard {MCR:s0Dl0F:"Kilika"} was attacked, ya?{\n}Wh-What if {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}’s next?
bsyt0400.180: {\n}I bet me praying every day helped{\n}the {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} finally win, ya?
bsyt0400.182: {\n}I wonder how things are on the mainland.{\n}We don’t get much news down here.
bsyt0400.183: {\n}Sounds like that poppycock about{\n}Lady {PC:01:YUNA} finally got cleared up.
bsyt0400.184: {\n}Now if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’d just go away,{\n}we’d have nothing to worry about.
bsyt0400.185: {\n}It’s hard to work with the{\n}Calm right around the corner!
bsyt0400.186: {\n}May the apprentice summoner{\n}return to us safely.
bsyt0400.188: {\n}It...It’s like we were{\n}born to live in fear.
bsyt0400.189: {\n}May the protection of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}be with our apprentice.
bsyt0400.191: {\n}When I think about Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s{\n}journey, I wonder if praying is enough.
bsyt0400.192: {\n}I’m sure she’ll be fine.{\n}{PC:05:LULU}’s with her and all.
bsyt0400.194: {\n}You should watch yourself.{\n}Never go against the teachings.
bsyt0400.196: {\n}I can’t believe Lady {PC:01:YUNA} would ever{\n}turn her back to the teachings! Never!
bsyt0400.197: {\n}I pray that the next Calm{\n}will last a long time.
bsyt0400.198: {\n}Please let the Aurochs{\n}score at least one goal.
bsyt0400.201: {\n}When I was born, Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} and{\n}two guardians came to our village.
bsyt0400.204: {\n}If I was strong like Lord {MCR:s06l24:"Zaon"}{\n}I could have been a guardian, too.
bsyt0400.205: {\n}Only sworn guardians may{\n}approach the Cloister of Trials.
bsyt0400.206: {\n}Pray hard, and the toxin will{\n}surely release its grip on you.
bsyt0400.209: {\n}Quickly, to the village square!{\n}Share in our joy!
bsyt0400.212: {\n}You look better than you did yesterday.{\n}Has {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin weakened its grip?
bsyt0400.213: {\n}The summoner undergoes the trials.{\n}We must not interfere.
bsyt0400.215: {\n}The chaos in the temple only{\n}serves to worry the people.
bsyt0400.218: {\n}I, too, will pray for the{\n}blessing of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} to shine upon you.
bsyt0400.220: {\n}Great strength is only obtained{\n}through great suffering.
bsyt0400.222: {\n}It appears the summoner’s pilgrimage{\n}goes well! Very good, very good.
bsyt0400.225: {\n}Even the teachings of a thousand years{\n}are due for an update once in a while.
bsyt0400.226: {\n}Why, if {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is defeated, we may{\n}no longer need {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}’s guidance.
bsyt0400.228: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsyt0400.229: {\n}With the statues’ guidance, I’m{\n}sure our apprentice is doing fine.
bsyt0400.230: {\n}Pray at the temple, and you may{\n}just overcome {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s toxin.
bsyt0400.232: {\n}The people of the village could use{\n}your help. You should pray, too.
bsyt0400.233: {\n}I suppose we’ll have to call our{\n}apprentice Lady {PC:01:YUNA} now.
bsyt0400.234: {\n}And you, heathen. Know that the{\n}teachings are the only true guide!
bsyt0400.237: {\n}I appreciate the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ zeal,{\n}but they must heed the teachings.
bsyt0400.239: {\n}Word of Lady {PC:01:YUNA}’s achievements{\n}has reached this island, too.
bsyt0400.240: {\n}I hear you’ve become a guardian!{\n}May you guard Lady {PC:01:YUNA} well.
bsyt0400.242: {\n}Those warrior monks that came to the{\n}island were just a bunch of crooks, ya?
bsyt0400.243: {\n}Who can the people of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} turn{\n}to now that {MCR:s06l1B:"Maester Mika"} is gone?
bsyt0400.247: {\n}Hey, I’m worried too!{\n}But all we can do is wait.
bsyt0400.249: {\n}Sorry, no time to talk.{\n}Rover starts barking when I slack off.
bsyt0400.253: {\n}Heard the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s got their butts{\n}kicked. They had it coming, if you ask me.
bsyt0400.255: {\n}Well, if it ain’t the traitors!{\n}You got some nerve coming here!
bsyt0400.256: {\n}Hey, hey, just kidding!{\n}No need to glare, ya?
bsyt0400.257: {\n}I hear things at the temples are a mess.{\n}Bad for business, I tell you.
bsyt0400.259: {\n}When that ship came, the old man,{\n}he kept working while he sang!
bsyt0400.261: {\n}The village where I was born is{\n}no longer there, thanks to {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsyt0400.264: {\n}Careful not to break any more precepts,{\n}or you’ll end up like the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s!
bsyt0400.265: {\n}A summoner named Lord {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"} came{\n}to the village, but he left so soon.
bsyt0400.266: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s’ operation failed{\n}as expected, because they used machina!
bsyt0400.269: {\n}Maybe I should learn {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}{\n}weaving...make a place for myself here.
bsyt0400.270: {\n}I doubt some old song is going{\n}to help anyone beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
bsyt0400.271: {\n}Seafaring is hard work. Gotta kick{\n}back sometimes. Get some R & R, ya?
bsyt0400.273: {\n}I sure hope we don’t run into{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on our next voyage.
bsyt0400.275: {\n}I do hope they come back safely.
bsyt0400.276: {\n}I’m gonna kick back in town{\n}till the next ship gets here.
bsyt0400.277: {\n}There’s no time to rest out there.{\n}Never know when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} will show up.
bsyt0400.279: {\n}I really, really hope we don’t{\n}run into {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} on this voyage.
bsyt0400.281: {\n}I kinda got to liking this town.{\n}Maybe I’ll give up seafaring.
bsyt0400.282: {\n}One of my friends is on your ship.{\n}I’ll pray for both of you.
bsyt0400.284: {\n}No matter what happens in the{\n}temples, it’s life as usual here.
bsyt0400.285: {\n}Seems kind of odd to pray{\n}for the temples’ sake, ya?
bsyt0400.286: {\n}That flying ship was spectacular!{\n}Those {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} might have something there.

msmm0000.1: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}I know I don’t need to tell you this,{\n}but guard Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} well.
msmm0000.5: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}You know that promotion{\n}was meant for you.
msmm0000.6: Kinoc{\n}You were always the better one,{\n}even until the end.
msmm0000.7: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}You make it sound as if{\n}I was going off to die or something.
msmm0000.12: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}You will tell me about {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}{\n}when you return, won’t you?

guad0700.1: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}She was the first person to defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}{\n}and save the world from its ravages.
guad0700.3: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}It was my father who named me.
guad0700.4: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"} was entrusting{\n}you with a great task.
guad0700.5: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}He wanted you to face {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"},{\n}as Lady Yunalesca did.
guad0700.6: {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}{\n}However, Lady Yunalesca{\n}did not save the world alone.

ikai0600.1: {\n}The {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"} was cool, but I{\n}couldn’t stop thinking about {PC:01:YUNA}.
ikai0600.5: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Meant to come see you earlier, ya?
ikai0600.7: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I know you won’t hold it against me.
ikai0600.12: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}But, then again, here{\n}you are on the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}.
ikai0600.15: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Oh, that guy I just told you ’bout.{\n}I gave him your sword.
ikai0600.18: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Why don’t you try calling someone?{\n}All you have to do is think about them.
ikai0600.19: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}He is dead, and I am still alive.
ikai0600.21: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I should focus more on{\n}what I have to do now.
ikai0600.24: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I’m not even sure what I’m saying.
ikai0600.25: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Don’t you mean that you{\n}should leave {MCR:s06l18:"Chappu"} behind?
ikai0600.26: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I’m sure he was a great guy,{\n}but there’ll be others.
ikai0600.34: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Knowing a bit about women{\n}might come in handy some day.
ikai0600.39: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}But those were the{\n}happiest days of my life.
ikai0600.43: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I remember, when I was only{\n}seven years old, in {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"} that day.
ikai0600.44: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}My father had defeated {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, and{\n}the whole town was out in the streets.
ikai0600.45: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Everyone was laughing.{\n}They all seemed so happy.
ikai0600.46: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}If I defeated {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, that would{\n}make everyone happy...wouldn’t it?
ikai0600.47: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I must do what everyone{\n}wants, not just what I want.
ikai0600.52: {\n}Trying not to think about my old man{\n}made me think about him, of course.
ikai0600.54: {\n}He isn’t here because{\n}he’s not dead. He’s {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
ikai0600.56: {\n}What if my old man really is {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}?
ikai0600.57: {\n}What would I say to {PC:01:YUNA}...{\n}heck, to everybody in {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}?
ikai0600.58: {\n}Wait, why should I have{\n}to apologize for him, anyway?
ikai0600.62: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}It was his fault that{\n}me and my mother...
ikai0600.67: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Wait. No one ever performed{\n}the sending for her.
ikai0600.68: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}She must’ve accepted death{\n}while she was still alive.
ikai0600.69: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Whoa there, that’s my{\n}mother you’re talking about.
ikai0600.73: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I think I just figured something out.
ikai0600.92: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I need to be alone right now.
ikai0600.93: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I’m still not the person{\n}I wanted to become, not yet.
ikai0600.94: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I’ll come back to let{\n}you know how things went.
ikai0600.99: {\n}Hey, I...I brought you something!{\n}Check this out!
ikai0600.100: {\n}See? She looks just like you!{\n}Her name’s ”{PC:01:YUNA}.”
ikai0600.101: {\n}Boy was I surprised{\n}first time I saw her!
ikai0600.102: {\n}I almost thought you had come back!
ikai0600.103: {\n}{PC:01:YUNA}’s a summoner, too--{\n}a pretty good one.
ikai0600.104: {\n}Ah, ’course she’s not as good as you.
ikai0600.105: {\n}If you were still alive,{\n}I bet you’d fight just like her.
ikai0600.106: {\n}It’s okay. {PC:01:YUNA} will beat{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} for you, I know it.
ikai0600.109: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}I have prayed and prayed, yet{\n}Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} does not appear.
ikai0600.110: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Has he not reached the {MCR:s0Dl26:"Farplane"}?{\n}Has he become a fiend?
ikai0600.111: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}Oh, my poor Lord {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}...{\n}Tell me, where do you wander?
ikai0600.112: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}When Lord {MCR:s06l27:"Jyscal"} was alive, the{\n}{MCR:s06l4F:"Guado"} knew prosperity and honor.
ikai0600.114: {MCR:s06l10:"Tromell"}{\n}I, myself, could have{\n}done more to stop this.

lchb1100.0: {\n}I made a Movie Sphere of all{\n}of us singing.
lchb1100.1: {\n}Whenever I come to Luca, I always buy{\n}a sphere to take back to my family.
lchb1100.2: {\n}Can I interest you in one of our{\n}limited edition {CLR:BLUE}Music Spheres{CLR:WHITE}?
lchb1100.7: {\n}You will also need to use the audiovisual{\n}{CLR:BLUE}control panel{CLR:WHITE} found in the main hall.
lchb1100.8: {\n}So, would you like to purchase{\n}a memento of your travels?
lchb1100.10: {\n}You already have the entire collection of songs.
lchb1100.17: {\n}I’m awfully sorry.{\n}Only one per customer, please.
lchb1100.23: {TIME:00}Sorry, I don’t have that many in stock.
lchb1100.28: {TIME:00}{\n}Music Sphere: {CLR:YELLOW}1{CLR:WHITE}{\n}is now available for your listening pleasure!
lchb1100.29: {TIME:00}{\n}Music Sphere: {CLR:YELLOW}1 - {VAR:01}{CLR:WHITE}{\n}are now available for your listening pleasure!
lchb1100.30: {\n}Would you like to preserve memories of{\n}your travels on a {CLR:BLUE}Movie Sphere{CLR:WHITE}?
lchb1100.34: {\n}There are currently no images{\n}available for recording.
lchb1100.41: {TIME:00}{\n}Movie Sphere: {CLR:YELLOW}1{CLR:WHITE}{\n}is now available for your viewing pleasure!
lchb1100.42: {TIME:00}{\n}Movie Sphere: {CLR:YELLOW}1 - {VAR:03}{CLR:WHITE}{\n}are now available for your viewing pleasure!
lchb1100.43: {\n}It is a sphere that can record images{\n}from the past that stand out in your mind.
lchb1100.44: {\n}The images are saved onto a {CLR:BLUE}Movie Sphere{CLR:WHITE}.
lchb1100.45: {\n}It follows the same basic principles{\n}as sphere cameras, or monitors:
lchb1100.46: {\n}it captures the moment, so to speak.

luca0800.1: {\n}High Summoner {MCR:s06l37:"Ohalland"} used to play{\n}for them--a big name to live up to.
luca0800.2: {\n}Their hometown was recently attacked{\n}by {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}. Isn’t that right, Jimma?
luca0800.5: {\n}Our next team off the ramp is...
luca0800.6: {\n}Well, well, well!{\n}If it isn’t the {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"}!

znkd0900.6: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}What are you laughing at, old man?

lchb0801.2: {\n}The fans are getting impatient!{\n}They’re calling for some action!
lchb0801.3: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}’ spirits are fading quickly!{\n}Are they going down without a fight?
lchb0801.6: {\n}He’s leaving the sphere pool!{\n}He may be injured!
lchb0801.7: {\n}I wonder what’s happening?{\n}The crowd is going wild!
lchb0801.8: {\n}Ah! It’s {PC:04:WAKKA}!{\n}He’s back on the field and ready to go!

lchb0800.0: {\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are keeping the score{\n}tied with some excellent defense, folks!
lchb0800.1: {\n}Ow!{\n}He’ll feel that one in the morning!
lchb0800.2: {\n}But the referee doesn’t call the foul!{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}’s taking a real beating out there.
lchb0800.3: {\n}Thirty seconds left! The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} are{\n}launching an all-out offensive!
