bika0400.10: {\n}You {PC:06:RIKKU}’s friends?{\n}Well, just don’t stand there, come on!

lchb0803.1: Bobba{\n}They’re already going at it, folks!
lchb0803.3: Bobba{\n}The fans are getting impatient!{\n}They’re calling for some action!
lchb0803.4: Bobba{\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"}’ spirits are fading quickly!{\n}Are they going down without a fight!?
lchb0803.5: Bobba{\n}Everyone seems to be{\n}calling for {PC:04:WAKKA}, folks!
lchb0803.7: Bobba{\n}He’s leaving the sphere pool!{\n}He may be injured!
lchb0803.8: Bobba{\n}I wonder what’s happening?{\n}The crowd is going wild!
lchb0803.9: Bobba{\n}Ah! It’s {PC:04:WAKKA}!{\n}He’s back on the field and ready to go!
lchb0803.10: Bobba{\n}The {MCR:s06l43:"Aurochs"} seem{\n}glad to have him back.

bsvr0300.1: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}But no matter what he{\n}looks like, he isn’t {MCR:s06l18:"Chappu"}.
bsvr0300.2: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You shouldn’t have brought{\n}him here in the first place!
bsvr0300.13: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}He was with the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s when they{\n}fought {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} last year. He didn’t make it.
bsvr0300.14: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I first heard on the{\n}day of the tournament.
bsvr0300.19: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I’m more worried about a stupid{\n}game now than avenging my brother.
bsvr0300.20: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Well, after the next tournament,{\n}I’ll be a guardian full-time.
bsvr0300.21: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}I know it kinda looks like{\n}I’m using you, but I’m not.
bsvr0300.22: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Don’t worry.{\n}I mean, I owe you a lot.
bsvr0300.23: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You really helped me out, you know?

hiku1500.6: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Yes, I can hear the Hymn, too.
hiku1500.0: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}We gotta keep our distance, boys,{\n}but we can’t let her get too far away.
hiku1500.1: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}You all have to tell me{\n}when to move!
hiku1500.2: {MCR:s06l29:"Cid"}{\n}But tell me quick, eh?{\n}This rig ain’t so nimble, you hear?

lchb0000.10: {\n}The hymn we all sang at the stadium{\n}is still echoing in my ears.
lchb0000.8: {\n}The stadium is now open.{\n}You may enter freely.
lchb0000.5: {\n}The first match has already begun.{\n}Please hurry to your seat.
lchb0000.6: {\n}We are currently assessing the damage{\n}from the fiends. No admittance.
lchb0000.7: {\n}Access is no longer restricted.{\n}Feel free to enter.
lchb0000.12: {\n}I’m right by the stadium, but I can’t{\n}watch the game. What a bummer...
lchb0000.11: {\n}Did you forget something inside?{\n}Give it up. I doubt you’ll find it.
lchb0000.13: {\n}It took forever to fix the{\n}stands inside the stadium.
lchb0000.30: {\n}We are protecting Luca under Maester Kinoc’s{\n}orders. You should all be grateful!
lchb0000.29: {\n}I hope the operation succeeds.{\n}I want to come back here next year...
lchb0000.36: {\n}The merchants of Luca have raised{\n}money to support the Crusaders.
lchb0000.35: {\n}So many Crusaders have died and yet people{\n}are watching blitzball? This city is heartless.
lchb0000.34: {\n}I am relieved the grand maester is safe.{\n}We owe it all to {MCR:s06l34:"Maester Seymour"}.
lchb0000.32: {\n}The Crusaders were in charge of guarding{\n}the stadium up until last year.
lchb0000.41: {\n}I heard Sin has fallen in Bevelle!{\n}Could it be that the Calm is almost here?
lchb0000.40: {\n}I’ve decided to join the Crusaders.{\n}No sense hiding behind their back all the time.
lchb0000.38: {\n}Ending the tournament with the fiend{\n}attack left a bad taste in my mouth.
lchb0000.37: {\n}The Goers are definitely gonna win.{\n}Everyone else is goin’ down!
lchb0000.44: {\n}The Crusaders will help us with security.{\n}We will support them all the way!
lchb0000.43: {\n}The warrior monks are helping us out,{\n}so guard duty’s not as bad as before.
lchb0000.49: {\n}I hope the Calm will last at least a year.{\n}Would three be asking for too much?
lchb0000.48: {\n}I think the Crusaders are more suited{\n}to Luca than the warrior monks are.
lchb0000.47: {\n}The warrior monks are planning to guard the{\n}ferries. I’m not sure if that’s good or bad.
lchb0000.46: {\n}{MCR:s06l1B:"Maester Mika"} returned to {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}{\n}soon after the tournament.
lchb0000.54: {\n}Once Sin is gone for good, I hope you play{\n}every day! I’ll be there to cheer you on!
lchb0000.53: {\n}Hey, when are you playin’ next?{\n}I really want to see you again.
lchb0000.52: {\n}I really enjoyed your awesome moves!{\n}I hope I get to see you play more often.
lchb0000.51: {\n}Nice work out there.{\n}Now I know you’re not all talk.
lchb0000.50: {\n}I saw your rallying cry on the sphere.{\n}Heheh, best of luck to you.
lchb0000.58: {\n}Did you know that you’re more popular than{\n}ever, now that you’re branded as a traitor?
lchb0000.57: {\n}No one knows who unleashed the{\n}fiends into the stadium.
lchb0000.56: {\n}I’m afraid to imagine what would’ve{\n}happened if {MCR:s06l34:"Maester Seymour"} hadn’t been here.
lchb0000.55: {\n}Players must return to their locker{\n}room for the opening ceremony.
lchb0000.63: {\n}I will fight as a Crusader until{\n}Spira is rid of all fiends.
lchb0000.61: {\n}The captain’s making me work{\n}so that he can go see the game!
lchb0000.60: {\n}I will be heading for the operation soon.{\n}I must bid adieu to the city of {MCR:s0Dl18:"Luca"}.
lchb0000.59: {\n}I’m rooting for the Al Bhed Psyches this year.{\n}They’re helping out the Crusaders, you know.
lchb0000.66: {\n}We have resumed ferry operation.{\n}We’re as busy as ever.
lchb0000.65: {\n}Sin is lurking in the waters nearby.{\n}Ferry service has been postponed indefinitely.
lchb0000.64: {\n}Even the ships don’t leave the port during{\n}the tournament. Just kick back and relax, man.
lchb0000.70: {\n}Please report any suspicious{\n}activity to me immediately!
lchb0000.69: {\n}The {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s have planned a grand{\n}operation to smash the fiends.
lchb0000.74: {\n}The temple has dispatched their warrior monks{\n}to guard the stadium. I am thankful, indeed.
lchb0000.72: {\n}Aren’t you a blitzer?{\n}Better check the rules while you still can.
lchb0000.101: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
lchb0000.99: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
lchb0000.4: {\n}We are sorry, but not even blitzball{\n}players are allowed to pass.
lchb0000.18: {\n}The opening ceremony is about to begin.{\n}All players must wait in their locker rooms.
lchb0000.19: {\n}You’re not a blitzer, are you?{\n}Nah, couldn’t be. The game’s already started.

nagi0000.216: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Perhaps you’d like to test your{\n}mettle against another summoner?
nagi0000.225: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}An aeon duel!{\n}Show me what you’re made of.
nagi0000.282: {\n}This kid seems to like me{\n}for some reason.
nagi0000.298: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}How do you ride a chocobo?{\n}{CHOICE:01}Let me train one.{\n}{CHOICE:02}Never mind.
nagi0000.303: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}I want to ride a chocobo!{\n}{CHOICE:01}Walking’s not that bad.
nagi0000.185: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Perhaps you would like to{\n}know a bit about these plains?
nagi0000.203: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Like to hear about{\n}this place once more?
nagi0000.309: {\n}We’ve always lived by the{\n}teachings, but look at us now.
nagi0000.311: {\n}I sang the Hymn! Put all my heart{\n}into it! I hope that flying ship wins.
nagi0000.317: {\n}We have nowhere to turn now.{\n}What should we do?
nagi0000.318: {\n}Our son won’t stay away{\n}from that {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.
nagi0000.319: {\n}He’d better not be teaching{\n}him anything sacrilegious.
nagi0000.321: {\n}I don’t care where we go, as{\n}long as I’m with Mom and Dad!
nagi0000.323: {\n}That nice {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} man{\n}sang the Hymn with me!
nagi0000.324: {\n}Do you think they’ll let me ride{\n}the flying ship if I became {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}?
nagi0000.337: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
nagi0000.339: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
nagi0000.344: {TIME:00}{\n}With me at your back go twenty,{\n}then twenty to the right.
nagi0000.350: {TIME:00}The secrets of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}  language are revealed!{\n}{SPACE:01}[ {CLR:OL_PURPLE}F{CLR:WHITE} → {CLR:PINK}W{CLR:WHITE} ]
nagi0000.352: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hujela{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0000.353: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Pakehhan{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0000.354: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Typpman{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0000.355: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Maynhan{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0000.356: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Cbaygan{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0000.357: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Hydeja{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0000.358: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Unydun{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0000.359: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Medanyde{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0000.360: {TIME:00}{PC:00:TIDUS} has achieved the rank of {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} Sycdan{CLR:WHITE}!
nagi0000.13: {\n}Also, don’t hesitate to ask me{\n}about the {CLR:YELLOW}controls{CLR:WHITE}, okay?
nagi0000.28: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}As ready as ever.{\n}{CHOICE:01}Get me off this bird!{\n}{CHOICE:02}Show me the controls.
nagi0000.49: {\n}After tallying all the birds and{\n}balloons, our total times are...
nagi0000.56: {\n}I’m so happy someone finally{\n}finished all the exercises!
nagi0000.58: {\n}Challenge me anytime.{\n}I love a good race.
nagi0000.62: {\n}Feel free to stop by{\n}for training anytime.
nagi0000.69: {\n}Hmm... I think your chocobo{\n}could use some more training.
nagi0000.71: {\n}Don’t give up.{\n}Someday you’ll hold the record!
nagi0000.74: {\n}Hey, you’ve got to pass{\n}between me and my chocobo!
nagi0000.77: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}One more time!{\n}{CHOICE:01}I quit.{\n}{CHOICE:02}Let’s do something else.
nagi0000.80: {\n}Whoops, I ran out of time.{\n}Here, this is for you.
nagi0000.81: {\n}Always keep an eye on the clock!
nagi0000.87: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Beyond, there’re no towns,{\n}no villages. Only endless plains.
nagi0000.88: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Many summoners stray from{\n}their path and lose their way here.
nagi0000.91: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I won’t let you die.{\n}I’ll find a way, somehow.
nagi0000.93: {\n}I told {PC:01:YUNA} I would find a way.
nagi0000.94: {\n}I guess I wanted to believe that{\n}words could make it come true.
nagi0000.102: {MCR:s06l1F:"Zuke"}{\n}{MCR:s06l1A:"Maester Mika"} just issued{\n}a personal order, you know.
nagi0000.103: {MCR:s06l1F:"Zuke"}{\n}It said that you and your guardians{\n}murdered {MCR:s06l2D:"Maester Kinoc"} and fled.
nagi0000.104: {MCR:s06l1F:"Zuke"}{\n}We are to kill you on sight,{\n}or so it says.
nagi0000.106: {MCR:s06l1F:"Zuke"}{\n}Things are calm on the surface,{\n}but the depths are turbulent.
nagi0000.109: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Getting around will be easier{\n}with {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"} in disarray.
nagi0000.110: {MCR:s06l1F:"Zuke"}{\n}But be careful, my friends.{\n}You have been branded enemies of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.
nagi0000.111: {MCR:s06l1F:"Zuke"}{\n}You should avoid temples{\n}for the time being.
nagi0000.113: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Father, you came all the{\n}way here just to tell us this?
nagi0000.114: {MCR:s06l1F:"Zuke"}{\n}To tell the truth,{\n}I was a little curious to see...
nagi0000.119: {MCR:s06l1F:"Zuke"}{\n}I must be off.{\n}I shall pray for all of you.
nagi0000.122: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}It was kind of a short pilgrimage.
nagi0000.123: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}He gave up halfway.{\n}Here, on this plain.
nagi0000.124: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Now, he is a monk{\n}at the {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"} temple.
nagi0000.125: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}This is my third{\n}pilgrimage as a guardian.
nagi0000.126: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Father {MCR:s06l1F:"Zuke"} was my second.{\n}And my first, well...
nagi0000.128: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I’ve never been to the lands beyond.
nagi0000.129: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s0Dl3B:"Mt. Gagazet"}{CLR:WHITE} towers to the north,{\n}and {CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}{CLR:WHITE} lies beyond that.
nagi0000.132: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}’Bout when I was too into the{\n}game to be a good guardian?
nagi0000.134: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Tell you the truth, I was kinda glad.
nagi0000.135: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}{CLR:BLUE}{MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}{CLR:WHITE}’s right around the corner.{\n}So close already.
nagi0000.138: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}{MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.{\n}{MCR:s06l19:"Mika"} and {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"} are not of one mind.
nagi0000.144: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}But, I can’t just let her go.
nagi0000.146: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}We’ll save {PC:01:YUNA} even{\n}if she calls the Final Aeon.
nagi0000.155: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}And, if we can’t think of something...
nagi0000.164: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}Sacred mountain Gagazet.{\n}Not change for one thousand years.
nagi0000.166: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, let them say what they want.
nagi0000.168: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Well, maybe just a little.{\n}It’s so hard not to be.
nagi0000.169: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey, it’s okay to worry. And{\n}if it gets too rough, just yell!
nagi0000.173: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I wonder if my father{\n}got lost here, too?
nagi0000.174: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Maybe, with my old man helping him!
nagi0000.182: {\n}You can ride any of the chocobos{\n}running around this place for free.
nagi0000.183: {\n}But most of them are wild.{\n}Those won’t let you ride them.
nagi0000.184: {\n}Wild chocobos aren’t bridled.{\n}That’s how you tell them apart.
nagi0000.188: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}As you know, these plains{\n}were once a battlefield.
nagi0000.189: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}A great battle between {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}{\n}and {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}, a melee of machina!
nagi0000.190: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}That war left this place{\n}a barren, lifeless land.
nagi0000.192: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}The summoners took note{\n}of this uninhabited land.
nagi0000.193: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Great battles could be fought here,{\n}with no harm to the common folk.
nagi0000.194: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Perfect for a final battle{\n}with {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, as it were.
nagi0000.195: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Summoners wait here, ready{\n}to perform the Final Summoning.
nagi0000.196: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Ah, to know what they must feel!
nagi0000.197: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}In any case, when {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is defeated here,{\n}the {MCR:s06l63:"Calm"} will visit {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"} once more.
nagi0000.199: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}And that, as they say, is that.
nagi0000.200: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}Oh dear, I almost forgot{\n}to tell you something.
nagi0000.201: {MCR:s06l0C:"Maechen"}{\n}There’s a chasm, a great rend{\n}in the earth, in these parts.
nagi0000.207: {\n}After I’ve just given you a head start?
nagi0000.208: {\n}Don’t worry, though. I don’t pay much{\n}attention to the temple these days.
nagi0000.213: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Though, I gave up my pilgrimage{\n}a good many years ago...
nagi0000.215: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}How about it, {PC:01:YUNA}?{\n}I could show you a trick or two.
nagi0000.217: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Oh, you again. You’re quite{\n}the notorious traitor these days.
nagi0000.219: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Ah, you shouldn’t take what{\n}the maesters say too seriously.
nagi0000.222: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}So, are you up to the task?
nagi0000.223: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I do not know,{\n}but I will do my best.
nagi0000.224: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}You’ve got spirit, but{\n}you’ll need more to beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
nagi0000.226: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}No time to fight? I understand.{\n}I was in your shoes once.
nagi0000.229: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}I’ve just healed your aeons for you.{\n}Let us begin!
nagi0000.231: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}Traitor or no, you may have{\n}what it takes to beat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
nagi0000.234: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}I think you will do just fine.
nagi0000.237: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}I hope you will do better{\n}against {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, for your sake.
nagi0000.238: {MCR:s06l31:"Belgemine"}{\n}You need more training.{\n}That much is clear, summoner.
nagi0000.251: {\n}We don’t need no temple.{\n}Done just fine so far without one.
nagi0000.259: {\n}I hope you’re not planning{\n}to cross this place on foot.
nagi0000.263: {\n}Bye, now. Maybe next time{\n}I’ll have a chocobo ready for you.
nagi0000.267: {\n}I’m sorry. These things{\n}take time, you know?
nagi0000.271: {\n}I’ve trained some chocobos.{\n}Do you want to ride one?
nagi0000.272: {\n}Lost? Follow me if you{\n}want to go back to {MCR:s0Dl33:"Bevelle"}.
nagi0000.273: {\n}Look, these plains go on forever.{\n}Take it easy or you’ll die out here!
nagi0000.274: {\n}Smart travelers like me ride{\n}chocobos to avoid fiends!
nagi0000.275: {\n}Most chocobos around here are wild,{\n}but a few will let you ride them.
nagi0000.276: {\n}Look for chocobos with bridles.{\n}Those are the ones you want.
nagi0000.277: {\n}Chocobos here don’t belong to anyone.{\n}They’re free to choose their riders.

dome0100.24: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
dome0100.26: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
dome0100.6: {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}{\n}You can ask for them{\n}after I defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
dome0100.8: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}All that trouble getting here,{\n}only to find ruins!
dome0100.14: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}So, you’re saying it’s{\n}all in your hands now?
dome0100.15: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Fine, you do what you like,{\n}however you like. I’ll just wait my turn.
dome0100.16: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Well, it doesn’t matter who does the{\n}deed, but are you sure you’re up to it?
dome0100.18: {MCR:s06l05:"Dona"}{\n}Oh, I’m sure you will.{\n}{MCR:s06l06:"Barthello"}, shall we?

maca0500.0: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I hope that you’re not{\n}too mad at {PC:04:WAKKA}.
maca0500.7: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Well, I can tell she’s not a bad person.
maca0500.9: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You know what the problem is?{\n}She’s just another {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} to {PC:04:WAKKA}.
maca0500.11: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA}’s head is{\n}as hard as a rock.
maca0500.12: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I bet it’s because of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.{\n}Or, you know, something like that.
maca0500.13: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Well, there’s more to it than that.
maca0500.15: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{PC:04:WAKKA} doesn’t like the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}{\n}because of his brother {MCR:s06l18:"Chappu"}.
maca0500.24: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}I can’t say that I know, but why?
maca0500.26: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} is the punishment for, and the{\n}incarnation of, crimes we have committed.
maca0500.28: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}So, no one really knows what it is?
maca0500.29: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}There’s no need to know{\n}so no one asks.
maca0500.30: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You run or you fight.{\n}That is really all you can do.
maca0500.32: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}What, that’s all?{\n}I mean, you don’t even wonder?
maca0500.34: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You really do come from a world{\n}where there is no {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}, like you say.
maca0500.37: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}He didn’t have to be so mean, ya?
maca0500.42: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Hey, do I look like{\n}{MCR:s06l66:"Yunie"}, you think?
maca0500.44: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}Well, my dad’s sister is{\n}{MCR:s06l66:"Yunie"}’s mother, you get it?
maca0500.46: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I had no idea!{\n}If you say so.
maca0500.48: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Okay! I guess you’re{\n}guarding your family, then.
maca0500.49: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}’s not the only one{\n}that I want to protect.
maca0500.51: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}We {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} want to protect{\n}all of the summoners, you know?
maca0500.54: {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}they sacrifice themselves to,{\n}well...to bring happiness to {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}.
maca0500.63: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}But you know, {PC:01:YUNA}’s real{\n}serious about being a summoner.
maca0500.64: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}For {PC:01:YUNA}, well the pilgrimage{\n}kinda means everything to her.
maca0500.65: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You are going to help her,{\n}too, aren’t you, {PC:06:RIKKU}?
maca0500.67: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}So you shouldn’t say that{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}’s sacrificing herself.
maca0500.70: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You’re no fun to ride with at all.
maca0500.78: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I don’t need you to tell me that!
maca0500.79: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I guess there’s some sense{\n}in what you’re saying.
maca0500.82: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}That’s what youth is for after all.{\n}Do not waste it.
maca0500.87: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}What do you think about {PC:06:RIKKU}{\n}being an {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}?
maca0500.94: {PC:03:KIMAHRI}{\n}And {PC:06:RIKKU} is not a liar.{\n}{PC:03:KIMAHRI} can tell.
maca0500.96: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}You know, you might want{\n}to tell her that later.
maca0500.97: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}I think she needs to know{\n}that we still want her with us.

klyt0100.50: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
klyt0100.52: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
klyt0100.1: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}These stone steps have{\n}a history, you know?
klyt0100.13: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Sorry about that!{\n}Hoped to break you in a little slower.
klyt0100.15: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}You handled yourself pretty well.{\n}You got talent.
klyt0100.18: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Fiends. They fall from {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}’s body,{\n}and are left behind in its wake.
klyt0100.19: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Leave ’em alone, and {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} comes{\n}back for ’em. You gotta be quick!
klyt0100.20: {\n}That moment when {PC:04:WAKKA} told{\n}me I had talent in battle...
klyt0100.21: {\n}I think that was when I started seriously{\n}considering becoming a guardian.
klyt0100.23: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Just a few. It’s a big deal when{\n}one shows up, though.
klyt0100.24: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Hey! Since when have you believed{\n}me about {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}, anyway?
klyt0100.27: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}Maybe {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} carries ’em through time.{\n}Like a thousand years through time.
klyt0100.28: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}And then, one day,{\n}maybe they just pop back, see?
klyt0100.30: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}You make up one theory after another,{\n}refusing to face the simple truth.
klyt0100.32: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}{MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} crushed him and left him{\n}on the {MCR:s0Dl16:"Djose"} shore!
klyt0100.35: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}No matter how much you want it,{\n}no one can take {MCR:s06l18:"Chappu"}’s place.
klyt0100.36: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}No one can replace{\n}Sir {MCR:s06l54:"Jecht"}, for that matter.
klyt0100.38: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}It’s pointless to think{\n}about it, and sad.
klyt0100.42: {\n}Something had happened between them{\n}a long time ago. I was sure of it.

mihn0200.45: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}Let me ride one!{\n}{CHOICE:01}I’ll walk.{\n}{CHOICE:02}How do you ride a chocobo?
mihn0200.31: {\n}I am used to being hated, but now{\n}I do not feel like working anymore.
mihn0200.32: {\n}I am fed up of working with morons.
mihn0200.35: {\n}I pray for your safety. I do not wish{\n}harm on any more people.
mihn0200.39: {\n}When I hear the word {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}, I think of{\n}the {MCR:s06l56:"fiend"} attack on our {MCR:s06l5D:"Home"}.
mihn0200.33: {\n}We’re keeping an eye on the {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"}{\n}so they don’t take advantage of the people.
mihn0200.36: {\n}The children are happy.{\n}Everything is so new to them.
mihn0200.37: {\n}I must watch over the children. It is{\n}dangerous here. They could fall off the cliff.
mihn0200.40: {\n}I guess all children are innocent,{\n}whether they are ours or {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}.
mihn0200.49: {\n}Henceforth, I will work to engender harmony{\n}between the {MCR:s06l4E:"Al Bhed"} and our people.
mihn0200.52: {\n}I wanted to ride on the ship, too.{\n}It was a great battle, right?
mihn0200.53: {\n}Huh? The battle is not over?{\n}Then maybe we should sing again.
mihn0200.54: {\n}That is the biggest puddle{\n}I have ever seen!
mihn0200.55: {\n}There are many unusual plants.{\n}I wonder how they taste.
mihn0200.63: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
mihn0200.65: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
mihn0200.3: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}They don’t believe in {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"},{\n}and in Luca they...
mihn0200.10: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Now I know I can count on you.
mihn0200.11: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Gimme a break. I just woke up.
mihn0200.13: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}It was your idea to fight that thing.
mihn0200.14: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}If you’re always so groggy,{\n}just stay awake.
mihn0200.16: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Have you an interest in{\n}renting some chocobos?
mihn0200.17: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}As a token of our gratitude,{\n}the first time is free of charge.
mihn0200.18: {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"}{\n}Please ask the attendant,{\n}if you wish to rent.
mihn0200.19: {\n}Thank you so much{\n}for saving the chocobos!
mihn0200.22: {\n}Do you want to ride a chocobo?
mihn0200.23: {\n}Do you want me to teach you{\n}how to ride a chocobo?
mihn0200.25: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}Summoners and guardians!{\n}I saw the fight. I was impressed!
mihn0200.26: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}Right now we’re charged with{\n}getting people off the Highroad.
mihn0200.27: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}But you... Well, you have a{\n}have a summoner, so you can stay.
mihn0200.28: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}Don’t tell anyone,{\n}but this is a really boring job.
mihn0200.29: {MCR:s06l0E:"Elma"}{\n}Oh, I took care of{\n}that fiend for you.

slik0400.26: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Hey, lad. I appreciate yer offer,{\n}but ye ain’t got enough gil.
slik0400.9: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Say, lad, you wouldn’t{\n}have a bit o’ gil to lend?
slik0400.36: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
slik0400.38: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
slik0400.1: {\n}Yewh! Filthy, filthy! These won’t{\n}sell or me name’s not {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}!
slik0400.2: {\n}Don’t look like you{\n}got much money, either.
slik0400.3: {\n}I’ve no business with ye.{\n}Outta me way!
slik0400.7: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Don’t know me?{\n}Well, not many do, not yet.
slik0400.8: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}But someday, the name {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}will be spoken all over {MCR:s0Dl03:"Spira"}!
slik0400.10: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}I guess it pays to ask!{\n}Thank ye kindly, lad!
slik0400.11: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Fine seed money for the{\n}{MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"} merchant empire!
slik0400.14: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Much obliged, lad!{\n}I’ll be sure to pay ye back!
slik0400.16: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}Restricted area!{\n}Our operation depends on this cargo!
slik0400.18: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}The fresh sea breeze might{\n}help restore your memory!
slik0400.19: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}I’m not at liberty{\n}to talk about our plan.
slik0400.20: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}If people think you’re with us,{\n}you’ll be excommunicated, too!

open0100.4: {\n}I thought about a lot of things...
open0100.5: {\n}like where I was,{\n}what I’d got myself into.
open0100.6: {\n}I started to feel light-headed...{\n}and then, sleepy.

kino0200.25: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}Just doing what they say?{\n}It just won’t be enough.
kino0200.94: {TIME:00}{CHOICE:00}Yeah, you should be out on the front lines.{\n}{CHOICE:01}Guarding the command center is important, too.
kino0200.28: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}I’ll do something...even if{\n}it means bending the rules.
kino0200.106: {\n}Well, I guess I should just be thankful.{\n}I never imagined I could buy stuff out here.
kino0200.110: {\n}I wonder what that merchant’s gonna do{\n}when the battle starts.
kino0200.116: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
kino0200.118: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
kino0200.5: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}It might be a hopeless campaign,{\n}and it might mean defying {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}...
kino0200.6: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}But the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s and the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}--{\n}they’re doing their best to defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"}.
kino0200.8: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}And that’s just what{\n}we want, too, isn’t it?
kino0200.11: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}But I still think machina are bad news.{\n}They’re forbidden for a reason!
kino0200.13: {MCR:s06l0D:"Lucil"}{\n}The command center is that way.{\n}{MCR:s06l2D:"Maester Kinoc"} is also there.
kino0200.24: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}First you must complete{\n}the tasks you are given.
kino0200.27: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}You’d think the same if you were me.
kino0200.29: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}I’ve got to show{\n}{MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"} what I can do.
kino0200.31: {\n}I’d heard from {MCR:s06l33:"Seymour"}, but I{\n}didn’t know if we’d actually meet.
kino0200.32: {\n}Good to see you, {PC:02:AURON}!{\n}Ten years, is it?
kino0200.34: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}That’s Wen {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}, one of{\n}the Four Maesters of {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}.
kino0200.35: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}He leads the warrior monks and{\n}also commands the {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s.
kino0200.36: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}All troops ready to move{\n}at your command, sir!
kino0200.39: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}Tell me, {PC:02:AURON}. Where have{\n}you been the last ten years?
kino0200.40: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}We don’t have time{\n}for this now, do we?
kino0200.41: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}This plan won’t work, you know that.
kino0200.42: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}We’ll just let them{\n}dream a little longer.
kino0200.48: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}A lot has happened the last ten years.{\n}What were you doing, and where?
kino0200.49: {PC:02:AURON}{\n}Fulfilling a promise I made{\n}to a friend. I still am.
kino0200.50: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}Just tell me one thing:{\n}have you seen {MCR:s0Dl01:"Zanarkand"}?
kino0200.52: {MCR:s06l2C:"Kinoc"}{\n}Being a maester has its privileges.{\n}I can just sit here and watch.
kino0200.53: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}With them here, it’s like {MCR:s06l3F:"Yevon"}{\n}authorizes this whole operation!
kino0200.54: {PC:05:LULU}{\n}Anything could happen.{\n}Make sure you’re ready for combat.
kino0200.58: {\n}We must tell the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} waiting outside{\n}to begin the operation at once.
kino0200.59: {\n}The fiends may break through.{\n}This place is not safe.
kino0200.66: {\n}To make sure, we’re going to{\n}encourage them to call out to it.
kino0200.72: {MCR:s06l03:"O’aka"}{\n}Monopoly’s a great thing! Things are{\n}sellin’ no matter what the price!
kino0200.77: {\n}Man, you’d think he’d shut up{\n}after five times--or was that six?
kino0200.78: {\n}The captain just keeps repeating himself.{\n}He must be really nervous.
kino0200.80: {\n}The operation will begin momentarily.{\n}Please do not leave this area.
kino0200.86: {\n}They’re {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} machina, so{\n}we have to be extra cautious.
kino0200.87: {\n}So far so good.{\n}I’m gonna run more tests.
kino0200.89: {\n}Okay, come on now!{\n}Pretend I’m a fiend!

bjyt0500.1: {\n}I wanted to give him{\n}the strength to live by himself.
bjyt0500.4: {\n}because I let him taste power,{\n}he began to thirst for more.
bjyt0500.5: {\n}He was not satisfied with my aeon.{\n}He wanted more. More power.

ptkl0100.19: {TIME:00}The {MCR:s06l42:"Besaid Aurochs"} are not at full{\n}strength. You need more members{\n}to participate in blitzball.
ptkl0100.21: {TIME:00}{CLR:YELLOW}-Traveler’s Save Sphere Level 3-{CLR:WHITE}{\n}Save Spheres can now teleport you back to{\n}the airship, thanks to {MCR:s06l16:"Rin"} the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"}!
ptkl0100.2: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}Greetings! I am the summoner {PC:01:YUNA}.{\n}I have come from the temple in {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
ptkl0100.4: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}If there is no other summoner here,{\n}please allow me to perform the sending.
ptkl0100.6: {\n}Our loved ones...{\n}We feared they would become fiends!
ptkl0100.8: {PC:04:WAKKA}{\n}We’ll go see what we{\n}can do to help in town.
ptkl0100.9: Letty{\n}{PC:00:TIDUS}, watch your step!{\n}It’s not safe this way.
ptkl0100.10: {\n}We won’t be able to return to{\n}{MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"} unless it’s fixed.
ptkl0100.11: {\n}The pub’s closed. I don’t think{\n}I can get through this without a drink.

djyt0300.42: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}We summoners must do our part, before{\n}another fool plan wastes more lives.
djyt0300.45: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}From there we take the ferry,{\n}perhaps as far as {MCR:s0Dl08:"Besaid"}.
djyt0300.48: {MCR:s06l09:"Maroda"}{\n}We should be climbing the slopes{\n}of {MCR:s0Dl3B:"Mt. Gagazet"} by now.
djyt0300.50: {\n}The Cloister of Trials lies within.{\n}Are you prepared?
djyt0300.52: {\n}The fayth has retired for the evening.{\n}The Cloister of Trials has been sealed.
djyt0300.53: {\n}The path to the Trials has been sealed.{\n}Please proceed to the next temple.
djyt0300.54: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}You’re leaving, I hear.{\n}Farewell, I hope we meet again.
djyt0300.58: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}I can’t stay here eating{\n}the temple’s bread forever.
djyt0300.59: {MCR:s06l02:"Luzzu"}{\n}I’m one of the only {MCR:s06l53:"Crusader"}s still here.
djyt0300.63: {MCR:s06l01:"Gatta"}{\n}I heard you’re leaving, too.{\n}Good luck. I hope we meet again someday.
djyt0300.65: {PC:00:TIDUS}{\n}Yeah. It’d be hard{\n}fighting alone, wouldn’t it?
djyt0300.0: {\n}I beg your pardon,{\n}but may I ask your name?
djyt0300.3: {\n}The daughter of Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}.{\n}You have the look of your father.
djyt0300.5: {\n}No, I have never met the man.
djyt0300.11: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}Since I was a child, I’ve always{\n}looked up to Lord {MCR:s06l25:"Braska"}.
djyt0300.12: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}I wished I would someday become{\n}a high summoner like he was.
djyt0300.13: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}You must have some of your{\n}father’s talent in you!
djyt0300.15: {PC:01:YUNA}{\n}I...I’m not really...{\n}I’ve only just become a summoner.
djyt0300.16: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}Of course, I’ve no intention{\n}of losing, either.
djyt0300.17: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}So perhaps we should race to see{\n}who can defeat {MCR:s06l40:"Sin"} first, no?
djyt0300.20: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}{PC:01:YUNA}, I beg your leave.{\n}Good luck, to both of us!
djyt0300.25: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}{MCR:s06l09:"Maroda"}’s heard a curious rumor.{\n}I thought you should know.
djyt0300.27: {MCR:s06l09:"Maroda"}{\n}Seems that summoners have been going{\n}out on pilgrimage and just...disappearing.
djyt0300.28: {MCR:s06l08:"Isaaru"}{\n}It could just be the fiends got them...{\n}but not so many so quickly.
djyt0300.29: {MCR:s06l09:"Maroda"}{\n}Sorry I don’t know more,{\n}but...watch your back.
djyt0300.30: {MCR:s06l09:"Maroda"}{\n}Ain’t much future for a guardian{\n}without a summoner, eh?
djyt0300.32: {MCR:s06l09:"Maroda"}{\n}We’re talking about doing{\n}your job as a guardian!

azit0700.4: {\n}Name the son of the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} leader.
azit0700.6: {\n}On what island do the {MCR:s06l4D:"Al Bhed"} live?
